About this item
FORMULATION 10X - 100% SAFE & NATURAL - Plant-Based Oil spray for lizards. This lizard repellent spray, considered the lizard repellent for home best, is made up of plant-based ingredients found in nature and is designed as a house lizard repellent. It is safe to use around children, nursing mothers, and kitchens with food out. As the lizard repellent for home best, it acts as a permanent solution for lizards, effectively repelling these pests both indoors and outdoors. This gecko lizard repellent is a reliable repellent for lizards, ensuring a lizard-free environment.
LONG LASTING SPRAY - Our Herbal Reptile Spray, the ultimate gecko lizard spray for home, is perfectly formulated with plant-based oils that provide long-lasting protection. Once sprayed, the repellence effect of this lizard repellent for home best will last for 60 days. This anti lizard repellent for home is a 100% natural reptile spray repellent for home, designed as an effective house lizard repellent. It serves as a reliable spray for lizards in home environments, acting as a powerful anti lizard spray. With its gecko lizard spray and lizard repellant properties, it ensures a lizard-free space, making it an ideal choice for anyone needing a high-quality lizard repellent for home.
CHILD SAFE - Natural Lizard repellent indoor, this lizard away spray will stop your reptile problem in its tracks. As a highly effective rat and lizard repellent for home, it will keep those annoying reptiles off your deck and patio naturally. You can even use it indoors or around food, as it is made from 100% natural essential oils. This is the best lizard repellent for home, offering a 100% natural and organic solution. Whether you need a lizard repel for your home or a reliable geko lizard repellent, this lizard repellent at home provides a safe and effective way to manage pests. It's a top choice for anyone looking to hit for lizards with a home lizard repellent that truly works.
Quick Result: Repeat spraying with our lizard spray for about a week to ensure lizards are not seen for up to 2 weeks. This lizard repellent for home best is designed to be a permanent solution for lizards, effectively keeping them at bay. Thanks to the well-built nozzle, spraying the lizard repellent spray is easy and leak-free, no matter how frequent the usage. You can rely on this house lizard repellent as a potent repellent for lizards without worrying about unpleasant stains and messes. It’s the ideal choice for those seeking a gecko lizard repellent that delivers quick and reliable results.
FRESH AND ENERGIZING SCENTS - Infuse your home’s interior or exterior with a fresh smell using this lizard control spray. Featuring Gecko India’s first aerosol-based herbal lizard repellent spray, it naturally drives lizards away. Regular use in infested areas ensures they leave your space. As the best lizard repellent for home, this lizard spray repellent offers effective lizard repellents and repeller properties, making lizard control effortless.

Shadow Securitronics Gecko Aerosol Based Odour Free Herbal Lizard Repellent Spray | Eco-Friendly & Biodegradable | Irritant &Chemical-Free | 220 ml (60 Days Protection) PK of 1-FORMULATION 10X
Important information
Safety Information:
Safety Warning – Gecko Herbal Lizard Repellent Spray For external use only. Do not ingest. Keep away from children, pets, and food. Avoid contact with eyes, mouth, and skin. If exposed, rinse well with water. Use in well-ventilated areas and avoid inhaling spray. Do not puncture or burn can, even when empty. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat. If swallowed or irritation occurs, seek medical advice immediately.
Ingredients:
Cymbopogon Schoenanthus oil, Cedrus atlantia oil, Azadirachta indica seed oil, Solvent, Propellent

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the lizard repellent to be of good quality, effective at repelling lizards, and easy to apply, with one customer noting it works quickly. The product is safe for humans and pets, and customers appreciate its non-toxic nature. The scent receives mixed reactions, with some finding it pleasant while others describe it as pungent. While some customers consider it worth the price, others feel it's not cost-effective.

FORMULATION 10X - 100% SAFE & NATURAL - Plant-Based Oil spray for lizards. Quick Result: Repeat spraying with our lizard spray for about a week to ensure lizards are not seen for up to 2 weeks. This lizard repellent for home best is designed to be a permanent solution for lizards, effectively keeping them at bay. Thanks to the well-built nozzle, spraying the lizard repellent spray is easy and leak-free, no matter how frequent the usage. You can rely on this house lizard repellent as a potent repellent for lizards without worrying about unpleasant stains and messes. FRESH AND ENERGIZING SCENTS - Infuse your home’s interior or exterior with a fresh smell using this lizard control spray. Important Information
Safety Information:
Safety Warning – Gecko Herbal Lizard Repellent Spray For external use only. Do not ingest. Keep away from children, pets, and food. Avoid contact with eyes, mouth, and skin. If exposed, rinse well with water. Use in well-ventilated areas and avoid inhaling spray. Do not puncture or burn can, even when empty. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat. If swallowed or irritation occurs, seek medical advice immediately.

About this item
Made with lightweight and durable material that provides excellent shock absorption and cushioning.
The design of these clogs is simple and classic, with a slip-on style that makes them easy to wear and remove.
These clogs are made with water-resistant material, making these clogs perfect for wear in wet or damp conditions.
Whether you're spending a day in the garden, roaming around town, Movie time, beach party or simply lounging at home, Red Tape men's clog are the perfect choice.
These clogs are available in a range of colors allowing you to choose a style that suits your personality and wardrobe.

Product description
Red Tape men's clogs made with EVA material are the ultimate in comfort and style. Red Tape clogs are made with lightweight and durable material that provides excellent shock absorption and cushioning, making these clogs ideal for a range of activities. The EVA material is also water-resistant, making these clogs perfect for wear in wet or damp conditions. The design of these clogs is simple and classic, with a slip-on style that makes them easy to wear and remove. The Red Tape logo is prominently displayed on the strap of the clogs, showcasing the brand's commitment to quality and style. These clogs are available in a range of colors allowing you to choose a style that suits your personality and wardrobe. The interior of these clogs is lined with soft, breathable materials that keep your feet cool and dry all day long. The clogs feature a textured sole that provides excellent traction on any surface, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor wear. Whether you're spending a day in the garden, roaming around town, Movie time, beach party or simply lounging at home, Red Tape men's clogs made with EVA material are the perfect choice. They offer excellent support, comfort, and style, making them a versatile addition to any wardrobe.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find these clogs to be of good quality, comfortable, and worth the price, with great looks and an awesome fit. The durability receives mixed feedback - while some find them durable, others report the back strap breaking within 2 days. The size and material quality also get mixed reviews, with some finding them perfect while others say the size is incorrect and the material is not premium.

nutesh gorde
3 out of 5 stars
I got Size shrinkage issue after 4 month of use
Reviewed in India on 4 May 2026
Size: 8 UK
Colour: Black
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
bought these clogs in January, and initially, they were really comfortable and felt great to wear. The cushioning was good, and they were perfect for daily casual use like walking or going to the store. The quality also seemed durable and long-lasting.
However, after around 3–4 months (end of April to May), I noticed a major issue — the clogs started shrinking. The size reduced so much that my heel began coming out of the front, which made them very uncomfortable to wear. This even caused some discomfort in my feet and slight knee pain due to improper fitting.
I didn’t expect this kind of issue, especially since I used them normally (not rough use — mostly casual and sometimes full-day wear). The product is still durable, but the shrinkage is a serious drawback.
Final verdict:
Good comfort and quality at first, but not reliable in the long term due to shrinkage. Buyers in hot weather areas should be careful.

Product description
Red Tape men's clogs made with EVA material are the ultimate in comfort and style. Red Tape clogs are made with lightweight and durable material that provides excellent shock absorption and cushioning, making these clogs ideal for a range of activities. The EVA material is also water-resistant, making these clogs perfect for wear in wet or damp conditions. The design of these clogs is simple and classic, with a slip-on style that makes them easy to wear and remove. The Red Tape logo is prominently displayed on the strap of the clogs, showcasing the brand's commitment to quality and style. These clogs are available in a range of colors allowing you to choose a style that suits your personality and wardrobe. The interior of these clogs is lined with soft, breathable materials that keep your feet cool and dry all day long. The clogs feature a textured sole that provides excellent traction on any surface, making them ideal for both indoor and outdoor wear. Whether you're spending a day in the garden, roaming around town, Movie time, beach party or simply lounging at home, Red Tape men's clogs made with EVA material are the perfect choice. They offer excellent support, comfort, and style, making them a versatile addition to any wardrobe.

# URL: https://www.amazon.in/shop/info
## Title: 
### Depth Level: 1
---

Amazon Influencer and Associate Programmes
Content creators participating in the Amazon Influencer and Associate Programmes earn affiliate commissions from Amazon for qualifying purchases.
What are the Amazon Influencer and Associate Programmes?
The Amazon Influencer and Associate Programmes bring product-related content from Influencers and Associates onto Amazon to help customers research and discover products that they might be interested in.
What is an Influencer or an Associate?
An Influencer or Associate is anyone who has a meaningful social media following. Influencers and Associates across any category can participate in this programme. Currently you must have a YouTube, Instagram, Tiktok, Facebook or Pinterest account to qualify.
How do I know when content is from an Influencer or an Associate?
Influencer and Associate content will always have the name of the programme (Amazon Influencer Programme or Amazon Associate Programme).
Does Amazon validate or express the opinions made in the content?
No. Influencers and Associates are able to independently determine whether to recommend a product. Amazon does not modify or edit content, as long as they comply with our
posting guidelines
Where does this content come from?
Amazon takes content provided by Influencers and Associates and surfaces the most relevant content for customers during their shopping experience.
How can I learn more about the influencer and associate making the recommendation?
Click on the Influencer's or the Associate's name provided with their content and you will be taken to their profile where they have a bio and a link to their Influencer or Associate Storefront where you can see more content from that influencer or associate.
Are Influencers or Associates expected to write only positive reviews?
We don't expect that Influencers or Associates will write only positive things. We expect that they'll help customers to discover/research products, through critiquing them as well. If an Influencer or an Associate has a negative comment about a product, it will have no impact on how Amazon shows or promotes that product. Influencers and Associates need to comply with our
community guidelines
Are Influencers and Associates paid for providing recommendations?
Content creators participating in the Amazon Influencer and Associate Programmes earn affiliate commissions from Amazon for qualifying purchases.
How can I join the program?
To see if you qualify go to
amazon.in/influencers

About this item
Effective Tan Removal: Harness the power of nature to combat sun damage. Our face wash gently exfoliates and Reduce tan, restoring your skin's natural tone and texture. Enjoy a refreshed look and feel as your skin breathes free from environmental stressors.
Brightening & Glowing Skin: Infused with saffron and glutathione, renowned for their skin-brightening properties, this face wash works to enhance your complexion's luminosity. Saffron's natural antioxidants help lighten dark spots and blemishes, while glutathione boosts skin radiance, leaving you with a visibly brighter glow.
Unisex and Versatile: Designed for everyone, this face wash suits the needs of both men and women. Whether you're looking to refresh after a long day or start your morning routine with confidence, our face wash delivers consistent results.
High-Quality, Safe Ingredients: Our commitment to quality means using only the best ingredients, free from toxic chemicals, parabens, and sulfates. Enjoy peace of mind knowing that each use supports your skin's health without compromising safety.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Product Summary: Ghar Soaps Magic De-Tan Face wash With Saffron & Glutathione 100ml | Tan Removal, Brightening and Glowing Skin I For All Skin Type I For Men & Women (Pack of 1)
From GHAR SOAPS
4.4 out of 5 stars, 269 ratings
Customer reviews
10K+ bought in past week
Price
One-time purchase: ₹299.00
( ₹299.00 / ml)          10% Savings
List Price:
₹333.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
Effective Tan Removal: Harness the power of nature to combat sun damage. Our face wash gently exfoliates and Reduce tan, restoring your skin's natural tone and texture. Enjoy a refreshed look and feel as your skin breathes free from environmental stressors.
Brightening & Glowing Skin: Infused with saffron and glutathione, renowned for their skin-brightening properties, this face wash works to enhance your complexion's luminosity. Saffron's natural antioxidants help lighten dark spots and blemishes, while glutathione boosts skin radiance, leaving you with a visibly brighter glow.
Unisex and Versatile: Designed for everyone, this face wash suits the needs of both men and women. Whether you're looking to refresh after a long day or start your morning routine with confidence, our face wash delivers consistent results.
High-Quality, Safe Ingredients: Our commitment to quality means using only the best ingredients, free from toxic chemicals, parabens, and sulfates. Enjoy peace of mind knowing that each use supports your skin's health without compromising safety.
Product description
Ghar Soaps Magic De-Tan Face Wash is enriched with Saffron and Glutathione to effectively remove tan, cleanse impurities, and restore your skin’s natural glow. Its gentle yet powerful formula helps brighten the complexion, reduce dullness, and improve uneven skin tone while keeping the skin fresh and hydrated. Suitable for all skin types and designed for both men and women, this face wash is perfect for daily use, leaving your skin visibly clearer, smoother, and radiant after every wash.

About this item
✅ Face Wash for Men - fights acne & pimple, brighten & clear skin, oil control, suitable for all skin types
✅ Specfically Developed for Men - multi action formula with masculine fragrance & refreshing feel
✅ How To Use: apply on wet face with gentle movements, avoiding the eye contour, and then rinse with lukewarm water. use twice a day for best results
✅ Enriched with safe ingredients such as licorice extract, menthol, Bisabolol Extract etc.

Important information
Safety Information:
For external use only.
Ingredients:
menthol, licorice extract, salicylic acid
Directions:
1.Wash your Hands and Face Well, 2.Dispense the Face-Wash on Your Palm, 3.Spread and Rub It well On Your Face, 4.Rinse and dry Your Face (Use 2 times a Day for Best Results)
Product Description
Muuchstac Ocean Face Wash for Men, Fights Acne & Pimple, Skin Whitening & Brightening, All Skin Types, No SLS, Silicone and Paraben, Pack of 2, 200 ml
It’s not feasible to visit a spa every day. Understanding your unconditional love for skin retreat, the new Muuchstac Men’s Ocean Face Wash gives you a spa treatment, wherever you need it, whenever you need it. Indulge in a skin purifying ritual with this effective face wash
ABOUT OUR PRODUCT
For All Skin Types
All Adult Age Groups - No Paraben No Sulfate No Mineral Oil No Silicone 100% Natural and Herbal Fragrance Extract
Removes Dead Skin Cells
Face wash for men enhanced with the regenerative properties of ocean, helps to remove dead skin cells which tend to accumulate over time causing your face to look very dull.
How To Use
Squeeze a small amount of Muuchstac Men’s Ocean Face Wash, apply on a damp face, and work up. Wash it off thoroughly with water.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find this face wash effective, particularly for oily and acne-prone skin, and appreciate its value for money. The product gives a fresh feel and brightens the face, with a light ocean-inspired fragrance that customers like. Regarding skin compatibility, while it suits oily skin types well, some customers report it made their skin worse. Moreover, the product receives mixed feedback about skin irritation, with some customers experiencing burning sensations while others find it comfortable.

Product Summary: Muuchstac Ocean Face Wash for Men (2 x 100ml) – Anti-Acne/Pimple, Oil Control & Skin Brightening Cleanser – with Niacinamide, Menthol & Licorice Extracts – For All Skin Types
From Muuchstac
4.0 out of 5 stars, 20,466 ratings
Customer reviews
5K+ bought in past week
Price
One-time purchase: ₹220.00
( ₹110.00 / ml)          63% Savings
List Price:
₹598.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
✅ Face Wash for Men - fights acne & pimple, brighten & clear skin, oil control, suitable for all skin types
✅ Specfically Developed for Men - multi action formula with masculine fragrance & refreshing feel
✅ How To Use: apply on wet face with gentle movements, avoiding the eye contour, and then rinse with lukewarm water. use twice a day for best results
✅ Enriched with safe ingredients such as licorice extract, menthol, Bisabolol Extract etc.
Product description
Introducing our specially formulated face wash for men: the ultimate solution for acne and pimples. Enriched with powerful ingredients, it not only fights acne but also brightens the skin, offering clear skin and oil control. Experience a refreshing feel with each use, tailored specifically for men's skincare needs. Say hello to clearer, brighter skin with our specially developed formula.
Options Available
Scent Name
Ocean
Size
100 ml (Pack of 1)
200 ml (Pack of 1)
300 ml (Pack of 1)
Browse all available options
Important Information
Safety Information:
For external use only.
Ingredients:
menthol, licorice extract, salicylic acid
Directions:
1.Wash your Hands and Face Well, 2.Dispense the Face-Wash on Your Palm, 3.Spread and Rub It well On Your Face, 4.Rinse and dry Your Face (Use 2 times a Day for Best Results)

Buy Mobile Phones Online at the Best Prices in India — Shop Smartphones on Amazon.in
Buy mobile phones online in India at the best prices on Amazon.in. Shop the widest range of smartphones from Samsung, Apple, OnePlus, Xiaomi, Redmi, realme, iQOO, OPPO, vivo, Motorola, Tecno and Lava with up to 40% off, No Cost EMI, exchange offers. Whether you want the latest 5G smartphone under ₹10,000, a flagship like the Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra or iPhone 17, or a budget-friendly Redmi or realme under ₹15,000, Amazon.in has the mobile phone that fits your needs, your budget, and your lifestyle. From fast-charging 5G phones to AI-powered flagships, Amazon.in offers mobile phones at lowest prices with genuine brand warranty, fast delivery across India. Compare specs, read verified customer reviews, and choose from thousands of models all with the confidence of shopping on India's most trusted online store.
Shop Mobile Phones by Price Range
We stock mobile phones across every price point from entry-level 4G feature smartphones starting under ₹5,000 to premium 5G flagships above ₹1,00,000. Pick your budget and find the best mobile phone in India.
Best Mobile Phones Under ₹5,000
Affordable 4G/5G smartphones perfect for students, first-time buyers, and secondary phones. Reliable performance, long battery life, and essential features.
Popular picks: JioBharat J1 4G.
Best Mobile Phones ₹5,000 – ₹10,000
The sweet spot for budget 5G mobile phones in India great cameras, large displays, and 5,000 mAh batteries from trusted brands.
Popular picks: Samsung M07, POP X, Lava Bold N2, Lava Bold T1, Zeno 100.
Best Mobile Phones ₹10,000 – ₹20,000
Mid-range 5G smartphones with AMOLED displays, 50MP+ triple cameras, 8GB RAM, and AI features the most popular tier in India.
Popular picks: Samsung Galaxy M17 5G, Samsung Galaxy M17e 5G, REDMI A7 Pro 5G, iQOO Z11x 5G, realme narzo 100 Lite 5G.
Best Mobile Phones ₹20,000 – ₹30,000
Premium mid-range phones with flagship-grade chipsets, 120Hz displays, fast charging, and stabilized camera systems.
Popular picks: OnePlus Nord CE6, iQOO Z11x 5G, Samsung Galaxy M56 5G, iQOO Z10R 5G, iQOO Z10 5G.
Best Mobile Phones Above ₹30,000
Flagship smartphones and premium devices with the latest Snapdragon/Apple chips, AI photography, titanium builds, and multi-year software support.
Popular picks: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra 5G Smartphone, OnePlus Nord CE6, iPhone 16, OnePlus Nord 6, Apple iPhone 15.
Shop Mobile Phones by Brand
Amazon.in is the official online store for every major mobile phone brand in India.
Explore the complete range from flagship makers to budget innovators all with manufacturer warranty, authenticated sellers, and the best online prices.
Samsung Mobile Phones
Samsung mobile phones lead the Indian market with the Galaxy S25 Ultra flagship, Galaxy A and M series for mid-range, and Galaxy F series for value-seekers. Shop the latest Samsung Galaxy 5G smartphones with Galaxy AI, 200MP cameras, and Super AMOLED displays.
Apple Mobile Phones
Buy the latest iPhone 16, iPhone 17, and iPhone 15 on Amazon.in — with Apple Intelligence, ProMotion displays, A-series chips, and the most advanced iPhone cameras. No Cost EMI and exchange offers available on all iPhone models.
OnePlus Mobile Phones
OnePlus brings flagship performance to every price tier. The OnePlus Nord CE6, Nord 5, and Nord 6 deliver fast charging and AMOLED quality in mid-range, while the OnePlus flagship 5G line competes head-to-head with the biggest names.
Xiaomi/Redmi Mobile Phones
Xiaomi and Redmi dominate value smartphones in India. From the Redmi A4 5G and Redmi 15C 5G under ₹10,000 to Xiaomi flagships — expect large batteries, big displays, and specs that punch above their price.
iQOO Mobile Phones
iQOO is the performance-first gaming smartphone brand — the iQOO Z10 Lite 5G, Z11x 5G, and iQOO 15R are built for speed, with flagship Snapdragon chips, 120Hz displays, and fast charging at aggressive prices.
realme Mobile Phones
realme makes stylish, specs-loaded 5G smartphones for young India. The realme narzo 100 Lite 5G, narzo 90 5G, and NARZO 80 Pro 5G are top sellers for students and first smartphone buyers.
OPPO Mobile Phones
OPPO focuses on camera-first smartphones with premium design. The OPPO Reno15 5G, Reno15c 5G, and F33 5G deliver portrait-grade cameras, ultra-slim designs, and AMOLED displays.
vivo Mobile Phones
vivo mobile phones combine design and camera innovation. The vivo V70 5G, V70 Elite 5G, and X300 Pro 5G bring ZEISS optics, curved displays, and long battery life.
Motorola Mobile Phones
Motorola offers clean stock-Android mobile phones with excellent build quality ideal for buyers who want a bloat-free software experience.
Tecno Mobile Phones
Tecno builds budget-friendly smartphones with big displays and large batteries — the Tecno POP X, POP X 5G, and Pova 7 Pro 5G are great entry-level options.
Lava Mobile Phones
Lava is India's proudly home-grown smartphone brand — the Lava Bold 2 5G and Bold N1 5G offer 5G connectivity at accessible prices, Made in India.
Shop Mobile Phones by Feature
5G Mobile Phones
Future-proof your next purchase with 5G smartphones from every price band. 5G phones on Amazon.in come with Snapdragon, MediaTek Dimensity, Exynos, and A-series chipsets — supporting all major Indian 5G bands.
Best Camera Phones
From 200MP Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra shooters to Apple iPhone 17 ProMotion video and OPPO/vivo portrait specialists — shop the best camera phones in India by megapixel, sensor size, or brand.
Gaming Smartphones
iQOO, OnePlus, and ROG Phone models with flagship Snapdragon chips, 144Hz refresh rates, and pressure-sensitive triggers — engineered for BGMI, Call of Duty Mobile, and Genshin Impact.
Long Battery Life Phones
Mobile phones with 5,000 mAh, 6,000 mAh, and even 7,000 mAh batteries — from brands like Samsung M, realme narzo, and Tecno Pova.
Fast Charging Phones
Shop smartphones with 65W, 80W, 100W, and 120W fast charging — a full-day charge in 15-30 minutes.
Budget 4G Feature Phones
Classic keypad mobile phones and entry-level 4G smartphones for callers, seniors, and as reliable secondary phones. Mobile Phone Offers, EMI, and Exchange on Amazon.in
• Up to 40% off on select mobile phones during Amazon Great Indian Festival, Great Republic Day Sale, and May ART. • No Cost EMI for up to 24 months on smartphones above ₹3,000 with eligible credit/debit cards. • Exchange offer get up to ₹25,000 off by exchanging your old mobile phone. • 10% Instant Discount with SBI Credit Cards (up to ₹2,000 per transaction). • 5% cashback with Amazon Pay ICICI Credit Card on every purchase. • Free delivery across India with Amazon Prime including next-day delivery in metros. • Genuine brand warranty all phones are 100% original, sold by authorized sellers.
How to Choose the Best Mobile Phone in India (2026 Buyer's Guide)
Set your budget first. Every ₹5,000 slab on Amazon.in gives you meaningfully better cameras, displays, or chipsets. Pick the price band where you want the best-in-class.
Decide on 5G or 4G. Most phones above ₹10,000 in 2026 are 5G. Even entry-level Redmi A4 5G and realme narzo 100 Lite 5G now support 5G under ₹10,000.
Pick your priority: camera, gaming, or battery. Camera-first? Choose Apple iPhone, Samsung Galaxy S/A series, or vivo V series. Gaming? iQOO Z/Neo or OnePlus. Battery? Samsung M or Tecno Pova.
Check the display. AMOLED displays with 90Hz/120Hz refresh rates are now available even in the ₹15,000 range — prioritise these over LCDs.
RAM and storage. For a 2-3 year future-proof phone, choose minimum 8GB RAM and 128GB storage. Flagships ship with 12GB / 256GB as standard.
Software updates. Samsung (7 years), Apple (6+ years), and OnePlus (4 years) lead on software support — a key long-term value driver.
Read Amazon verified reviews. Thousands of real-user reviews per popular model help you decide — filter by rating, verified purchase, and recent dates.
Why Buy Mobile Phones on Amazon.in
Best Prices in India — Price-matched daily against Flipkart and other leading online stores — with additional bank and card offers stacking on top.
Widest Selection of Smartphones — Every major brand — Samsung, Apple, OnePlus, Xiaomi, Redmi, realme, iQOO, OPPO, vivo, Motorola, Tecno, Lava, Google Pixel, Nothing — all in one place.
Trusted Sellers & Genuine Products — Only authorized sellers list mobile phones on Amazon.in — every phone is 100% original with full brand warranty.
Fast, Reliable Delivery — Same-day and next-day delivery available in most Indian cities with Amazon Prime.
24/7 Customer Support — Multi-language customer support via chat, email, and phone.
Frequently Asked Questions — Mobile Phones on Amazon.in
Q: Which is the best mobile phone to buy in India in 2026?
A: The best mobile phone depends on your budget. Under ₹10,000, the Redmi A4 5G and realme narzo 100 Lite 5G lead the value segment. In the ₹15,000–₹25,000 range, Samsung Galaxy M17 5G, iQOO Z10 Lite 5G, and OnePlus Nord CE6 are top sellers. Above ₹50,000, the Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra, iPhone 17, and OnePlus flagship dominate.
Q: Is Amazon.in cheaper than Flipkart for mobile phones?
A: Amazon.in matches and often beats Flipkart on mobile phone pricing — especially with SBI Card instant discounts, Amazon Pay ICICI cashback, and No Cost EMI stacking. During sale events like May ART, Great Indian Festival, and Great Republic Day Sale, Amazon.in offers up to 60% off.
Q: Are mobile phones on Amazon.in genuine?
A: Yes — Amazon.in only allows authorized sellers to list mobile phones, and every device comes with full manufacturer warranty. Customers get 7-day replacement and 100% purchase protection.
Q: Can I get No Cost EMI on mobile phones?
A: Yes. No Cost EMI is available on most mobile phones above ₹3,000 with eligible credit cards, debit cards, and through Amazon Pay Later — for tenures up to 24 months.
Q: How does Amazon mobile exchange work?
A: Enter your phone model at checkout, get an instant exchange value (up to ₹25,000), and the discount is applied to your new purchase. A technician picks up your old phone during delivery.
Q: What 5G mobile phones are available under ₹10,000?
A: Budget 5G options include the Redmi A4 5G, realme narzo 100 Lite 5G, Tecno POP X 5G, iQOO Z11x 5G (entry variants), and Samsung Galaxy M07.
Q: Which is the best camera phone in India?
A: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra (200MP), iPhone 17 Pro, OPPO Reno15, and vivo X300 Pro 5G consistently rank as the best camera phones — with the S25 Ultra and iPhone 17 competing for the overall top spot.

About this item
5 Pcs Necklace Combo: Package contains 5 Heart Butterfly Pearl couple Necklaces. Each necklace has its own style. Simple and beautiful. These stylish necklaces will show your nobility.
Gifts: These latest stylish western chain necklaces are popular with girls and women, you can give the necklace as a gift for your wife, girlfriend, mother on special occasions, they will also love these chain pendant necklaces.
Occasion: You can choose different necklaces of different styles as accessories according to your different outfits. These Necklaces are perfect for birthdays, holidays, beach parties, festivals and more.
Quality : Made from premium quality alloy material that makes it skin friendly and rust resistant. Its high quality construction lets it to retain its quality and shine for years to come.
Shining diva is a well known brand across fashion jewellery sector shining diva products are preferred by many designers, stars and celebrities shining diva fashion jewelry believes in making beauty and fashion a part of everybody's life

Product description
Gifts For Girls, Girlfriend. Shining Diva presents this premium quality 5 pcs Chain Pendant Necklace Jewellery Combo. Stylish Fancy Party Wear Pendent Necklace for Women and Girls. This combo necklace set for women can be used as daily wear or party wear. Shining Diva products are stylish and funky. This gold plated necklace for girls fashion party wear jewellery combo of 5 chain pendant neck piece are studded with crystals stones. Shining Diva has huge collection of latest charm bracelets and modern statement necklace and traditional necklace jewellery set accessories which includes fancy bangles for women traditional, wedding bangals, cuff, traditional kada, choker necklace for girls and jhumka jhumki studs tops traditional earrings. Shining Diva is pioneer of Imitation jewellery and designer crystal pendant necklace, pearl and american diamond hangings Ear Rings. Shining Diva Fashion and Traditional jewelry give true value for your money. Buy Shining Diva trendy, artificial jewellery from Amazon in offer. These are also ideal for rakhi, birthday gifts for girls, girlfriend, wedding gifts and anniversary gifts.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the necklace pretty and appreciate its appearance. However, the color durability is concerning, with multiple customers reporting that it turns black within hours of wearing. Moreover, the quality and value for money receive mixed reviews, with some finding it good while others consider it poor quality and not worth the price. Additionally, durability is a significant concern, with several customers reporting that the necklace broke within seconds of use.

About this Item
5 Pcs Necklace Combo: Package contains 5 Heart Butterfly Pearl couple Necklaces. Each necklace has its own style. Simple and beautiful. These stylish necklaces will show your nobility.
Gifts: These latest stylish western chain necklaces are popular with girls and women, you can give the necklace as a gift for your wife, girlfriend, mother on special occasions, they will also love these chain pendant necklaces.
Occasion: You can choose different necklaces of different styles as accessories according to your different outfits. These Necklaces are perfect for birthdays, holidays, beach parties, festivals and more.
Quality : Made from premium quality alloy material that makes it skin friendly and rust resistant. Its high quality construction lets it to retain its quality and shine for years to come.
Shining diva is a well known brand across fashion jewellery sector shining diva products are preferred by many designers, stars and celebrities shining diva fashion jewelry believes in making beauty and fashion a part of everybody's life

Discover Top
Sports & Fitness
Essentials at Amazon.in
Discover a diverse world of sports and fitness essentials at Amazon.in. Whether you're a fitness or sports enthusiast or an outdoor adventurer, we've got you covered. Explore a wide array of gear, from cardio equipment to football gear, cycling equipment, hand grippers, cricket bats, badminton rackets, dumbbell sets, yoga mats, and football shoes. We offer top-quality products to enhance your sports & fitness journey.
Upgrade Your
Home Gym
with Quality Fitness Equipment
Our fitness equipment section includes treadmills, fitness bikes, air bikes, resistance bands, dumbbells, home gym sets, gym gloves, pull-up bars, punching bags, and gym bags suitable for both men and women. Stay active and upgrade your training regimen with our quality equipment.
Cycling
Enthusiasts
For cycling enthusiasts, our selection includes adult and kids' cycles, gear cycles, and accessories like cycle lights, helmets & much more. We're your one-stop shop for all your cycling needs.
Elevate Your
Cricket
Game
At Amazon.in, we cater to cricket enthusiasts with a range of high-quality cricket essentials. From top-notch cricket bats to premium cricket balls and leather balls, we have everything you need to perfect your game.
Elevate Your
Badminton
Game
Discover a world of badminton excellence at Amazon.in. From top-quality Yonex and Li-ning badminton rackets to shuttlecocks and accessories, we have everything you need to ace your game. Shop now to take your badminton skills to new heights.
Dominate the Field with
Football
Gear
For football enthusiasts, our collection of football essentials is designed to elevate your game. Whether you're in search of footballs, football shoes, gear, or accessories, we've got you covered.
Your One-Stop Shop for
Swimming
,
Skating
,
Basketball
& More
At Amazon.in, we celebrate the spirit of sports with a diverse range of equipment for skating, swimming, basketball, and other ball sports. Dive into our selection of skates, skateboards, and related accessories. Whether you're a competitive swimmer or simply looking for some fun in the pool, we offer swimming gear including costumes, goggles, and caps. Take to the court and dominate with our top-quality basketballs.
Outdoor
Selection
For outdoor adventurers, we have a range of camping gear that includes camping tents, sleeping bags, and camping furniture. Embrace the great outdoors in style and comfort.
Stay Hydrated and Protected
During your intense workouts, stay hydrated with our shaker bottles. Don't forget to protect yourself from the rain with our
raincoats
, available for men, women, and kids.
Explore the wide world of sports and fitness products at Amazon.in. We are committed to helping you reach your fitness goals and embark on outdoor adventures with the best equipment. Your journey to an active and healthy lifestyle starts here.

About this item
Fashion Frill Exclusive Trendy 3D Bar Silver Chain Pendant For Boys Mens Jewellery Collection
Made from Premium Quality Material. Its High Quality Plating Lets It to Retain Its Quality and Shine for Years to Come.Suitable for Daily Wear or as a Present to You and Your Lover. Classic Design; Stylish and Delicate for Everyday Wear.
VALUE NECKLACE SET-- There Are 2Pcs Pendant Necklace In One Order, Silver Tone Bar Pendant with Shiny Steel Natura Color & Black Tone Bar with Finest Black Color Plating Cable Chain, Classic Colors Matching Design, Cool Necklace Jewelry for Mens And Women; Quality Lobster-claw Clasp That Easy To Wear.
A Well Researched Chain Pendant, Which Looks Stylish, Elegant, Fashionable, All at Same Time.Use Lase Cutting and Polishing Technique, Smooth Chain Surface. Eye-Catching and Easy Matching,
Keep Jewellery Away from Direct Heat, Water, Perfumes, Deodorants and Other Strong Chemicals as They May React with the Metal or Plating.The Plating Composition of Jewellery Is as Such That Perspiration (Sweat) Will Not Damage It.

Product Description
Eye-Catching and Easy to Pair
The minimalist yet striking design of the pendant makes it versatile and easy to pair with a wide variety of outfits, ideal for both casual and formal occasions.
Perfect for Daily Wear
Lightweight & comfortable, this necklace is designed for everyday use. Its durable plating ensures it remains in pristine condition even with regular wear.
Quality Lobster-Claw Clasp
Equipped with a quality lobster-claw clasp, this necklace is easy to put on and take off while ensuring a secure and reliable fit.

Product description
The extensive collection consists of alluring pieces of jewellery like earrings, rings, pendant sets, necklaces, anklets, mangalsutra, bracelets and chains. Good enough to be worn on various occasions like party, wedding, engagement, to work, office or during festive season. these jewellery pieces have been created with sparkling finish and the best craftsmanship.Fashion Frill is renowned by its classic and playful designs. Choose the divine jewelry to express your love with us. A perfect gift for your soul mate. The perfect touch of sparkle. We make jewellery with contemporary and traditional as well as stylish and trendy designs. The exhaustive assortment consists of alluring pieces of jewellery like earrings, necklaces, bangles, bracelets, mangalsutra, pendants and so on. We make accessories to accompany all types of attires suitable for different occasions.

Previous page
Welcome to Fashion Frill, where elegance meets affordability. Born out of a passion for style and a commitment to quality, Fashion Frill is more than just a jewelry brand; it's a celebration of individuality and expression.
Fashion Frill was established with a vision to redefine the fashion jewelry landscape. We recognized a gap in the market for high-quality, trendy, and affordable jewelry that speaks to the modern, style-savvy individual.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Fashion Frill Exclusive Trendy 3D Bar Silver Chain Pendant For Boys Mens Jewellery Collection

VALUE NECKLACE SET-- There Are 2Pcs Pendant Necklace In One Order, Silver Tone Bar Pendant with Shiny Steel Natura Color & Black Tone Bar with Finest Black Color Plating Cable Chain, Classic Colors Matching Design, Cool Necklace Jewelry for Mens And Women; Quality Lobster-claw Clasp That Easy To Wear.

Product description
"Welcome to the ultimate destination for chain for men and chains for boys stylish—your one-stop shop for all things stylish, traditional, spiritual, and fashion-forward in men’s and boys’ necklaces and chains. Our carefully curated collection brings together an extensive range of premium accessories to suit every man and boy, whether you’re looking for a classic gold chain for men, a rugged stainless steel chain for man, or a distinctive black chain for men. Let’s embark on a journey through the world of men’s and boys’ chains and discover what makes each piece unique and perfect for you. Classic Elegance Meets Modern Style The enduring appeal of a silver chain for men can never be underestimated. We offer options for every age and occasion: from the youthful silver chain for boys, cool boys silver chain looks, and versatile silver chain for kids boys, to bold silver chain for man pieces and the intricate artistry of mens silver chain creations. Whether you are a traditionalist seeking a gold chain for boys or a bold dresser trying the avant-garde black chain for man, we have options in every shade and finish—including platinum chain for men, white gold chain for men, rose gold plated, and even diamond chain for men. For those who admire quality and strength, our lineup includes the ever-popular stainless steel chain for men, a modern statement for resistance and daily style. Explore tough steel chain for men neck designs and cool, contemporary options like the black metal chain for men, all crafted to withstand the test of time and trend. Looking for a classic yet affordable alternative? Opt for our copper chain for men, brass chain for men, and various artificial gold chain for men or imitation gold chain for men selections. Spiritual and Devotional Chains Honor tradition and spirituality with our rich assortment of rudraksha chain for men and rudraksha mala for men neck. For the spiritually inclined, we offer sanctified rudraksha silver chain for men, silver rudraksha mala for men, rudraksha mala silver chain, and classic rudraksha gold chain for men and gold rudraksha mala variants—a symbol of purity and devotion. Pair them with a complementary chain for rudraksha for men or explore devotional styles like the tasbih, moti mala for men, pearl chain for men, and mala for groom. We also showcase designer religious pendants and lockets, including trident pendant for men, trident locket for men, anchor pendant for men, the powerful star of david pendant, and even evil eye chain for men and evil eye pendant for men—perfect for those seeking protection and blessings in their life journey. Choose the mystique of a rudraksha locket for men to accompany your daily style or show off your faith. For the Style-Conscious Modern Man Our collection spans the entire spectrum—delicate, minimal chains to heavy, bold statements. Adorn yourself with a sleek chain for men, plain chain for men, slim chain for men, or stand out with a thick chain for men, dramatic heavy silver chain for men, or truly imposing big chain for men and heavy gold chain for men. For those who like to layer, our layered necklace for men and layered chain for men sets provide an instantly fashionable look. Find signature showstoppers like the cuban link chain for men, cuban chain gold, and intricate box chain for men—distinctive designs for all personalities. If you prefer a subtle touch of glamour, browse our array of gold chain for man stylish, silver chain for men stylish, stylish chain for men, and chain for man stylish creations. These are perfect for both everyday use and special occasions and can be paired seamlessly with locket for men stylish chain or stylish locket for men for a custom look. Men's Pendant and Locket Styles Express your individuality and beliefs with our wide range of pendant for men options, from statement bullet pendant for men, bold anchor locket for men, and masculine sun pendant for men and star pendant for men, to unique signature collections like berserk pendant, berserk locket, and even the futuristic iron man arc reactor and arc reactor iron man designs. Classic elegance shines through our silver pendant for men, gold pendant for men, and crystal pendant for men. Opt for the meaningful with locket for man, locket for men stylish, and mens lockets stylish for neck; or choose from robust mens pendant chain and chain with locket for men combos. For modern touches, don’t miss our black pendant for men, leather pendant for men, and unique adornments such as the evil eye locket for men and star locket for men. Identities are also expressed through choices like gale ka locket boy, bullet chain, trident necklace for men, and more. Versatility for Every Occasion We believe every man and boy deserves a chain for all occasions—be it for weddings with a groom necklace, festivals, parties, as a groom jewellery set for wedding, or just for adding a hint of sophistication to your daily uniform. Boys gold chain, boys necklace chain, and boys locket chain stylish allow the young trendsetters to shine at school, family events, or outings. Add a touch of tradition with mala boys style new and boys jewellery accessories. From standout urban looks with the jeans chain for men, wallet chain for men, or neck bracelet for men, to exquisite formalwear accessories like the men's necklace, mens chain with pendant, and mens chain silver—our collection offers endless possibilities for customization and expression. Premium Materials and Finishes Indulge in material luxury: from authentic platinum chain for men to new-age stainless steel chains for men, explore options with anti-tarnish finishes, rugged oxidised chain for men, and stylish silver plated chain for men. Statement pieces such as the diamond necklace for men, dimond chain for man, and gold plated chains for men deliver unmatched brilliance. Artistic souls will love our beads necklace for men, pearl necklace men, and men pearl necklace for their boho-chic appeal. Boys' and Kids’ Chains Boys can start their fashion journey early with boys chains for neck, boys neck chain stylish, boys chen, boys chain locket, and boy necklace varieties. Choose special pieces for younger ones like the kids chain for boys, chain for kids boys 9-12, and decorative gold chain for baby boy. Teenage style is easily achieved with sleek stylish chain for boys, chains for boys silver, and colorful boy gold chain. Fashion Accessories, Combos & Trends Change up your look with fashion frill chain men, trending chain for men, and the ever-popular rapper chain. Bundle up with chain combo for men and match your necklace with other accessories like the hand chain for man for a cohesive modern edge. Our neck wear for men, neck accessories for men, and men neck accessories ensure every outfit is complete. For the bold and expressive, check out the bling queen collection and MC Stan inspired mc stan chain—bold, impactful and sure to make a statement. Sporty and adventurous types have plenty to choose from, with rugged gym chain for men, gym locket for men, and gym pendant for men. Chains for Every Style, Tradition, and Expression Our chains suit every persona—minimalists, trendsetters, tradition-lovers, and everyone in between. About this item
Premium Quality & Durability: Built with high-grade materials, these shoes are designed to withstand the rough-and-tough daily activities, running, and sports sessions of active school kids.
All-Day Comfort: Features a well-cushioned insole that provides excellent foot support, reducing fatigue so your child can stay comfortable from the morning assembly to the last class.
Anti-Skid Smart Sole: Equipped with a flexible, high-traction sole that offers a superior grip on school corridors, playgrounds, and polished floors to prevent accidental slips and falls.
Breathable & Odour-Free: The breathable upper material ensures proper air circulation, keeping your child's feet cool, dry, and fresh throughout the day while preventing sweat buildup.
Easy to Clean & Maintain: Specifically designed for hassle-free maintenance; these pure white school shoes can be easily wiped clean with a damp cloth to restore their bright, brand-new look.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find these school shoes to be good-looking and consider them excellent value for money. However, the quality receives mixed feedback, with some finding them very good while others report poor stitching. Moreover, durability is a concern as they tear within a month of use, and comfort is mixed with some finding them comfortable while others say they're very uncomfortable. Additionally, the fit and size receive mixed reviews, with some saying they're perfect while others report they don't fit properly, and customers note the shoes are a bit heavy.

Top reviews from India
Srinu D
5 out of 5 stars
The Ultimate "Rough & Tough" School Shoe – Built to Last
Reviewed in India on 28 February 2026
Size: 12 Kids UK
Colour: Black
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
I bought these Liberty Force 10 Gola shoes for daily school use, and they are the definition of durability. If your child is very active on the playground, these are a better choice than standard canvas shoes.
Durability & Build: The synthetic upper is incredibly tough. It doesn't scuff easily, and unlike leather, it doesn't crack even after months of running and jumping. The sole is well-bonded to the upper, so there’s no risk of the front "opening up" after a few football games.
Low Maintenance: This is a huge plus for busy parents. Because they are PVC/Synthetic, they don't require daily polishing. A quick wipe with a damp cloth (or a bit of shoe cream) makes them look brand new in seconds. They are also quite water-resistant for light rain.
Fit & Comfort: The Velcro straps (SCHV model) are high-quality. They stay strong even after hundreds of uses, making it easy for kids to put them on independently. The inner lining is padded enough to prevent shoe-bites.
Grip: The "Gola" sole has a deep tread pattern. It provides excellent traction on tiled school floors and dusty playgrounds, preventing slips.
Final Verdict: These are "workhorse" shoes. They might be slightly heavier than thin canvas shoes, but they last twice as long. Excellent value for money for a full academic year.

I am very disappointed with this purchase. The shoes looked good initially, but the quality is extremely poor. Within just 10 days of normal use, the material started tearing, which is completely unacceptable for a product at this price.
I expected durability and comfort, but this product failed on both. It feels like a waste of money, and I would not recommend it to anyone looking for long-lasting footwear.

Product Summary: Liberty Force 10 School Shoes for Kids Boys & Girls - Black & White | Comfortable School Shoes | Lightweight & Durable | Easy Slip-On & Velcro Closure
From Liberty
3.8 out of 5 stars, 5,992 ratings
Customer reviews
200+ bought in past week
Price
One-time purchase: ₹392.00
51% Savings
List Price:
₹799.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
Premium Quality & Durability: Built with high-grade materials, these shoes are designed to withstand the rough-and-tough daily activities, running, and sports sessions of active school kids.
All-Day Comfort: Features a well-cushioned insole that provides excellent foot support, reducing fatigue so your child can stay comfortable from the morning assembly to the last class.
Anti-Skid Smart Sole: Equipped with a flexible, high-traction sole that offers a superior grip on school corridors, playgrounds, and polished floors to prevent accidental slips and falls.
Breathable & Odour-Free: The breathable upper material ensures proper air circulation, keeping your child's feet cool, dry, and fresh throughout the day while preventing sweat buildup.
Easy to Clean & Maintain: Specifically designed for hassle-free maintenance; these pure white school shoes can be easily wiped clean with a damp cloth to restore their bright, brand-new look.
Product description
Liberty is a brand known for its high quality products. Presenting wide range of formal, casual, party wear footwear for men and women. Designed with high quality material and durable outsole, these footwear are comfortable and fall in line with your demand for the latest fashion trend. Must have pieces for your footwear collection.

About this item
Thickness: This 4mm durable mat is designed to provide the best cushioning and make your exercise sessions comfortable
Product Warranty: The mat comes with a 6 months warranty
Durable: This mat is made from durable foam that's both lightweight and strong. Its remarkable resilience allows you to keep your balance while working out.
Portable: The mats can be easily carried and are lightweight. It is compact enough to tightly roll up and toss in the cover bag.
Multifunctional: Use the mat for anything from yoga, and Pilates to stretching, meditation, and other strengthening exercises. The non-slip textured surface provides the best grip without sacrificing comfort.
Sweat resistant: The yoga mat is sweat resistant and is easily washable after you are finished exercising. This anti-slip mat is resistant to water as well. This helps you perform workouts with proper hygiene and ensures comfort.

From the manufacturer
LIFELONG YOGA MAT
Yoga originated in India and holds its history of including exercises that can help in harmonizing your body, mind and soul, and Lifelong strives to provide you with the kind of yoga mats that will help you to carry your exercise routines without any kind of stress.
FEATURES
Optimum Thickness
This 4mm durable mat is designed to provide the optimal level of cushioning and protection to your joints and knees while still allowing you to grip the floor for proper balance.
Textured Surface
This Black yoga and exercise mat features a textured surface for an enhanced experience. This type of a mat texture is important for stability and to safely maintain poses.
Water and Sweat Resistant
This mat is water resistant and sweat resistant, and is easy to clean with soap and water.
Comfortable Grip
Perfect for home or studio use, the high-quality mat not only defines your personal workout space, but it also creates a beneficial layer of cushioning between you and the floor.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the yoga mat comfortable, lightweight, and worth the price. The thickness receives mixed feedback, with some finding it great while others say it's too slim. Customers disagree on the grip, with some reporting good grip while others find it very slippery. The softness and durability also get mixed reviews, with some finding it sufficiently soft while others say it's very hard, and some reporting it's durable while others say it's not much durable.

Very comfortable and lightweight yoga mat. The cushioning is soft enough for yoga, stretching, and basic workouts. It provides good grip on the floor and does not slip easily during exercise. Easy to roll, carry, and store because of its foldable and portable design. The material quality feels durable for daily use and cleaning is also simple. Suitable for both beginners and regular users. Overall, a great value for money product with good comfort, stability, and portability.

About this Item
Thickness: This 4mm durable mat is designed to provide the best cushioning and make your exercise sessions comfortable
Product Warranty: The mat comes with a 6 months warranty
Durable: This mat is made from durable foam that's both lightweight and strong. Its remarkable resilience allows you to keep your balance while working out.
Portable: The mats can be easily carried and are lightweight. It is compact enough to tightly roll up and toss in the cover bag.
Multifunctional: Use the mat for anything from yoga, and Pilates to stretching, meditation, and other strengthening exercises. The non-slip textured surface provides the best grip without sacrificing comfort.
Sweat resistant: The yoga mat is sweat resistant and is easily washable after you are finished exercising. This anti-slip mat is resistant to water as well. This helps you perform workouts with proper hygiene and ensures comfort.

. 
From baby skincare products and bath essentials to strollers and toys, you can avail great discounts and offers on these baby products. Buy baby care essentials at the best prices online, at Amazon India.
Browse through an Elaborate Selection of Baby Products and Essentials
Shop for different types of diapers and wipes at Amazon.in that are available in various sizes for babies of different ages. Ensure your new born baby and little one's hygiene with good quality products, making them safe for everyday use. You can also browse through other baby products and essentials such as baby lotions, baby shampoos, baby massage oils, baby powders, soaps and body wash, feeding bottles, baby blankets, bedding and much more, at great prices on Amazon India.
Shop for Baby Products from Popular Brands
Buy baby products across different categories from top brands available here at Amazon.in. Some of the popular brands include Huggies, Pampers, MamyPoko, MamaEarth, Himalaya, LuvLap, Supples, Sebamed and more. You can avail exciting combo offers from different brands and stock up on diapers and wipes, baby lotions, oils, shampoos and washes, or even get great discounts on furniture, car seats, strollers, carry cots, decor for the nursery and much more. Amazon India gives you an elaborate range of baby products.

# URL: https://www.amazon.in/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=201083470&ref_=footer_swc
## Title: 100% Purchase Protection - Amazon Customer Service
### Depth Level: 1
---

100% Purchase Protection - Amazon Customer Service
Help and Customer Service
Find more solutions
Site Features
›
100% Purchase Protection
Disclaimer:
In the event of any discrepancy or conflict, the English version will prevail over the translation.
We are committed to ensure 100% Purchase Protection for customers by offering genuine products, secure payments and easy returns for items shopped on Amazon.in.
Genuine Products
Secure Payments and Safe Ordering
Easy Returns
Genuine Products
Sellers are committed to sell only genuine products to customers on Amazon.in. All sellers listing their products on Amazon.in are required to enter an agreement to list and sell only genuine products.
Secure Payments and Safe Ordering
Amazon.in understands that you care about how information about you is used and shared. We appreciate your trust in us to do that carefully and sensibly.
Your privacy is important to us, and we work to keep your information secure
.
How Secure Is Information I share with Amazon.in?
Our secure-server software encrypts all your personal information including credit or debit card number, name and address. The encryption process takes the characters you enter and converts them into bits of code that are then securely transmitted over the Internet.
We work to protect the security of your information during transmission by using Secure Sockets Layer (SSL) software, which encrypts your information, in addition to maintaining the security of your information as per the International Standard IS/ISO/IEC 27001 on "Information Technology-Security Techniques- Information Security Management System-Requirements".
We reveal only the last four digits of your credit card numbers when confirming an order. Of course, we transmit the entire credit card number to the appropriate credit card company during order processing.
We maintain physical, electronic and procedural safeguards in connection with the collection, storage and disclosure of personally identifiable customer information. As per our security procedures, we may occasionally request proof of identity before we disclose personal information to you.
Click here to learn more about
Security, Privacy & Accessibility
.
It is important for you to prevent unauthorised access to your password and computer. Be sure to
sign out when you finish using a shared computer
. Learn more about our
Privacy Policy
.
Easy Returns
Returns are easy with our online returns centre. While most items can be returned for a refund or replacement within a 10-day return window, return policies may be different across product categories. Please check the
Amazon.in Returns Policies
for details on the returns policies of specific product categories.
Visit
the Returns Support Centre
to initiate returns. Learn more about
returning items fulfilled by Amazon
and
returning seller fulfilled items.
Seller fulfilled items need to be returned directly to the seller and not to Amazon. The seller will specify the return address and mailing instructions.
To know the seller’s details –
Open the product detail page.
Scroll down and find “sold by”.
To return a seller fulfilled item –
Go to
Your Order
.
Select the item you want to return.
Click on Return or replace item.
Select issue and click on continue.
Enter the required details and proceed.
To know more about returning seller-fulfilled items, click
here
Was this information helpful?
Yes
No
Thank you for your feedback.
Please select what best describes the information:
This information is confusing or wrong
This is not the information I was looking for
I do not like this policy
Submit
Thank you! While we are unable to respond directly to your feedback, 
	we will use this information to improve our online Help.

# URL: https://www.amazon.in/b/?node=2838698031&ld=AZINSOAYAFlyout&ref_=nav_AccountFlyout_sell
## Title: Amazon.in: Selling on Amazon - Start Selling Now
### Depth Level: 1
---

Amazon.in: Selling on Amazon - Start Selling Now
ZERO referral fee on over
12.5 crore products
Register with a valid GSTIN and an active bank account to become an Amazon.in seller.
Start   Selling
Fee Drop Highlights
Know more
Big savings with the new fee reductions
Check revised fees across all categories
Sellers can now get further benefits on multi-unit purchases, enjoying up to 90%+ savings in fees on additional units sold. By creating promotions like "Buy 2, Get 10% Off", sellers can maximize their savings under the new fee structure.
Create promotions here
Sellers on Amazon Bazaar will continue to enjoy zero referral fees on numerous products across a wide spectrum of categories, and can now benefit from reduction of up to ₹18 in weight handling fees!
Other benefits
₹18
Less weight handling fees for shipments up to 1 kg.
₹15
Less weight handling fees for heavier items.
₹20
Saved on refunds of products priced under ₹250.
Know more
How to sell on Amazon.in?
STEP 1: Register your account
Register on Amazon with GST/PAN details and an active bank account
STEP 2: Choose storage & shipping
Choose storage, packaging, and delivery options
STEP 3: List your products
List your products by providing product and brand details
STEP 4: Complete orders & get paid
Deliver orders to customers on time and get paid within 7 days of delivery
Why become a seller on Amazon.in?
Crores of customers
Reach
crores of customers
on Amazon.in, India's most visited shopping destination.
26,800 crorepati sellers
95,500 lakhpati sellers in 2023 alone. You could be next.
Unbeatable Reach
Deliver to
100% of India's serviceable pincodes
, through Easy Ship & Fulfillment by Amazon.
Start Selling
Here's what Amazon.in sellers are saying:
CRACK OF DAWN CRAFTS
From five members to fifteen, a little trust can go a long way.
Sunehra Koshi
Founder, Crack of Dawn Crafts
GOODNESS PET FOOD
We went from sales of 10,000 rupees to 5 lakh in just two and a half years.
Dheepakh Rajaram
Founder, Goodness Pet Food
Start selling today
Put your products in front of crores of customers across India
Start Selling

About this item
Conditioner with hyaluronic acid ideal for dry and dull hair, Gives long lasting hydration to dehydrated hair without the weigh down
Provides free-flowing, shiny hair, Offers 72 hours of intense hydration, Hair appears bouncy and more manageable
Squirt a small amount of conditioner into the palm of your hand, Apply the product to the ends of your hair only, Distribute the product evenly, Allow the conditioner to absorb, Rinse thoroughly
Formulated with Hyaluronic acid that can retain 1000 times its weight in water, Formula inspired from skincare, Suitable for all hair types
Contents: 1x L'Oréal Paris Hyaluron Moisture 72H Moisture Sealing Conditioner, With Hyaluronic Acid, For Dry & Dehydrated Hair, Volume: 180ml

Important information
Safety Information:
For external use only.
Ingredients:
Aqua/Water● Sodium Laureth Sulphate● Glycol Distearate● Sodium Chloride● Cocamidopropyl Betaine● Dimethicone● Ci 60730 / Ext. Violet2● Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride● Cocamide Mea● Coco-betaine● Sodium Benzoate● Sodium Hydroxide● Sodium Hyaluronate● Phenoxyethanol● Stealth-6● Acetic Acid● Peg-100 Stearate● Trideceth-10● Trideceth-3● Salicylic Acid● Fumaric Acid● Amodimethicone● Carbomer● Citric Acid● Hexylene Glycol● Perfume / Fragrance
Directions:
Apply the product along the lengths of wet hair, distribute the product evenly,Leave on for 1 minute then rinse thoroughly. Use the enitre L'Oreal Paris Hyaluron Moisture range for best results.
Product description
Tired of dry, dull, and lifeless hair? It’s time to hydrate your hair with intense moisture, Try the all-new L’Oréal Paris Hyaluron Moisture Conditioner that provides long-lasting hydration and re-plumps hair with ease. This 72H Moisture sealing conditioner instantly locks-in moisture giving you shiny hair that’s full of life. Key Ingredient - Hyaluronic acid for hair, which retains 1000 times its weight in water and is an essential ingredient to maintain the natural moisture barrier of your scalp and strands. This potent hydrating active weightlessly coats hair to keep it feeling hydrated for up to 72 hours, and helps hair look visibly plumped, bouncy and shiny. Now make the science of skincare a part of your hair care routine with Hyaluronic Acid. Instructions for usage: Use the L’Oréal conditioner for women post shampoo, leave on for 2 mins and rinse. Instantly achieve detangled, re-hydrated and plump hair.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find this conditioner to be the best for frizzy hair, making it soft and smooth while keeping it moisturized for up to two days. The product receives positive feedback for its pleasant fragrance and natural shine that lasts up to four days. While some customers say it lasts for months, others report extreme hair fall after use.

Virendra Singh
4 out of 5 stars
Game changer for dry and frizzy hair! Highly hydrating ⭐⭐⭐⭐
Reviewed in India on 15 May 2026
Size: 340 ml (Pack of 1)
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
I have been using the L'Oreal Hyaluron Moisture range for my dry, frizzy hair, and the results are amazing.
Pros: It provides intense hydration right from the first wash. It thoroughly cleanses the scalp without stripping its natural oils or leaving the lengths feeling brittle. It significantly controls frizz, making hair incredibly smooth, soft, and bouncy. The pleasant fragrance easily lasts for 2 to 3 days.
Cons: If you have an exceptionally oily scalp, you might need to use a tiny bit more product to get a deep cleanse, or use it alongside a clarifying shampoo once a week.
Overall, it delivers exactly what it promises. For the best results, definitely use the shampoo paired with its conditioner. Total value for money!

Product Summary: L'Oreal Paris Fresh Hyaluron Moisture 72HR Moisture Sealing Conditioner Powered By Hyaluronic Acid, For Frizz-Free, Hydrated And Bouncy Hair Full Of Life For All Hair Types | 175 Millilitres
From L'Oreal Paris
4.4 out of 5 stars, 22,751 ratings
Customer reviews
7K+ bought in past week
Price
One-time purchase: ₹207.00
( ₹118.29 / ml)          13% Savings
List Price:
₹239.00
Subscribe and Save price (No fees, Cancel at any time): ₹196.65
( ₹112.37 / ml)          18% Savings
List Price:
₹239.00
Additional savings available through Subscribe and Save (No fees, Cancel at any time)
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
Conditioner with hyaluronic acid ideal for dry and dull hair, Gives long lasting hydration to dehydrated hair without the weigh down
Provides free-flowing, shiny hair, Offers 72 hours of intense hydration, Hair appears bouncy and more manageable
Squirt a small amount of conditioner into the palm of your hand, Apply the product to the ends of your hair only, Distribute the product evenly, Allow the conditioner to absorb, Rinse thoroughly
Formulated with Hyaluronic acid that can retain 1000 times its weight in water, Formula inspired from skincare, Suitable for all hair types
Contents: 1x L'Oréal Paris Hyaluron Moisture 72H Moisture Sealing Conditioner, With Hyaluronic Acid, For Dry & Dehydrated Hair, Volume: 180ml
Product description
Tired of dry, dull, and lifeless hair? It’s time to hydrate your hair with intense moisture, Try the all-new L’Oréal Paris Hyaluron Moisture Conditioner that provides long-lasting hydration and re-plumps hair with ease. This 72H Moisture sealing conditioner instantly locks-in moisture giving you shiny hair that’s full of life. Key Ingredient - Hyaluronic acid for hair, which retains 1000 times its weight in water and is an essential ingredient to maintain the natural moisture barrier of your scalp and strands. This potent hydrating active weightlessly coats hair to keep it feeling hydrated for up to 72 hours, and helps hair look visibly plumped, bouncy and shiny. Now make the science of skincare a part of your hair care routine with Hyaluronic Acid. Instructions for usage: Use the L’Oréal conditioner for women post shampoo, leave on for 2 mins and rinse. Instantly achieve detangled, re-hydrated and plump hair.
Options Available
Size
175 ml (Pack of 1)
340 ml (Pack of 1)
Browse all available options
Important Information
Safety Information:
For external use only.
Ingredients:
Aqua/Water● Sodium Laureth Sulphate● Glycol Distearate● Sodium Chloride● Cocamidopropyl Betaine● Dimethicone● Ci 60730 / Ext. Violet2● Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride● Cocamide Mea● Coco-betaine● Sodium Benzoate● Sodium Hydroxide● Sodium Hyaluronate● Phenoxyethanol● Stealth-6● Acetic Acid● Peg-100 Stearate● Trideceth-10● Trideceth-3● Salicylic Acid● Fumaric Acid● Amodimethicone● Carbomer● Citric Acid● Hexylene Glycol● Perfume / Fragrance
Directions:
Apply the product along the lengths of wet hair, distribute the product evenly,Leave on for 1 minute then rinse thoroughly. Use the enitre L'Oreal Paris Hyaluron Moisture range for best results.

About this item
- MULTIPURPOSE: Ezee Garbage Bags which are fit to use at home, kitchen, offices, restraurants, use for baby diapers, pet litter
* WASTE DISPOSAL: Perfect for wet and dry waste, food waste and fits the trash cans conveniently without tearing.
* QUALITY: Sealed bottom of the bags prevents any leakage and makes them sturdy and durable to maintain hygiene
* DETAILS: Black colour garbage bags. Pack of 3 Rolls, 30 Bags Per Roll (Total 90 Bags) - 19 x 21 inches

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Amazon Customer
5 out of 5 stars
It's decent. Does what it says.
Regularly ordering this and using in our office and home. Does the job perfectly. Leak proof, good capacity and load durability. The black color, medium size is well suited for a small family (4-5 members), for daily easy disposal.

Thus
5 out of 5 stars
Title: Affordable and Practical Garbage Bags for Everyday Use
Reviewed in India on 15 May 2025
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
I recently purchased the Ezee Black Garbage Bags for Dustbin, which come in a pack of 90 medium-sized bags (19 x 21 inches), divided into three rolls of 30 bags each. These bags have proven to be a practical and cost-effective solution for my daily waste disposal needs.
The bags are made from a durable plastic material that holds up well under normal household waste loads. I have used them for kitchen scraps, paper waste, and general trash without experiencing any significant tearing or leakage. The medium size fits comfortably into standard dustbins, making them versatile for various rooms in the house.
One of the standout features is the drawstring closure, which allows for easy tying and secure sealing of the bags. This is particularly useful when transporting waste to outdoor bins, as it helps contain odors and prevents spills. The black color is also a plus, as it discreetly hides the contents and maintains a neat appearance.
However, it's worth noting that some users have reported that the bags can be a bit thin and may not be suitable for very sharp or heavy items. While I haven't encountered this issue with typical household waste, it's something to consider if you plan to dispose of bulkier or more abrasive materials.
In terms of value for money, these bags are quite affordable. With 90 bags in total, they offer a long-lasting supply, reducing the frequency of repurchasing. The packaging is also convenient, with each roll individually wrapped, making it easy to store and access the bags as needed.
Overall, the Ezee Black Garbage Bags for Dustbin offer a reliable and budget-friendly option for everyday waste management. They are suitable for general household use and provide the convenience of easy handling and disposal. If you're looking for an economical solution for your waste disposal needs, these bags are worth considering.

Harry
3 out of 5 stars
Decent but Could Be Better
Reviewed in India on 23 December 2025
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
The Ezee Live Life Ezee Way garbage bags are okay for regular household use, but they’re not exceptional. I bought them mainly because of the quantity (90 pieces) and the size seemed suitable for my dustbin.
What’s good:
Good value for the number of bags you get
Size fits most medium dustbins
Easy to separate and use
What could be better:
The plastic feels a bit thin
Not ideal for heavy or wet waste
Can tear if the bag is overfilled
Overall, they work fine for light, dry trash, but you need to be careful not to overload them. I’d say they’re average — usable, but there’s room for improvement.

About this Item
- MULTIPURPOSE: Ezee Garbage Bags which are fit to use at home, kitchen, offices, restraurants, use for baby diapers, pet litter
* WASTE DISPOSAL: Perfect for wet and dry waste, food waste and fits the trash cans conveniently without tearing.
* QUALITY: Sealed bottom of the bags prevents any leakage and makes them sturdy and durable to maintain hygiene
* DETAILS: Black colour garbage bags. Pack of 3 Rolls, 30 Bags Per Roll (Total 90 Bags) - 19 x 21 inches
Product description
These disposable black garbage bags that is widely used for garbage packaging purposes. Our offered degradable bags is developed by our expert craftsman using supreme class with the help of advance technology. These garbage bags are virgin in nature. Features: lightweight and flexible. Made of virgin benefits: can be used in office, household, parties, restaurant, hotels etc places. Size: these disposable garbage bag sizes are 19 x 21 inches medium. Pack: this pack contains pack of 3 (30 pieces each) of disposable black garbage bags.
