About this item
UTILITY HOOKS: It is widely used in bathroom, outdoor ,kitchen, decorations including ceiling hooks, coat hooks, key hooks, plant hook, bath towel hook, picture hooks. Ideal for Christmas Lights and Christmas wreath also.
EASY TO USE AND REUSABLE: Just clean and dry the surface, then put the hook on smooth surface. Easy to clean and re-position without surface damage. It can be reused again and again if dried with a hair dryer - much better than the suction cup hooks.
SUITABLE FOR VARIOUS SURFACES: Widely used on a variety of surfaces, like Bricks, Glass, Metal, Wood door, Plank, Metal, Stainless steal, especially great for hanging shower or bath accessories in a bathroom or kitchen utensils and tools on a tile backsplash.
PERFECT DESIGN: Stylish transparent design makes it almost invisible which is quite suitable for nice home decoration. be made of solid stainless steel and PC construction, ensuring quality and longevity. Small and light design, multifunctional.
SELF ADHESIVE HOOKS: 1 set 24 Damage-free hooks, Up to 13.2 lbs per utility hook on wall & ceiling, No nail needed. Super waterproof and oilproof, high and low temperature resistance.

About Jialto

a Trusted Household Name Serving Over

JIALTO 20 Pcs Self Adhesive Hooks for Secure Wall Hanging - Versatile 6mm Nail Hook for Photo Frames Hooks, Clocks, and More - Transparent, Heavy-Duty, No-Drill Solution
Product Description
Strong Adhesive Hooks for Every Space
Strong, durable, and multipurpose, JIALTO adhesive hooks are perfect for everyday convenience. From organizing essentials to maximizing small spaces, they help you create a clutter-free and efficient environment.
Multi-Purpose Wall Hooks – Easy Install, No Damage
Easy to install on smooth surfaces like tiles, glass, metal, marble, and wood — simply peel, stick, and use. Ideal for hanging towels, keys, kitchen utensils, decorations, bags, and more while keeping your space neat and organized.
Strong Self-Adhesive Wall Hooks for Kitchen
Perfect for homes, homes, families, offices, and dorm rooms, JIALTO adhesive hooks combine efficient, durable, and modern style in one smart storage solution. , Upgrade your game with stylish and simple hooks.
Premium Adhesive Hooks for Every Room
Installation is quick and effortless. Simply peel off the protective film, stick the hook onto a clean surface, and press firmly for a secure hold. No tools, no wall damage, and no complicated setup required.
Premium Hold Without Drilling
Upgrade your organization setup with JIALTO Nail Hooks and enjoy a cleaner, smarter, and more organized living space every day. Perfect for modern homes that value both style and practicality.
Smart Hooks for Modern Spaces
Transparent Adhesive Hooks
Choose JIALTO for a smart, convenient, and stylish storage solution that helps keep your home organized without leaving marks or residue behind.
Waterproof  Adhesive Hook
space-saving design for modern homes
Clear Hooks, Strong Grip
Choose JIALTO for a strong hold, easy installation, and a smarter way to organize every space.
Traceless Adhesive Technology
Perfect for bathrooms, kitchens, bedrooms, offices, and dorm rooms, these transparent hooks blend seamlessly with any decor
Strong adhesion for kitchen & bathroom use
Installation is quick and easy. Simply clean the surface, remove the protective film, press the hook firmly onto the desired area, and let it set for optimal adhesion. Reusable and durable construction ensures long-term performance,

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the wall hooks to be of good quality and worth the money, serving their purpose well. The adhesive quality and durability receive mixed feedback - while some praise the strong glue and strong hold, others report poor adhesion and durability issues. The size is criticized for being too big, and the weight capacity is mixed, with some saying it's good for light items while others note it's not suitable for heavy use.

About this Item
UTILITY HOOKS: It is widely used in bathroom, outdoor ,kitchen, decorations including ceiling hooks, coat hooks, key hooks, plant hook, bath towel hook, picture hooks. Ideal for Christmas Lights and Christmas wreath also.
EASY TO USE AND REUSABLE: Just clean and dry the surface, then put the hook on smooth surface. Easy to clean and re-position without surface damage. It can be reused again and again if dried with a hair dryer - much better than the suction cup hooks.
SUITABLE FOR VARIOUS SURFACES: Widely used on a variety of surfaces, like Bricks, Glass, Metal, Wood door, Plank, Metal, Stainless steal, especially great for hanging shower or bath accessories in a bathroom or kitchen utensils and tools on a tile backsplash.
PERFECT DESIGN: Stylish transparent design makes it almost invisible which is quite suitable for nice home decoration. be made of solid stainless steel and PC construction, ensuring quality and longevity. Small and light design, multifunctional.
SELF ADHESIVE HOOKS: 1 set 24 Damage-free hooks, Up to 13.2 lbs per utility hook on wall & ceiling, No nail needed. Super waterproof and oilproof, high and low temperature resistance.
Product description
UTILITY HOOKS: It is widely used in bathroom, outdoor ,kitchen, decorations including ceiling hooks, coat hooks, key hooks, plant hook, bath towel hook, picture hooks. Ideal for Christmas Lights and Christmas wreath also.

About this item
De-tanning properties: With Saffron, this soap helps in reducing tan, and maintains a brighter skin.
Skin Brightness: This soap makes the skin brighter from within and keeps the natural glow sealed.
Tradition Infusion: Ghar Soaps is a pioneer in ethical skincare that promises to deliver community and purity in every product. Our products are 100% free from Parabens, Sulfates, and any harmful chemicals.
Handcrafted: Experience a bathing routine with Ghar Soaps bath and body products, where each bar is carefully crafted by our craftsmen. Extend your delight with our bath and body products that are nothing short of extraordinary.
Premium ingredients: Ghar Soaps carefully choose their ingredients. This body soaps includes properties like saffron, sandalwood and goat milk that brighten and deeply nourish the skin.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the soap to be of good quality with a mild fragrance and appreciate its moisturizing properties, noting it doesn't make skin too dry and leaves it feeling fresh. The soap receives positive feedback for its skin-brightening effects, making it look brighter after regular use, and customers like its soft texture and natural feel. The effectiveness and value for money receive mixed reviews - while some find it very effective and worth the price, others report no visible results and consider it overpriced. Similarly, opinions on tan removal are divided, with some finding it effective while others say it doesn't work at all.

About this Item
De-tanning properties: With Saffron, this soap helps in reducing tan, and maintains a brighter skin.
Skin Brightness: This soap makes the skin brighter from within and keeps the natural glow sealed.
Tradition Infusion: Ghar Soaps is a pioneer in ethical skincare that promises to deliver community and purity in every product. Our products are 100% free from Parabens, Sulfates, and any harmful chemicals.
Handcrafted: Experience a bathing routine with Ghar Soaps bath and body products, where each bar is carefully crafted by our craftsmen. Extend your delight with our bath and body products that are nothing short of extraordinary.
Premium ingredients: Ghar Soaps carefully choose their ingredients. This body soaps includes properties like saffron, sandalwood and goat milk that brighten and deeply nourish the skin.
Product description
PROVEN TO WHITEN THE SKIN HOW DOES THIS SOAP MAKES YOUR SKIN WHITER ? Saffron present in the soap makes the skin whiter. Saffron helps in deeply exfoliating the pores giving you a cleansed, fresh and flawless skin. Scars, sun spots, dark patches and blemishes fades quickly. HOW LONG IT TAKES TO GET THE RESULTS ? WE HIGHLY RECOMMEND TO BUY 3+ SOAPS TO GET BEST RESULTS. It takes atleast 25 - 30 days to get results. We highly recommend to use the soap daily.

Important information
Safety Information:
Step 1 Wet face with warm water. Step 2 Squeeze a small amount into hands and work into a lather. Step 3 Massage gently in a circular motion onto wet skin. Step 4 Rinse with warm water and pat dry. Avoid delicate eye area.
Indications:
Step 1 Wet face with warm water. Step 2 Squeeze a small amount into hands and work into a lather. Step 3 Massage gently in a circular motion onto wet skin. Step 4 Rinse with warm water and pat dry. Avoid delicate eye area.
Ingredients:
glycolic acid, hyaluronic acid, vitamin c
Directions:
Store in a cool and dry place
Product description
Good skin starts with a healthy skin barrier. Skin barrier is your natural shield against external damage. Your skin barrier fights impurities, blocks irritants and retains moisture. We, at Simple, believe in making clean and kind products to maintain a healthy skin barrier.
Harsh soap-based cleansers can strip away your skin’s natural oils and disrupt your skin barrier. A soap-free, gentle cleanser helps support a healthy skin barrier.
The Simple Kind to Skin Refreshing Face Wash is the simple goodness your skin needs as it has Vitamin E- softens and smooths skin; Pro-Vitamin B5- for healthy-looking strong skin; Pro Amino Acids – supports a healthy skin barrier. This gentle cleanser is 100% soap free and has a skin friendly pH 5.5-6 for smooth, fresh and healthy-looking skin. Simple Refreshing Facial Wash thoroughly washes away make-up, dirt and other impurities leaving your skin feeling clean, fresh and revived. Our refreshing facial wash is known to remove that extra oil, but it won’t dry out your skin in fact it boosts hydration levels and cleanses gently.
At Simple, we’re all about making products which are kind to skin and have skin-loving ingredients. All our products are free from colour, perfume and a strict list of 2000+ harsh chemicals (we call them baddies).
With more than 50 years of heritage in caring for the most sensitive skin, Simple, UK's No.1 facial skincare brand, is all about making products which are kind to skin, animals, and planet. We make sure that we respect your skin, always, and that’s why all our products are tested even on the most sensitive skin. Dermatologically tested and approved. Ophthalmologically tested. Hypoallergenic, non-comedogenic.
Simple is everything your skin needs, nothing it doesn't!
From the manufacturer

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find this face wash effective, particularly noting its suitability for oily and acne-prone skin, while being gentle and moisturizing without causing dryness. They appreciate its compatibility with all skin types, its fragrance-free formula, and consider it an affordable cleanser. Regarding skin tone, opinions are mixed - while some say it preserves natural glow well, others report their skin looking dark after use.

About this Item
100% Soap-free, gentle cleanser
Thoroughly washes away make-up, dirt and other impurities leaving your skin feeling clean, fresh and revived
Known to remove that extra oil without drying out your skin.
Enriched with Vitamin E, Pro-Vitamin B5 and Pro Amino Acids
For smooth & fresh skin
Free from more than 2000 harsh chemicals that can upset your skin
Product description
Good skin starts with a healthy skin barrier. Skin barrier is your natural shield against external damage. Your skin barrier fights impurities, blocks irritants and retains moisture. We, at Simple, believe in making clean and kind products to maintain a healthy skin barrier. 
Harsh soap-based cleansers can strip away your skin’s natural oils and disrupt your skin barrier. A soap-free, gentle cleanser helps support a healthy skin barrier. 
The Simple Kind to Skin Refreshing Face Wash is the simple goodness your skin needs as it has Vitamin E- softens and smooths skin; Pro-Vitamin B5- for healthy-looking strong skin; Pro Amino Acids – supports a healthy skin barrier. This gentle cleanser is 100% soap free and has a skin friendly pH 5.5-6 for smooth, fresh and healthy-looking skin. Simple Refreshing Facial Wash thoroughly washes away make-up, dirt and other impurities leaving your skin feeling clean, fresh and revived. Our refreshing facial wash is known to remove that extra oil, but it won’t dry out your skin in fact it boosts hydration levels and cleanses gently.
At Simple, we’re all about making products which are kind to skin and have skin-loving ingredients. All our products are free from colour, perfume and a strict list of 2000+ harsh chemicals (we call them baddies).
With more than 50 years of heritage in caring for the most sensitive skin, Simple, UK's No.1 facial skincare brand, is all about making products which are kind to skin, animals, and planet. We make sure that we respect your skin, always, and that’s why all our products are tested even on the most sensitive skin. Dermatologically tested and approved. Ophthalmologically tested. Hypoallergenic, non-comedogenic.
Simple is everything your skin needs, nothing it doesn't!

Important Information
Safety Information:
Step 1 Wet face with warm water. Step 2 Squeeze a small amount into hands and work into a lather. Step 3 Massage gently in a circular motion onto wet skin. Step 4 Rinse with warm water and pat dry. Avoid delicate eye area.
Indications:
Step 1 Wet face with warm water. Step 2 Squeeze a small amount into hands and work into a lather. Step 3 Massage gently in a circular motion onto wet skin. Step 4 Rinse with warm water and pat dry. Avoid delicate eye area.
Ingredients:
glycolic acid, hyaluronic acid, vitamin c
Directions:
Store in a cool and dry place

About this item
ADJUSTABLE RESISTANCE : Hand gripper 60 kg is easy to adjust the resistance from 10-60Kgs as needs. The hand Gripper is suitable for everyone, like Athletes, sports, fitness coaches, fitness, musicians and people who want to exercise their hand, wrist and fingers. Also its easy and fast to do so. The resistance of hand grips for strength training is perfect for both men and women with different strength as it can be adjusted easily.
COMFORTABLE HANDLE : Arm exercise equipment men is comfortable to hold and made from non-slip material. Boldfit gym hand grip holds your hands to keep from slipping during the workout exercise, and protects your hands from pain. You can feel the hand grip sticks on you hands. The size of the gripper is optimized for the general handle length of hand grips, so it’s available to wrap and use onto all types of hand grips. Hence it will give you extra grip and comfort while exercise.
FOREARM & FINGER EXERCISE EQUIPMENT : Boldfit hand grip strengthener is useful in forearm/wrist workout as well as in finger exercise. To gain a good grip strength, you should do hand grip workout with a low resistance on a regular basis. Perfect for improving power and flexibility of forearm, wrists, fingers, hand ,and muscle building. Excellent for recovery of hand injury.
DURABLE : Quality material used in boldfit handgrip exerciser e.g. spring made from high quality staleness steel, quality non- slip material used on handles. The grip strengthener, made of the latest upgraded material, has a longer handle than others, which is more convenient for you to hold; in addition, the handle material is strong and durable, which perfectly avoids the problem of the handle breaking during exercise! Overall its "made for bold" for last long.
GYM AND HOME USE : Boldfit hand grip for gym is suitable in gym and home use as well as for men and women, it is easy to use and easy to handle is well. Exercise anywhere, anytime you want; you can use in your home, office, car, fitness club, and even in a library. Completely silent operation allows you to strengthen your hand grip and exercise your forearms and wrist without detection. You don't need to carry various kinds of hand grip, only one hand grip strengthener you need.

Boldfit Hand Gripper for Men & Women Hand Grip Strengthener for Forearm, Wrist & Finger Workout Fitness Equipment for Home & Gym Training
From the manufacturer
Train as hard as you can with the maximum comfort and support from the ergonomically designed grips.
Durable Grip
IDEAL LENGTH FOR ALL
Train your forearms, wrists and fingers the right way with maximum comfort with the Boldfit Handgrip. Ergonomically designed for the perfect fit any hand size ensures a stronger grip, engaging muscles that are harder to target. Take it everywhere and get stronger from the gym to the office.
PORTABLE DESIGN
ANTI SLIP GRIP
Adjustable Resistance
Whether you’re a beginner, intermediate or a pro, adjust the resistance to best meet your gain needs with a simple twist of the knob.
At the turn of a knob get the perfect resistance for the perfect gain all thanks to the adjustable resistance on the Boldfit Handgrip. .
Train as hard as you can with the maximum comfort and support from the ergonomically designed grips.
Durable grip handle ergonomically designed to make sure your get the most out of your workouts with the Handgrip. Stainless steel spring that ensures smooth workouts for the best results. The lightweight material is perfect for portability, and stays in the best shape with no rust build-up. Say hello to sweaty sessions.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the hand gripper to be of good quality and value for money, with positive feedback about its effectiveness in improving forearm strength and suitability for daily practice and exercise. The product features an adjustable tensioner that can be set from 5kg to 60kg, and one customer notes it doesn't slip off hands. Durability receives mixed reviews - while some find it very durable, others report it breaking easily. Build quality is also mixed, with some praising the solid feel while others criticize the cheap plastic material.

Product Summary: Boldfit Hand Gripper for Men & Women Hand Grip Strengthener for Forearm, Wrist & Finger Workout Fitness Equipment for Home & Gym Training
From Boldfit
4.1 out of 5 stars, 37,006 ratings
Customer reviews
1K+ bought in past week
Price
One-time purchase: ₹170.00
( ₹17,000.00 / g)          66% Savings
List Price:
₹499.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
ADJUSTABLE RESISTANCE : Hand gripper 60 kg is easy to adjust the resistance from 10-60Kgs as needs. The hand Gripper is suitable for everyone, like Athletes, sports, fitness coaches, fitness, musicians and people who want to exercise their hand, wrist and fingers. Also its easy and fast to do so. The resistance of hand grips for strength training is perfect for both men and women with different strength as it can be adjusted easily.
COMFORTABLE HANDLE : Arm exercise equipment men is comfortable to hold and made from non-slip material. Boldfit gym hand grip holds your hands to keep from slipping during the workout exercise, and protects your hands from pain. You can feel the hand grip sticks on you hands. The size of the gripper is optimized for the general handle length of hand grips, so it’s available to wrap and use onto all types of hand grips. Hence it will give you extra grip and comfort while exercise.
FOREARM & FINGER EXERCISE EQUIPMENT : Boldfit hand grip strengthener is useful in forearm/wrist workout as well as in finger exercise. To gain a good grip strength, you should do hand grip workout with a low resistance on a regular basis. Perfect for improving power and flexibility of forearm, wrists, fingers, hand ,and muscle building. Excellent for recovery of hand injury.
DURABLE : Quality material used in boldfit handgrip exerciser e.g. spring made from high quality staleness steel, quality non- slip material used on handles. The grip strengthener, made of the latest upgraded material, has a longer handle than others, which is more convenient for you to hold; in addition, the handle material is strong and durable, which perfectly avoids the problem of the handle breaking during exercise! Overall its "made for bold" for last long.
GYM AND HOME USE : Boldfit hand grip for gym is suitable in gym and home use as well as for men and women, it is easy to use and easy to handle is well. Exercise anywhere, anytime you want; you can use in your home, office, car, fitness club, and even in a library. Completely silent operation allows you to strengthen your hand grip and exercise your forearms and wrist without detection. You don't need to carry various kinds of hand grip, only one hand grip strengthener you need.
Product description
Boldfit forearm strengthener heavy-duty stainless steel spring can easily adjust the grip between 10-60kg, the comfortable and durable handle increases training goals. The wrist exercise equipment - hand Gripper is suitable for everyone, like Athletes, sports, fitness coaches, fitness, musicians and people who want to exercise their hand, wrist and fingers. People who use the mouse and keyboard for a long time may experience pain and stiffness in their joints. The gripper for gym can promote blood circulation in the hands. The grip device can not only increase strength, but also can be used for rehabilitation training after injury, promote blood circulation, and help restore hand strength. Use anytime, anywhere: Easily fits into your gym bag or handbag, you can use it in home, office, gymnasium or classroom.

## Title: Amazon.in: Selling on Amazon - Start Selling Now
### Depth Level: 1
---

Amazon.in: Selling on Amazon - Start Selling Now
ZERO referral fee on over
12.5 crore products
Register with a valid GSTIN and an active bank account to become an Amazon.in seller.
Start   Selling
Fee Drop Highlights
Know more
Big savings with the new fee reductions
Check revised fees across all categories
Sellers can now get further benefits on multi-unit purchases, enjoying up to 90%+ savings in fees on additional units sold. By creating promotions like "Buy 2, Get 10% Off", sellers can maximize their savings under the new fee structure.
Create promotions here
Sellers on Amazon Bazaar will continue to enjoy zero referral fees on numerous products across a wide spectrum of categories, and can now benefit from reduction of up to ₹18 in weight handling fees!
Other benefits
₹18
Less weight handling fees for shipments up to 1 kg.
₹15
Less weight handling fees for heavier items.
₹20
Saved on refunds of products priced under ₹250.
Know more
How to sell on Amazon.in?
STEP 1: Register your account
Register on Amazon with GST/PAN details and an active bank account
STEP 2: Choose storage & shipping
Choose storage, packaging, and delivery options
STEP 3: List your products
List your products by providing product and brand details
STEP 4: Complete orders & get paid
Deliver orders to customers on time and get paid within 7 days of delivery
Why become a seller on Amazon.in?
Crores of customers
Reach
crores of customers
on Amazon.in, India's most visited shopping destination.
26,800 crorepati sellers
95,500 lakhpati sellers in 2023 alone. You could be next.
Unbeatable Reach
Deliver to
100% of India's serviceable pincodes
, through Easy Ship & Fulfillment by Amazon.
Start Selling

Sunehra Koshi
Founder, Crack of Dawn Crafts
GOODNESS PET FOOD

About this item
{✔} EXTRA SOFT INSOLES: - Extra Soft, Padded, Comfortable, and Cushioned EVA Foot-Bed Enhances Comfort to the Feet. Doctor Extra Soft Flip flops Provides You with Better Walking Comfort and also makes you’re Walking Life easy and effortlessly. It also Increases Comfort, Eases Foot Pain, Increases your Efficiency, Reduces Pressure on Feet, Absorbs Heel Shocks, and Minimize Fatigue.
{✔} ULTRA FLEXIBLE & LIGHTWEIGHT:- This Doctor Extra Soft Flexible Daily Use Flip flops are good for strength conditioning as its Flexibility allows your feet to get a workout by moving more naturally than conventional or thicker-soled shoes. Lightweight flexible slippers put 7% to 15% less stress on the knee than less flexible slippers with higher heels. Flexibility helps performance & posture, promotes efficient movement, prevents incorrect body alignment, maintains
{✔} LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE: - They Are Extremely Light Weight and Durable Slippers and Are Widely Used by Women’s / Ladies for All Ages, Especially Pregnant and Old Aged Women with Foot, Knee and Back Pain, Arthritis, Plantar Fasciitis, Etc, Also People suffering from Diabetes, Plantar fasciitis, Orthopedic Pain, Heel Pain, Arch Pain, Ankle Pain, Knee Pain and Back Pain. Its EVA is Skin-friendly, bio-degradable, 100% recyclable and non-allergic material
{✔} SKIN FRIENDLY BREATHEABLE UPPER- New, Breathable EVA Upper which is easily Washable, Perfect for Seasons like Winter, Summer, and Spring, designed to give you the most Comfortable Fitting. These are quick-drying Washable Flip flops which makes it easy for consumers to wash and sanitize them easily. Its Skin-Friendly Material is Crafted and Made with Care that avoids Blisters, Scars, Sweating of the Feet, and Pain.
{✔} PACKAGING: We Know How Important it is to Store Prized Possessions Well. Hence, Every Pair of Flipflops is impeccably packed in a Beautiful and Classy Storage Box, Made to Last Long, with Elegant Packaging, a Perfect Gifting Option, and Zero Compromise on Quality. Various Colours Are Not Only Colourful & Highly Attractive to Look at But Also Gives You Option to Buy Slippers as Per Your Choice Than Chance.

Product description
Add these wonderful Doctor Extra Soft Flip flops For Women to your Shoe Closet. Brought to you by FAMILY FOOTWEAR, these Flip flops are not only Light Weight and Anti Skid, but also extremely Comfortable to wear. Now, you can now keep your feet comfortable with this pair of Doctor Extra Soft Footwear for Women that have been skillfully crafted to provide optimum support to your ailing Feet. It is Soft Padded and has been ergonomically designed to support and soothe feet suffering from orthopedic problems. Diabetic Foot problems relieve heel arch and Ankle Pains. Soft insole, Flexible sole for better walking comfort Extra Soft and Comfortable bottom for Heel Comfort. General foot Pain & Discomfort Heel Pain, Arch Pain Plantar Fasciitis, Diabetes, Back Pain, and Blood Circulation. It's Extra Soft EVA Footbed Increases Comfort, Eases Foot pain, Increases Efficiency, Eases Pressure on Feet, Absorbs Heel Shock, and Minimizes Fatigue.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find these slippers comfortable, well-cushioned, and good value for money, particularly noting their effectiveness for leg and foot pain. The fit and size receive mixed feedback - while some find them a perfect size, others mention they run smaller than usual and are not suitable for broad feet. The traction also gets mixed reviews, with some praising the grip on smooth flooring while others report they can cause slips and falls.

Sameer
5 out of 5 stars
Best for health....!!
Reviewed in India on 10 July 2024
Size: 7 UK
Colour: Grey
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
As someone who values both comfort and style in footwear, I was intrigued by the DOCTOR EXTRA SOFT Doctor Slippers designed specifically for women. These slippers boast an impressive array of features catering to various needs, from orthopedic support to diabetic-friendly design and even suitability for pregnancy. Here's my take after wearing them for a while:
Comfort and Support:
First and foremost, these slippers live up to their name. The cushioning is exceptionally soft yet supportive, providing a comfortable experience with every step. For someone like me who prioritizes foot health, the orthopedic features make a noticeable difference, especially after a long day on my feet. The sole is designed to absorb impact, which adds to the overall comfort level.
Design and Style:
While comfort is crucial, style is not compromised in these slippers. They have a sleek, casual design that pairs well with various outfits, whether lounging at home or running quick errands. The flat design and lightweight construction make them easy to wear for extended periods without any strain.
Special Features:
One of the standout features is the non-slip sole, which provides excellent traction on different surfaces. This feature is particularly reassuring on smooth or wet floors, enhancing safety around the house. Additionally, the slippers are designed with materials that are gentle on sensitive skin, making them suitable for those with diabetic concerns or during pregnancy.
Durability:
After using them for a while, I can attest to their durability. The materials used seem sturdy, and the stitching is well done, indicating that these slippers are built to last. This durability adds value, knowing that they will withstand daily wear without losing their comfort or shape.
Overall Impression:
In conclusion, the DOCTOR EXTRA SOFT Doctor Slippers for Women are a fantastic choice for anyone seeking a blend of comfort, style, and functionality in their footwear. Whether you're managing specific foot conditions or simply looking for reliable house slippers, these deliver on their promises. They have quickly become my go-to footwear at home, and I wouldn't hesitate to recommend them to others looking for quality slippers tailored for women's needs.

About this Item
{✔} EXTRA SOFT INSOLES: - Extra Soft, Padded, Comfortable, and Cushioned EVA Foot-Bed Enhances Comfort to the Feet. Doctor Extra Soft Flip flops Provides You with Better Walking Comfort and also makes you’re Walking Life easy and effortlessly. It also Increases Comfort, Eases Foot Pain, Increases your Efficiency, Reduces Pressure on Feet, Absorbs Heel Shocks, and Minimize Fatigue.
{✔} ULTRA FLEXIBLE & LIGHTWEIGHT:- This Doctor Extra Soft Flexible Daily Use Flip flops are good for strength conditioning as its Flexibility allows your feet to get a workout by moving more naturally than conventional or thicker-soled shoes. Lightweight flexible slippers put 7% to 15% less stress on the knee than less flexible slippers with higher heels. Flexibility helps performance & posture, promotes efficient movement, prevents incorrect body alignment, maintains
{✔} LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE: - They Are Extremely Light Weight and Durable Slippers and Are Widely Used by Women’s / Ladies for All Ages, Especially Pregnant and Old Aged Women with Foot, Knee and Back Pain, Arthritis, Plantar Fasciitis, Etc, Also People suffering from Diabetes, Plantar fasciitis, Orthopedic Pain, Heel Pain, Arch Pain, Ankle Pain, Knee Pain and Back Pain. Its EVA is Skin-friendly, bio-degradable, 100% recyclable and non-allergic material
{✔} SKIN FRIENDLY BREATHEABLE UPPER- New, Breathable EVA Upper which is easily Washable, Perfect for Seasons like Winter, Summer, and Spring, designed to give you the most Comfortable Fitting. These are quick-drying Washable Flip flops which makes it easy for consumers to wash and sanitize them easily. Its Skin-Friendly Material is Crafted and Made with Care that avoids Blisters, Scars, Sweating of the Feet, and Pain.
{✔} PACKAGING: We Know How Important it is to Store Prized Possessions Well. Hence, Every Pair of Flipflops is impeccably packed in a Beautiful and Classy Storage Box, Made to Last Long, with Elegant Packaging, a Perfect Gifting Option, and Zero Compromise on Quality. Various Colours Are Not Only Colourful & Highly Attractive to Look at But Also Gives You Option to Buy Slippers as Per Your Choice Than Chance.
Product description
Add these wonderful Doctor Extra Soft Flip flops For Women to your Shoe Closet. Brought to you by FAMILY FOOTWEAR, these Flip flops are not only Light Weight and Anti Skid, but also extremely Comfortable to wear. Now, you can now keep your feet comfortable with this pair of Doctor Extra Soft Footwear for Women that have been skillfully crafted to provide optimum support to your ailing Feet. It is Soft Padded and has been ergonomically designed to support and soothe feet suffering from orthopedic problems. Diabetic Foot problems relieve heel arch and Ankle Pains. Soft insole, Flexible sole for better walking comfort Extra Soft and Comfortable bottom for Heel Comfort. General foot Pain & Discomfort Heel Pain, Arch Pain Plantar Fasciitis, Diabetes, Back Pain, and Blood Circulation. It's Extra Soft EVA Footbed Increases Comfort, Eases Foot pain, Increases Efficiency, Eases Pressure on Feet, Absorbs Heel Shock, and Minimizes Fatigue.

About this item
Complete Protection: Our Mortein SmartPlus Mosquito Repellent Refill provides 100% protection against dengue, malaria, and chikungunya-causing mosquitoes.
Long-Lasting: Each refill lasts up to 60 days when used for 8 hours per night.
Versatile Compatibility: Our refill fits all machines except customised ones.
Fast-Acting: Our refill starts working in just 5 minutes under test conditions.
Pack of 6: Our value pack includes 6 refills, so you can keep your home protected all season long.
Hassle-Free: No need to worry about constantly changing your refill- our long-lasting solution provides continuous protection.
Mosquito Repellent & Killer: Our refill not only repels mosquitoes but also kills them, ensuring complete protection.
Safe for Use: Our refill is safe for indoor use across the year, making it a great choice for every household.
Easy to Use: Simply insert the refill into your compatible machine for instant protection against mosquitoes.
Say Goodbye to Mosquitoes: With our Mortein SmartPlus Mosquito Repellent Refill, enjoy a mosquito-free home and outdoor space without any hassle.

What is in the box?

Important information
Safety Information:
1. Keep the unit and liquid vaporiser out of the reach of children and animals. 2. Avoid direct skin contact with the liquid. Wash hands and exposed skin if the rod or liquid is touched. 3. Do not contaminate water or water pumps. 4. Do not use or store near heat or open flame. 5. Do not store near food or food preparation areas. 6. Store in original container, tightly closed. 7. Destroy empty containers after use. 8. Do not reuse the empty container. 9. Do not dispose of the liquid or empty container near any water sources.
Ingredients:
Transfluthrin(A.I) - 1.6%, Butylated Hydroxytolnene - 1.0%, Goodknight - 05 1.0% (Mixture Of A Number Of Aroma Chemicals Like Benzyl Acetal, Citronellol, Dimethyl Octadlene Etc), Deodorised Kerosene - 96.4%, Total- 100%.
Directions:
Uncap refill. Insert the liquid vapouriser bottle into the electric heating machine. Plug the device to the power source and switch it on.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Amazon Customer
5 out of 5 stars
Unbeatable Value, Fast-Acting Formula, Fits Standard Machines
Best Value for Mosquito Protection – Works Fast! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ I’ve tried several liquid vaporizers, but I keep coming back to Mortein Smart+. This "Buy 4 Get 2 Free" pack is hands down the best way to stock up for the season. Each bottle genuinely lasts close to the 60 nights advertised (on the standard setting). It doesn't have that overwhelming, choking chemical smell that some cheaper brands have, which makes it much more comfortable to use in the bedroom overnight. Keep the windows closed for the first 15 minutes after switching it on to let the vapor concentrate, then you can crack a window for ventilation—the protection still holds up! If you live in an area with a high mosquito count, don't bother with single packs. Grab this 6-refill value pack. It’s effective, reliable, and saves you a decent amount of money.

Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.

Best Value for Mosquito Protection – Works Fast! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
I’ve tried several liquid vaporizers, but I keep coming back to Mortein Smart+. This "Buy 4 Get 2 Free" pack is hands down the best way to stock up for the season.
Each bottle genuinely lasts close to the 60 nights advertised (on the standard setting). It doesn't have that overwhelming, choking chemical smell that some cheaper brands have, which makes it much more comfortable to use in the bedroom overnight.
Keep the windows closed for the first 15 minutes after switching it on to let the vapor concentrate, then you can crack a window for ventilation—the protection still holds up!
If you live in an area with a high mosquito count, don't bother with single packs. Grab this 6-refill value pack. It’s effective, reliable, and saves you a decent amount of money.

🦟 Performance & Effectiveness
This refill uses a liquid vaporizer system that repels and kills mosquitoes efficiently, including those that spread diseases like dengue, malaria, and chikungunya
Starts working within a few minutes of switching on
Provides visible reduction in mosquito presence overnight
Ideal for bedrooms and living spaces
It performs best in closed or semi-closed rooms, ensuring consistent protection.
⏳ Long-Lasting Usage
One of its biggest advantages is durability:
Each 45ml refill lasts up to 60 nights (based on ~8 hours usage per night)
The pack of 6 offers months of uninterrupted protection
This makes it highly economical for daily use.
⚙️ Compatibility & Ease of Use
Designed to fit almost all standard machines �
mortein.co.in
Simple plug-and-play operation
No mess, no maintenance
This universal compatibility is especially useful if you already have a vaporizer device at home.
📦 Value for Money
The Buy 4 Get 2 Free combo is where this product really shines:
Cost-effective bulk purchase
Reduces frequent re-buying
Ideal for families or long-term use

About this Item
Complete Protection: Our Mortein SmartPlus Mosquito Repellent Refill provides 100% protection against dengue, malaria, and chikungunya-causing mosquitoes.
Long-Lasting: Each refill lasts up to 60 days when used for 8 hours per night.
Versatile Compatibility: Our refill fits all machines except customised ones.
Fast-Acting: Our refill starts working in just 5 minutes under test conditions.
Pack of 6: Our value pack includes 6 refills, so you can keep your home protected all season long.
Hassle-Free: No need to worry about constantly changing your refill- our long-lasting solution provides continuous protection.
Mosquito Repellent & Killer: Our refill not only repels mosquitoes but also kills them, ensuring complete protection.
Safe for Use: Our refill is safe for indoor use across the year, making it a great choice for every household.
Easy to Use: Simply insert the refill into your compatible machine for instant protection against mosquitoes.
Say Goodbye to Mosquitoes: With our Mortein SmartPlus Mosquito Repellent Refill, enjoy a mosquito-free home and outdoor space without any hassle.
Product description
Mortein insta 5 plug-in mosquito repellent comes in a handy liquid vaporizer format that offers complete protection from dengue causing mosquitoes. Formulated with active ingredients, mortein vaporizer is a powerful and convenient solution to offset mosquitoes and serve as the first line of defence against potential diseases and health hazards. Mortein insta 5 mosquito repellent, as the name suggests, is effective in killing mosquitoes immediately, typically within 5 minutes of plug in. The refill bottle fits all devices (except good knight express). Moreover, mortein device has a superior heating system that ensures low electricity consumption and the dual mode machine with high and low intensity modes, make sure you and your family stay protected always. Liquid vapouriser bottle shall last for 45 nights in approved use of 8 hours per night.

Browse all available options
Important Information
Safety Information:
1. Keep the unit and liquid vaporiser out of the reach of children and animals. 2. Avoid direct skin contact with the liquid. Wash hands and exposed skin if the rod or liquid is touched. 3. Do not contaminate water or water pumps. 4. Do not use or store near heat or open flame. 5. Do not store near food or food preparation areas. 6. Store in original container, tightly closed. 7. Destroy empty containers after use. 8. Do not reuse the empty container. 9. Do not dispose of the liquid or empty container near any water sources.
Ingredients:
Transfluthrin(A.I) - 1.6%, Butylated Hydroxytolnene - 1.0%, Goodknight - 05 1.0% (Mixture Of A Number Of Aroma Chemicals Like Benzyl Acetal, Citronellol, Dimethyl Octadlene Etc), Deodorised Kerosene - 96.4%, Total- 100%.
Directions:
Uncap refill. Insert the liquid vapouriser bottle into the electric heating machine. Plug the device to the power source and switch it on.

About this item
This Pull up bar length is adjustable length ( Min 62 cm - Max 100 cm) and this pull up bars comes with anti-slip rubber grip to provide strength to hold rod firm while doing exercise. Hanging bar to provide total security and protection while home workout. Bar is easy to install with tightening rod on both ends. Doorway pullup bar at home don't require much space also so, easy to store.
High Strength Steel Frame: This pull bar for home gym is made with high strength carbon steel to withstand upto 100 kg capacity. Pull ups rod exercise helps in support for doing intense body workout at home and can be easily fixed at any wall height. This pull up bar for home is easily removable and portable.
Doorway Pullup Bar : Our door way pull bar is easy to install, this pull up rod is first placed on the top height, for adjusting the height on the door way, then extending the bars length until the door frame and start rotating pull up bar from center, so the ends of the rod presses firmly on the sides. This bar provides strong hold for doorway pullup bar .
Strength Training Dynamite: Pullup bar for home incorporated in your daily training routine will help you workout with major exercise like pullups, chin ups and also strengthen your muscles with other basic exercise like leg stretch, push-ups, crunches, abs workouts. Pull-up bar for home will also help to improve your posture because reverse grip pull ups or reverse chin ups do a great job at working out on your postures and back.
Easy to Install and Store: Another great benefit of the door pull up bar or gym pull up bar is that they consume minimal space in your house and removable so, we can carry this gym bar rod along with us and as it is easy to pop in and pop out at your convenience. Having a door pull up bar in your door frame at home provides a great reminder to do a few reps or sets anytime you pass it. Comfort is also important when using pull ups bar for home.
*Note: Screws and Rubber Limiter are Provided for Installation

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Sponsored
Customers say
Customers find the pull-up bar to be of good quality, easy to install without screws, and sturdy enough to hold up to 100 kg. Moreover, they consider it a great investment for home workouts, with one customer noting it's a simple way to add effective upper-body training at home. However, customers disagree on the weight capacity, with some reporting it can handle 80 kg while others say it can't even support 25 kg. Additionally, stability receives mixed feedback - while some say it never slips during use, others report it keeps falling off.

Amazon Customer
5 out of 5 stars
Great Pull-Up Bar — Sturdy, Simple & Worth Every Rupee!
This is my first pull-up bar and honestly, I'm really impressed. Installation is super easy — just follow a YouTube tutorial if you get confused, and you're good to go in minutes. The best part? It fits directly on the wall (not just door frames with wood), which worked perfectly for me. The locking mechanism is solid and feels very secure once locked in — no unexpected sliding or loosening even during intense reps. The adjustability is a big plus; you can extend or shorten it to fit different wall/door widths, making it flexible for different setups at home. In terms of versatility, it's not just for pull-ups — you can use it for chin-ups, hanging core exercises, and more. As for kids, I'd say it's suitable for older kids and teenagers under adult supervision, but make sure it's locked properly and mounted at a safe height before letting them use it. During workouts, there's zero slipping, zero wobbling, and the grip is very comfortable. The build quality is solid and feels premium — nothing feels cheap or flimsy about it. The packaging wasn't fancy, but everything inside was completely safe and undamaged, so no complaints there. One honest tip on pricing: I got it for ₹450, and at that price it's a steal. However, if the price has gone up, I'd suggest comparing with other brands first — my brother bought a similar bar from another brand for ₹500–₹550, so shop smart! Overall, a great buy for anyone starting their home workout journey. Highly recommended!

This is my first pull-up bar and honestly, I'm really impressed. Installation is super easy — just follow a YouTube tutorial if you get confused, and you're good to go in minutes. The best part? It fits directly on the wall (not just door frames with wood), which worked perfectly for me.
The locking mechanism is solid and feels very secure once locked in — no unexpected sliding or loosening even during intense reps. The adjustability is a big plus; you can extend or shorten it to fit different wall/door widths, making it flexible for different setups at home.
In terms of versatility, it's not just for pull-ups — you can use it for chin-ups, hanging core exercises, and more. As for kids, I'd say it's suitable for older kids and teenagers under adult supervision, but make sure it's locked properly and mounted at a safe height before letting them use it.
During workouts, there's zero slipping, zero wobbling, and the grip is very comfortable. The build quality is solid and feels premium — nothing feels cheap or flimsy about it.
The packaging wasn't fancy, but everything inside was completely safe and undamaged, so no complaints there.
One honest tip on pricing: I got it for ₹450, and at that price it's a steal. However, if the price has gone up, I'd suggest comparing with other brands first — my brother bought a similar bar from another brand for ₹500–₹550, so shop smart!
Overall, a great buy for anyone starting their home workout journey. Highly recommended!

Shree
4 out of 5 stars
Affordable but Risky Choice, Better to Invest in a Sturdier Bar
Reviewed in India on 29 May 2026
Colour: Classic - Red
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
Pros
>Good material quality: The bar itself feels solid and well-built.
>Value for money: Affordable compared to other options in the market.
>Screw fitting stability: When installed with screws, it performs better and feels more secure.
Cons
>Unsafe rubber grip fitting: Using it without screws is dangerous — my child fell while relying on the rubber grip.
>Low confidence: Even with screws, it doesn’t inspire trust for heavier users; feels like it may not hold securely.
>Requires daily tightening: The bar tends to loosen, demanding constant checks and adjustments.
>One-sided usability: Safe only when used from one side; using it from the other risks loosening.
>Not fully steady: Overall stability is lacking compared to sturdier alternatives.
Verdict
While the Boltfit Pull-Up Bar offers decent quality and affordability, its safety and stability issues make it unreliable for regular use. If fitness and family safety are priorities, it’s better to invest a little more in a sturdier pull-up bar that remains firm and secure from any side.

Product Summary: Boldfit Pull Up Bars For Home Workout -Chin Up Bar Gym Accessories for Men Door Way Adjustable Hanging Rod Without Screw, Anti-skid Grip, Strength Training Exercise Bar
From Boldfit
4.0 out of 5 stars, 2,024 ratings
Customer reviews
1K+ bought in past week
Price
One-time purchase: ₹474.00
68% Savings
List Price:
₹1,499.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
This Pull up bar length is adjustable length ( Min 62 cm - Max 100 cm) and this pull up bars comes with anti-slip rubber grip to provide strength to hold rod firm while doing exercise. Hanging bar to provide total security and protection while home workout. Bar is easy to install with tightening rod on both ends. Doorway pullup bar at home don't require much space also so, easy to store.
High Strength Steel Frame: This pull bar for home gym is made with high strength carbon steel to withstand upto 100 kg capacity. Pull ups rod exercise helps in support for doing intense body workout at home and can be easily fixed at any wall height. This pull up bar for home is easily removable and portable.
Doorway Pullup Bar : Our door way pull bar is easy to install, this pull up rod is first placed on the top height, for adjusting the height on the door way, then extending the bars length until the door frame and start rotating pull up bar from center, so the ends of the rod presses firmly on the sides. This bar provides strong hold for doorway pullup bar .
Strength Training Dynamite: Pullup bar for home incorporated in your daily training routine will help you workout with major exercise like pullups, chin ups and also strengthen your muscles with other basic exercise like leg stretch, push-ups, crunches, abs workouts. Pull-up bar for home will also help to improve your posture because reverse grip pull ups or reverse chin ups do a great job at working out on your postures and back.
Easy to Install and Store: Another great benefit of the door pull up bar or gym pull up bar is that they consume minimal space in your house and removable so, we can carry this gym bar rod along with us and as it is easy to pop in and pop out at your convenience. Having a door pull up bar in your door frame at home provides a great reminder to do a few reps or sets anytime you pass it. Comfort is also important when using pull ups bar for home.
*Note: Screws and Rubber Limiter are Provided for Installation
Product description
These days, home pullup bars are more than just a simple bar across a door way as they offer variable handholds, adjustable placements, and versatility that make them a key component to your gym accessories for men home workouts. Pullups for men home bars comes with different types of easy installation like doorway, wall mounted screw so, nowadays these home pull up bar is being used as best work from gym equipment at home. This chin up bar for home workout without screw is alternative for pull up bar with pulley and this pulley pull up bar door designs feature a narrow grip that becomes painful with use hence, our this bar exercise rod are designed to ensures that the grips do not rotate and are of a comfortable diameter for perfect chinups rod for home exercise. So your hands and fingers have to hold up all of your body weight on adjustable pull up bar and that serves as better grip strength training than virtually any other exercise out there. Doing pull ups with hanging bars very impressive but they also have a lot of benefits to be gained from doing them on the regular hanging exercise.

About this item
DIABETIC AND ORTHOPEDIC: - Extra Soft, Padded, Comfortable and Cushioned Foot-Bed Enhances Comfort to The Feet. Doctor Extra Soft Slipper Provides You Better Walking Comfort and Also Makes Your Walking Life Easy and Effortlessly.; ANTI-SKID: - Good Rubber Grip Enables You to Use These Slippers on Wet Floors, Tiles, Marbles, Etc. This Rubber Sole Is Long Lasting and Provides Uninterrupted Daily Usage.
LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE: - They Are Extremely Light Weight and Durable Slippers and Are Widely Used by Women’s / Ladies for All Ages, Especially Old Aged, Men with Foot, Knee and Back Pain, Arthritis, Plantar Fasciitis, Etc. These Extra Soft Doctor Slippers are mostly used by Women’s of all ages, Especially old aged suffering from Diabetes, Plantar fasciitis, Orthopedic Pain, Heel Pain, Arch Pain, Ankle Pain, Knee Pain and Back Pain.
MEDICATED SOFT DOCTOR SLIPPERS - Recommended by Doctors and Podiatrists for Diabetic, Orthopaedic, Cracked heals and obese's person's problem. Its EVA is Skin-friendly, bio-degradable, 100% recyclable and non-allergic material has been used which is skillfully crafted to provide optimum support to your ailing feet.
SKIN FRIENDLY AND STYLISH - It's Skin-Friendly material are Crafted and made with care that avoids Blisters, Scars, Sweating of the feet and Pain. These Stylish Slippers Fitting Your Lifestyle Where Your Feet Looks Pretty Which Provides Premium Look and Feel to The Feet. Various Colours Are Not Only Colourful & Highly Attractive to Look at But Also Gives You Option to Buy Slippers as Per Your Choice Than Chance.; Department Name: Womens; Heel Type: Flat; Toe Style: Open Toe

Product description
Add these wonderful Slippers (Flip-flop) to your Shoe Closet. Brought to you by DOCTOR EXTRA SOFT, this Slipper is not only colorful and highly attractive to look at, but also extremely Comfortable to wear. Now, you can now keep your feet comfortable with this pair of doctor sole footwear for women that have been skillfully crafted to provide optimum support to your ailing feet. It is lightweight and has been ergonomically designed to support and soothe feet suffering from orthopedic problems. These Chappal are preventive footwear for Diabetic Foot problems, relieves heel arch and Ankle Pains. Soft in-sole, Flexible sole for better walking comfort Extra Soft and Comfortable bottom for Heel Comfort. It is highly recommended for general foot Pain & Discomfort Heel Pain, Arch Pain Plantar Fasciitis, Diabetes, Back Pain, and Blood Circulation. Doctor Slippers for Women are also mostly used by Pregnant women and women suffering with Leg, Knee, Foot and Ankle Pain and are also known as Doctor Slipper for Women Soft, Relax Slippers for Women, Patient Slippers, and Sugar Patient Slippers for Women.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find these slippers to be of good quality, extra soft with nice cushioning, and highly comfortable, with one customer noting they're easy to walk in. Customers consider them good value for money and appreciate that they feel light on their legs. The fit and durability receive mixed feedback - while some find them a great fit and durable for long periods, others report they're too small and break within two months of use. The size chart is also inaccurate according to several customers.

From DOCTOR EXTRA SOFT
4.0 out of 5 stars, 59,770 ratings

Purchasing options

Other sellers
About this Item
DIABETIC AND ORTHOPEDIC: - Extra Soft, Padded, Comfortable and Cushioned Foot-Bed Enhances Comfort to The Feet. Doctor Extra Soft Slipper Provides You Better Walking Comfort and Also Makes Your Walking Life Easy and Effortlessly.; ANTI-SKID: - Good Rubber Grip Enables You to Use These Slippers on Wet Floors, Tiles, Marbles, Etc. This Rubber Sole Is Long Lasting and Provides Uninterrupted Daily Usage.
LIGHTWEIGHT AND DURABLE: - They Are Extremely Light Weight and Durable Slippers and Are Widely Used by Women’s / Ladies for All Ages, Especially Old Aged, Men with Foot, Knee and Back Pain, Arthritis, Plantar Fasciitis, Etc. These Extra Soft Doctor Slippers are mostly used by Women’s of all ages, Especially old aged suffering from Diabetes, Plantar fasciitis, Orthopedic Pain, Heel Pain, Arch Pain, Ankle Pain, Knee Pain and Back Pain.
MEDICATED SOFT DOCTOR SLIPPERS - Recommended by Doctors and Podiatrists for Diabetic, Orthopaedic, Cracked heals and obese's person's problem. Its EVA is Skin-friendly, bio-degradable, 100% recyclable and non-allergic material has been used which is skillfully crafted to provide optimum support to your ailing feet.
SKIN FRIENDLY AND STYLISH - It's Skin-Friendly material are Crafted and made with care that avoids Blisters, Scars, Sweating of the feet and Pain. These Stylish Slippers Fitting Your Lifestyle Where Your Feet Looks Pretty Which Provides Premium Look and Feel to The Feet. Various Colours Are Not Only Colourful & Highly Attractive to Look at But Also Gives You Option to Buy Slippers as Per Your Choice Than Chance.; Department Name: Womens; Heel Type: Flat; Toe Style: Open Toe
Product description
Add these wonderful Slippers (Flip-flop) to your Shoe Closet. Brought to you by DOCTOR EXTRA SOFT, this Slipper is not only colorful and highly attractive to look at, but also extremely Comfortable to wear. Now, you can now keep your feet comfortable with this pair of DOCTOR EXTRA SOFT sole footwear for women that have been skillfully crafted to provide optimum support to your ailing feet. It is lightweight and has been ergonomically designed to support and soothe feet suffering from orthopedic problems. These Chappal are preventive footwear for Diabetic Foot problems, relieves heel arch and Ankle Pains. Soft in-sole, Flexible sole for better walking comfort Extra Soft and Comfortable bottom for Heel Comfort. It is highly recommended for general foot Pain & Discomfort Heel Pain, Arch Pain Plantar Fasciitis, Diabetes, Back Pain, and Blood Circulation. Doctor Slippers for Women are also mostly used by Pregnant women and women suffering with Leg, Knee, Foot and Ankle Pain and are also known as Doctor Slipper for Women Soft, Relax Slippers for Women, Patient Slippers, and Sugar Patient Slippers for Women.

About this item
Heavy Resistance Bands That Are Easy To Use: Made From 100% Latex Comes In 5 Different Resistance Strength Levels: X-light, Light, Medium, Heavy And X-heavy Boldfit Rubber Bands Are Very Easy To Use beginners To Professionals All Can Use This Heavy Resistance Tube For Workout
Take Your Workouts To The Next Level: Whether You Are A Beginner Or Expert, Resistance Bands Have A Place In Your Home Gym Exercise Bands Work Your Muscles Like Weights Do You Can Do Multiple Exercise Using This Rubber Band Like Pull Up, Shoulder, Chest, Legs Etc.
Efficient Workout: Loop Resistance Bands / Fitness Bands Increase The Effectiveness Of Your Exercises Used For A Range Of Workouts, From Glute And Hip Activation This Resistance Tube / Toning Bands / Gym Bands Can Be Used For Stretching, Shoulder, Legs, Chest, Biceps Etc Workout
Multifunctional: The Stretching Band For Workout / Workout Bands Can Be Used To Exercise All Parts Of Muscles Such As Arms, Chest, Abdomen, Glutes And Legs, Also Good For Physical Therapy, Recovery Or To Increase Mobility. Men Women Boys Girls All Can Use This Loop Band For Home & Gym Workout
Great Investment For Your Body: Even Just Spending 15-20 Minutes Per Day With Our Resistance Bands Results In Consistent Progress! This Toning Bands For Doing Multiple Exercise
Great Investment For Your Body: Even Just Spending 15-20 Minutes Per Day With Our Resistance Bands Results In Consistent Progress! This Toning Bands For Doing Multiple Exercise

Boldfit Heavy Resistance Band for Workout Set Exercise & Stretching Pull Up Bands for Home Exercise for Gym Men & Women Loop Bands Toning Bands Resistance Band Yellow (3-7 Kg)
From the manufacturer
A 100% Latex of the highest-quality to deliver you high-quality and resistance filled workouts to condition your body to take on more weights, recover with the right tools and more.
Available in a range of resistance to suit your exercise needs and level from light to heavy. Match your workouts with the perfect resistance to get stronger and healthier.
Designed with an anti-skid texture, it stays put for an effective workout, always. Improve your strength and form while challenging your body to reach new heights!

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the resistance band to be of good quality, with high tensile strength and good stretchability, making it suitable for strengthening exercises and physiotherapy. Moreover, they consider it worth the price and particularly useful for beginners. However, the durability receives mixed feedback - while some report no tearing issues, others mention it breaking into pieces within six months. Additionally, the size and thickness receive criticism, with customers noting the width is hardly 5mm and the band is thinner than expected.

Islamuddin shaikh
5 out of 5 stars
Genuine Boldfit Resistance Band with Printed Branding – Great for Beginners
Reviewed in India on 15 April 2026
Style Name: Yellow 3-7 kg
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
I ordered the Boldfit Heavy Resistance Band (3–7 kg) and product quality kaafi achhi lagi. Sabse achhi baat ye hai ki band par Boldfit ka branding clearly printed hai, jo product ki authenticity confirm karta hai. Material strong aur flexible hai, stretching, warm-up aur light strength exercises ke liye perfect hai.
Grip comfortable hai aur use karte waqt slip nahi hota. Beginners ke liye especially useful band hai aur home workout ke liye practical option hai. Lightweight hone ki wajah se carry karna bhi easy hai.
Overall price ke hisaab se genuine aur value-for-money product hai. Definitely recommended.

Lizard
4 out of 5 stars
Nearly a Year In and Still Going Strong – Great Band with One Thing to Know!
Reviewed in India on 15 March 2026
Style Name: Yellow 3-7 kg
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
Been using this resistance band for almost a year now and honestly the durability is no joke — zero signs of wear, no snapping, no losing elasticity. Boldfit clearly made this to last and it shows.
Now here's something I want to be upfront about for anyone coming from cable machines — the resistance on bands is variable, meaning it gets harder as you stretch it further. Cables give you that same consistent tension throughout the movement, but bands don't work that way. So if you're doing pullups or back exercises, that variable resistance can feel a bit awkward at first because the tension keeps changing through the range of motion. Took me a little getting used to.
BUT — for pushups, pike pushups, triceps, biceps and forearm work? Absolute game changer. It adds just the right amount of resistance and the variable tension actually feels really natural for those movements. Seriously one of the best tools for upper body home workouts.
Overall, amazing quality for the price and a must have for anyone building a home gym setup. Just go in knowing how resistance bands work and you'll love it!

About this Item
Heavy Resistance Bands That Are Easy To Use: Made From 100% Latex Comes In 5 Different Resistance Strength Levels: X-light, Light, Medium, Heavy And X-heavy Boldfit Rubber Bands Are Very Easy To Use beginners To Professionals All Can Use This Heavy Resistance Tube For Workout
Take Your Workouts To The Next Level: Whether You Are A Beginner Or Expert, Resistance Bands Have A Place In Your Home Gym Exercise Bands Work Your Muscles Like Weights Do You Can Do Multiple Exercise Using This Rubber Band Like Pull Up, Shoulder, Chest, Legs Etc.
Efficient Workout: Loop Resistance Bands / Fitness Bands Increase The Effectiveness Of Your Exercises Used For A Range Of Workouts, From Glute And Hip Activation This Resistance Tube / Toning Bands / Gym Bands Can Be Used For Stretching, Shoulder, Legs, Chest, Biceps Etc Workout
Multifunctional: The Stretching Band For Workout / Workout Bands Can Be Used To Exercise All Parts Of Muscles Such As Arms, Chest, Abdomen, Glutes And Legs, Also Good For Physical Therapy, Recovery Or To Increase Mobility. Men Women Boys Girls All Can Use This Loop Band For Home & Gym Workout

Product description
Fabric resistance bands can help elevate any workout. Resistance bands are versatile, easy to take anywhere, and help you get the most out of strength training, yoga and pilates. These fabric bands come in different sizes and strengths to allow you to concentrate on various muscle groups, including glutes, abs, quads, calves and hamstrings.

Buy Grocery Store Items Online at Best Price on Amazon.in
Online grocery shopping has changed the way Indian households stock their kitchens. Whether customers need cooking basics like rice and wheat, snacks, beverages, or gourmet items, Amazon.in brings them together on a single platform. The convenience of an online grocery store combined with a wider assortment than most neighbourhood shops has made it a routine pick for everyday essentials.
Why Choose the Amazon.in Online Grocery Store?
Wide Range of Products:
Amazon.in offers a comprehensive selection of grocery items across cooking essentials, fresh produce, snacks, beverages, and gourmet foods, all in one place.
Trusted Brands:
The platform lists groceries from well-known brands that focus on quality and freshness.
Fast Delivery:
Amazon’s delivery network ensures groceries reach customers quickly, often on the same or next day depending on the pincode.
Types of Grocery Items Available Online
Here are some common categories of grocery items online that customers will find on Amazon.in:
Fruits & Vegetables:
Fresh produce like apples, bananas, spinach, tomatoes, and seasonal vegetables.
Dairy Products:
Milk, cheese, butter, yogurt, and plant-based alternatives like almond or oat milk.
Grains & Cereals:
Rice, pasta, oats, quinoa, flour, and breakfast cereals, including staples stocked in most Indian households.
Canned & Packaged Goods:
Canned beans, tomatoes, soups, sauces, and ready-to-eat meals.
Snacks & Beverages:
Chips, biscuits, nuts, tea, coffee, soft drinks, and juices.
Frozen Foods:
Frozen vegetables, ready meals, parathas, and snacks.
Spices & Condiments:
Salt, pepper, oils, vinegars, and a variety of herbs and masala blends.
Baking & Cooking Ingredients:
Sugar, flour, baking powder, chocolate, and cooking oils.
Health & Organic Foods:
Gluten-free products, organic produce, supplements, and plant-based options.
Gourmet Food:
Specialty items like exotic spices, artisanal cheeses, and imported chocolates.
This range covers most of what an Indian household would pick up at a kirana shop or supermarket.
Advantages of Shopping for Groceries Online
Time-Saving:
Ordering online skips store visits and checkout queues.
Wider Selection:
Online platforms carry a larger assortment than most local stores, including rare and specialty products.
Delivery to the Doorstep:
Customers who buy groceries online get their order delivered at home, which helps with heavy items like rice bags, oil cans, and detergents.
Benefits of Shopping for Groceries Online
Freshness:
Most online platforms focus on quality packaging so perishable goods arrive in good condition.
Customised Recommendations:
Shoppers see product suggestions based on their purchase history, which helps surface new items they might want to try.
Convenience for Bulk Orders:
Customers can purchase groceries online in larger pack sizes for monthly stock-ups, which is common for staples and cleaning supplies.
Access to Premium and Regional Products:
Specialty, gourmet, and regional items that may not be stocked locally are available through the platform.
Buy Grocery Store Items Online from Trusted Brands on Amazon.in
Amazon.in lists food items online and household essentials from well-known brands. Customers can buy groceries online from trusted names like Vedaka, Tata Sampann, Fortune, Happilo, Daawat, Nivea, and Dove. These brands are commonly stocked in Indian households and cover everything from staples to personal care.
Frequently Asked Questions
What types of products are available in a grocery store online?
An online grocery store typically lists fresh fruits and vegetables, dairy, cooking essentials, snacks, beverages, frozen foods, spices, and gourmet items. Amazon.in covers most of these categories.
What are gourmet foods in grocery stores?
Gourmet foods are premium-quality items like imported cheeses, exotic spices, fine chocolates, and specialty ingredients that are usually not found in a regular kirana shop.
What are the most essential grocery store items?
Essentials typically include grains, pulses, cooking oil, dairy, snacks, and fresh fruits and vegetables. These form the base of most Indian home kitchens.
What are the delivery hours for grocery items on Amazon.in?
Delivery hours depend on the slot selected during checkout. Customers can pick same-day or next-day delivery windows, subject to availability in their pincode.
How can one grocery shop online more efficiently?
A quick shopping list, use of category filters, and bulk buying for staples help make each order faster. Sticking to the list also helps avoid impulse additions.
Is it possible to find affordable grocery items online in India?
Yes. Amazon.in covers a broad price range across categories, so customers looking for cheap grocery online india can compare packs and brands before buying. Pack descriptions and customer reviews help in picking what suits the household.
Can customers buy both food and non-food items through the online kirana store?
Yes. Alongside food items online, Amazon.in stocks household cleaning products, personal care, baby care, and pet supplies, bringing most daily needs onto one platform

contact Apple Customer Service.
For Android smartphones, our Returns Centre will prompt you to download the Blancco app to diagnose issues with a defective smartphone. We'll provide a resolution on the basis of the Blancco app diagnostic results. In certain cases, we may also schedule a technician visit to your location. On the basis of the technician's evaluation report, we will provide resolution.
Please keep the item in its original condition, with original accessories like chargers, headsets etc., brand outer box, MRP tags attached, user manual in manufacturer packaging to avoid pickup cancellation.
Mobile Accessories
10 Days Returnable

Note: Please keep the item in its original condition, with MRP tags attached, user manual, warranty cards, and original accessories in manufacturer packaging.

This item is eligible for free replacement, within 7 days of delivery, in an unlikely event of damaged or different item delivered to you. In case of defective, product quality related issues for brands listed below, customer will be required to approach the brands’ customer service center and seek resolution. If the product is confirmed as defective by the brand then customer needs to get letter/email confirming the same and submit to Amazon customer service to seek replacement. Replacement for defective products, products with quality issues cannot be provided if the brand has not confirmed the same through a letter/email. Brands -HP, Lenovo, AMD, Intel, Seagate, Crucial
Please keep the item in its original condition, with brand outer box, MRP tags attached, user manual, warranty cards, CDs and original accessories in manufacturer packaging for a successful return pick-up. Before returning a Tablet, the device should be formatted and screen lock should be disabled.
For few products, we may schedule a technician visit to your location. On the basis of the technician's evaluation report, we will provide resolution.

More details
Returning Seller Fulfilled Items
The return timelines for seller-fulfilled items sold on Amazon.in are equivalent to the return timelines mentioned above for items fulfilled by Amazon.
If you’ve received a seller-fulfilled product in a condition that is damaged, defective or different from its description on the product detail page on Amazon.in, returns are subject to the seller's approval of the return.
If you do not receive a response from the seller for your return request within two business days, you can submit an A-to-Z Guarantee claim. Learn more about
returning seller fulfilled items.
Note
: For seller fulfilled items from Books, Movies & TV Shows categories, the sellers need to be informed of the damage/ defect within 14 days of delivery.
For seller-fulfilled items from Fine Art category, the sellers need to be informed of the damage / defect within 10 days of delivery. These items are not eligible for self-return. The seller will arrange the return pick up for these items.
For seller-fulfilled items from Sports collectibles and Entertainment collectibles categories, the sellers need to be informed of the damage / defect within 10 days of delivery.
Returning Global Store Items
The
General Return Policy
is applicable for all Amazon Global Store Products (“Product”). If the Product is eligible for a refund on return, you can choose to return the Product either through courier Pickup or Self-Return**
Note:
 - Once the package is received at Amazon Export Sales LLC fulfillment center in the US, it takes 2 (two) business days for the refund to be processed and 2- 4 business days for the refund amount to reflect in your account.
- If your return is due to an Amazon error you'll receive a full refund, else the shipping charges (onward & return) along with import fees will be deducted from your refund amount.
**For products worth more than INR 25000, we only offer Self-Return option.
Returning Products with Inspect & Buy label
2 Days, Refund
Refunds are applicable only if determined that the item was not damaged while in your possession, or is not different from what was shipped to you.
Read Full Return Policy
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
