Buy from the Best Online Dog Store at Amazon.in
Dog parents in India are increasingly turning to online dog stores for everyday essentials, from food and treats to grooming kits, leashes, and toys. Amazon.in functions as a comprehensive online dog store and a wider online pet store, listing dog products and pet supplies for households with dogs of every breed, size, and age.
Buying dog supplies and broader pet supplies online offers flexibility and access to a wide range of brands. Amazon.in lists multiple dog brands and sellers across categories, so customers can compare options and pick what suits their pet. Whether for a first-time owner or someone with years of experience raising dogs, an organised online dog store helps simplify daily care.
Types of Dog Products and Pet Supplies Available Online
Every dog has its own routine and needs. Amazon.in covers a wide range of dog supplies and broader pet products to suit different requirements.
Food and Treats
• Nutritionally balanced food options for dogs, cats, birds, fish, and small pets • Specialised diets such as grain-free, high-protein, and sensitive-stomach formulas • Training treats and snacks suited for puppies, adult dogs, and seniors
Pet Accessories
• Collars, leashes, and harnesses for daily walks • Pet clothing for seasonal comfort, including monsoon raincoats and winter sweaters • Beds, crates, carriers, and mats for rest
Grooming Supplies
• Shampoos, brushes, combs, nail clippers, and pet wipes for at-home grooming
Healthcare Products
• Wellness essentials such as supplements, hygiene products, and first-aid basics • Flea, tick, and deworming aids based on individual pet requirements
Toys and Training Essentials
• Chew toys, soft toys, fetch toys, and interactive puzzle toys • Training aids including clickers, pee pads, and behaviour-support tools
Aquatic and Bird Supplies
• Fish tanks, filters, water treatments, and decorative tank accessories • Bird cages, feeders, perches, and enrichment accessories
Dog-Specific Product Categories on Amazon.in
Dog Food and Treats
• Dry and wet food options to support energy and nourishment across life stages • Training treats and chews for behaviour reinforcement and dental care • Customers can buy pet food online from established Indian and international dog food brands, with options for puppies, adults, and senior dogs
Dog Grooming and Accessories
• Shampoos, conditioners, brushes, and nail clippers for regular at-home grooming • Leashes, harnesses, collars, and ID tags for daily walks and outdoor activities • Customers can shop for dog accessories online, with items ranging from basic walking gear to seasonal apparel
Dog Toys and Training Essentials
• Chew toys, fetch balls, rope toys, and puzzle feeders to keep dogs engaged • Training pads, clickers, and behaviour-support tools for puppy training and adult reinforcement
Pet-Specific Categories Beyond Dogs
Cat Products:
Dry, wet, and specialised cat food options, along with litter boxes, scratching posts, beds, and grooming tools.
Fish Products:
Aquarium tanks, filters, heaters, lighting, water conditioners, and species-specific fish food for freshwater and marine fish.
Bird Food and Accessories:
Seed mixes, pellets, and nutritional blends for parrots, budgies, and finches, alongside cages, swings, and perches.
Small Pet Supplies:
Specialised food, bedding, exercise wheels, tunnels, and chew toys for rabbits, hamsters, and guinea pigs.
Benefits of Choosing the Right Dog Supplies and Pet Products
Health Support:
Quality food and wellness products help maintain a dog’s overall health.
Better Behaviour:
Toys and training tools help manage energy and encourage positive habits.
Comfort and Safety:
Bedding, crates, carriers, and leashes provide security during travel and at home.
Easy Care:
Grooming and hygiene products simplify daily routines.
Durable Selection:
Well-made supplies reduce the need for frequent replacements.
How to Choose the Right Dog Products
Selecting dog supplies depends on understanding the pet’s specific needs: • Consider age, size, breed, and activity level when picking dog products • Choose food, grooming products, and accessories suited to the dog’s life stage • Check the quality and safety certifications of toys and chew items • Opt for trusted brands with consistent customer reviews • Consult a veterinarian for specific health concerns, allergies, or special diets
Pet Care Tips for First-Time Dog Owners
• Start with essentials such as food, bowls, leashes, grooming tools, and a comfortable resting area • Maintain a regular grooming routine to keep dogs clean and healthy • Organise supplies and restock dog items online before they run out • Provide chew toys and puzzles to keep dogs mentally engaged • Schedule regular veterinary check-ups for preventive care
Buy Pet Supplies Online from Trusted Brands on Amazon.in
Amazon.in works as a one-stop online dog store and ranks among the wider pet supply stores in India, listing pet products from well-known brands like PUREPET, Whiskas, Meat Up, Pedigree, and Drools. Customers can buy pet supplies online for dogs, cats, birds, fish, and small pets in one place. Dog products online on Amazon.in include food, treats, grooming items, leashes, and toys, while pet products online come with detailed descriptions and customer reviews. This supports an informed choice when comparing pet accessories online and food brands across categories.
Frequently Asked Questions
What is an online dog store?
An online dog store is a digital platform that lists food, accessories, grooming items, toys, and healthcare products for dogs. Amazon.in functions as both an online dog store and a wider pet supply store, offering products for several types of pets.
What dog supplies do new owners need?
Basic dog supplies include food, water bowls, a leash and collar, grooming tools, a comfortable bed, chew toys, and cleaning products. The exact list depends on the dog’s age, size, and breed.
Can dog food be ordered online in India?
Yes. Customers can shop online dog food stores like Amazon.in for dry food, wet food, treats, and specialised diets. Buying pet food online offers convenience and access to a wider range of brands than most local stores.
Are health supplements suitable for dogs?
Supplements are commonly used to support joint health, digestion, immunity, and coat condition. They should ideally be chosen on a veterinarian’s recommendation rather than self-prescribed.
How often should pet supplies be restocked?
Most dog items online and other pet supplies should be reordered with a 1 to 2 week buffer before the current pack runs out. This avoids sudden brand or formula changes that may upset the dog’s stomach or routine.

# URL: https://www.amazon.in/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=202075050&ref_=footer_iba
## Title: Interest-Based Ads - Amazon Customer Service
### Depth Level: 1
---

Interest-Based Ads - Amazon Customer Service
Help and Customer Service
Find more solutions
Security and Privacy
›
Interest-Based Ads
Interest-based ads are sometimes referred to as personalized or targeted ads. We
         show interest-based ads to display features, products, and services that might be
         of interest to you. In providing interest-based ads, we follow applicable laws, as
         well as the Code for Self-Regulation in Advertising by the Advertising Standards Council
         of India and the Self-Regulatory Principles for Online Behavioral Advertising developed
         by the Digital Advertising Alliance (a coalition of marketing, online advertising,
         and consumer advocacy organizations).
What sort of information do we use to show interest-based ads?
To serve you interest-based ads, we use information such as your interactions with
            Amazon sites, content, or services. We do not use information which on its own identifies
            you, such as name or e-mail address, to serve interest-based ads.
We use cookies, pixels, , IP addresses and other technologies (collectively, , "advertising
            technologies"), which enable us to understand the effectiveness of the interest-based
            ads we show you by measuring what ads are clicked or viewed, and to provide you with
            more useful and relevant ads. For example, we use cookies or other information such
            as IP address to limit the number of times you are shown the same ad.
See our
Privacy Notice
for more information about the types of information that we gather.
How do we work with third parties to show you interest-based ads?
We work with third parties, such as advertisers, publishers, social media networks,
            search engines, ad serving companies, and advertising companies working on their behalf,
            to improve the relevance of ads we serve. In providing you interest-based ads we do
            not associate your interactions on unaffiliated sites with information which on its
            own identifies you, such as name or email address, and we do not provide any such
            information to advertisers or to third-party sites that display our interest-based
            ads. Advertisers and other third parties may assume that users who interact with or
            click on an interest-based ad or content are part of the group that the ad or content
            is directed towards (for example, users in northern India or users who purchased or
            browsed for classical music). Some third-parties may provide us pseudonymized information
            about you (such as demographic information or sites where you have been shown ads)
            from offline and online sources that we may use to provide you more relevant and useful
            advertising.
Third party advertisers or advertising companies working on their behalf sometimes
            use cookies in the process of delivering content, including ads, directly to your
            browser or device, and they may automatically receive an IP address when this happens.
            They may also use cookies to measure the effectiveness of their ads, show you more
            relevant advertising content, and perform services on behalf of Amazon. For information
            on how to control and delete cookies (including third party cookies) please visit
            our
Cookies notice
.
Advertising Preferences
Amazon offers you choices about receiving interest-based ads from us. You can choose
            not to receive interest-based ads from Amazon. You will still see ads but they will
            not be based on your interests. Please visit your
Advertising Preferences
page to learn how to set your preferences.
You can also generally opt out of receiving personalized ads from third party advertisers
            and ad networks who are members of the
Network Advertising Initiative (NAI)
or who follow the
Digital Advertising Alliance’s Self-Regulatory Principles for Online Behavioral Advertising
by visiting the opt out pages on the NAI website and DAA website.
Some mobile operating systems may additionally limit these settings; your choices
            here do not override those more limited settings on such mobile operating systems
For information on the advertising practices of websites and services offered by
            other Amazon companies, please review their interest-based ads policies and other
            notices.

About this item
Star of Birthday Party: This gold sparkling birthday sash and tiara for girls and women will make you AMAZING and being the center of attention wherever you are! Dress it and will get more compliments and blessing on your special day! This elegant birthday sash and tiara will make you stand out and turn heads wherever you are.
Sturdy and Comfortable Headband: The birthday tiara has 168 shining diamonds inlaid gold plating, makes it shine like a real diamond. It is lightweight and adjustable in width to keep you elegant and comfortable all day long. Perfect birthday decorations for her cherish one-year-once happy birthday. Makes the girl the most special one in crowd.
Sparkly Sash: Made of soft fabric hot pressed with stamping glitter. Premium quality and no coming off glitter. Rose gold “Birthday Girl” letters make the sash look shiny and elegant. You will feel beautiful and confident knowing no other girl in the room will have your kind of sash.
Suitable for All Ages: Birthday girl crown and sash is suitable for any age women or teenager girl. Also makes a thoughtful gift for a beloved family or friend.
Shining Diva is well known across fashion jewelry sector. Shining Diva products are preferred by many Designers, Stars and Celebrities. Shining Diva fashion jewelry believes in making beauty and fashion a part of everybody's life

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the crown and sash set to be of good quality, with one noting the rose gold polish looks particularly good. Moreover, the product receives positive feedback for its appearance, color, and value for money, and customers consider it a cool gift for birthdays. However, the durability receives mixed reviews, with some finding it durable while others report issues.

Product Summary: Shining Diva Fashion Latest Stylish Birthday Sash and Crown - Pack of 2 Pcs | Birthday Queen Crown | Birthday Gifts for Best Friend, Sister, Teenager | Birthday Decorations Items
From Shining Diva Fashion
4.5 out of 5 stars, 1,464 ratings

₹1,495.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
Star of Birthday Party: This gold sparkling birthday sash and tiara for girls and women will make you AMAZING and being the center of attention wherever you are! Dress it and will get more compliments and blessing on your special day! This elegant birthday sash and tiara will make you stand out and turn heads wherever you are.
Sturdy and Comfortable Headband: The birthday tiara has 168 shining diamonds inlaid gold plating, makes it shine like a real diamond. It is lightweight and adjustable in width to keep you elegant and comfortable all day long. Perfect birthday decorations for her cherish one-year-once happy birthday. Makes the girl the most special one in crowd.
Sparkly Sash: Made of soft fabric hot pressed with stamping glitter. Premium quality and no coming off glitter. Rose gold “Birthday Girl” letters make the sash look shiny and elegant. You will feel beautiful and confident knowing no other girl in the room will have your kind of sash.
Suitable for All Ages: Birthday girl crown and sash is suitable for any age women or teenager girl. Also makes a thoughtful gift for a beloved family or friend.
Shining Diva is well known across fashion jewelry sector. Shining Diva products are preferred by many Designers, Stars and Celebrities. Shining Diva fashion jewelry believes in making beauty and fashion a part of everybody's life
Product description
Stylish birthday sash and crown for girls and women from the house of shining diva. Memorable special birthday gift for girls, women, kids, wife, sister, best friend, teenager. Latest tiara for women

About this item
Built-In Arch Support Slippers – Promotes natural foot alignment, reduces flat-foot fatigue, and enhances posture & stability while EVA cushioning delivers cloud-like comfort, transforming ordinary chappals into orthopedic footwear; ideal soft slippers for women and men, providing all-day relief for tired feet and perfect for daily home wear.
Doctor Recommended Orthopedic Design - Featuring dual-density cushioning, these ortho slippers for women daily use and men combine therapeutic benefits with style. The ergonomic design makes these ideal home chappals for women and casual slippers for men seeking comfort without compromising support.
Superior Anti-Skid Protection - Unlike regular slippers that slip on wet surfaces, our slippers feature a herringbone rubber outsole that prevents accidents. Whether you need women chappal daily use options or slipper for men, our design ensures safety on all indoor surfaces.
Premium Comfort Unisex Design - These women slippers for home and men's slipper options feature the same plush comfort in a unisex design. The soft slippers for woman and men construction makes them perfect house slippers for woman and Slipper for men alike.
Versatile Style for Everyone - Available in three colors that work for all, these slipper for women daily use and Slipper for boy's options complement any loungewear. Whether you prefer lady's slippers or men's slippers casual styles, our unisex design delivers the same cloud-like comfort.

Product description
Ultra Soft Home Slippers for Everyone - Experience cloud-like comfort with our EVA cushioning that transforms ordinary chappals into orthopedic footwear. These soft slippers for women home use and men provide relief for tired feet, making them perfect daily wear slippers for women soft enough for all-day use.  Doctor Recommended Orthopedic Design - Featuring dual-density cushioning, these ortho slippers for women daily use and men combine therapeutic benefits with style. The ergonomic design makes these ideal home chappals for women and casual slippers for men seeking comfort without compromising support.  Superior Anti-Skid Protection - Unlike regular slippers that slip on wet surfaces, our slippers feature a herringbone rubber outsole that prevents accidents. Whether you need women chappal daily use options or slipper for men, our design ensures safety on all indoor surfaces.  Premium Comfort Unisex Design - These women slippers for home and men's slipper options feature the same plush comfort in a unisex design. The soft slippers for woman and men construction makes them perfect house slippers for woman and Slipper for men alike.  Versatile Style for Everyone - Available in three colors that work for all, these slipper for women daily use and Slipper for boy's options complement any loungewear. Whether you prefer lady's slippers or men's slippers casual styles, our unisex design delivers the same cloud-like comfort.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find these slippers extremely comfortable, well-fitting, and appreciate their premium feel. They receive positive feedback for their softness with good cushioning, non-slip grip on walking surfaces, and effectiveness in reducing foot pain and fatigue, particularly for those with plantar fasciitis. The arch support receives mixed reviews - while some say it provides great support, others find it useless. Value for money opinions are divided, with some finding them worth the price while others consider them expensive.

Amod Kumar sharma
5 out of 5 stars
Comfort and Safety Redefined for Injured Feet
Reviewed in India on 18 February 2026
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
As someone recovering from a broken heel, finding the right footwear for home has been a challenge—until I discovered the Frido Cloud Comfort Arch Support Slippers in Soft Peach. These slippers have truly been a blessing during my healing journey.
Exceptional Support for Injured Feet
The orthopedic arch support in these slippers is exactly what I needed. With my injury, proper support is crucial, and the Frido slippers provide gentle yet firm cushioning that helps relieve pressure on my heel. I can walk comfortably around the house without worrying about aggravating my injury, and the slippers help maintain good posture, which is so important during recovery.
Unmatched Comfort
The softness of the material is remarkable. Even with my sensitive, healing foot, the slippers feel plush and soothing. The cloud-like cushioning makes every step pain-free, and I never feel discomfort, even after wearing them for hours. The Soft Peach color adds a touch of elegance, making me feel good about my footwear choice.
Safe, Non-Slip Design
Safety is a top priority for me, especially with a broken heel. The anti-skid sole on these slippers gives me confidence as I move around the house. Whether I’m on tile, wood, or carpet, I never have to worry about slipping. This feature is invaluable for anyone recovering from an injury or simply wanting extra security at home.
Perfect Fit & Versatile Use
The slippers fit perfectly (UK-5) and are designed for both women and men, making them a versatile choice. I use them not only for relaxing but also for light activities around the house. Their supportive structure ensures my foot stays stable, which is essential during the healing process.
Highly Recommended for Recovery & Everyday Comfort
If you’re dealing with a foot injury or simply want superior comfort and support, I can’t recommend the Frido Cloud Comfort Arch Support Slippers enough. They have made a noticeable difference in my daily life, providing the support and safety I need while also being stylish and comfortable.

DD
3 out of 5 stars
Good for walking inside home. Not for longer trips for sure. Good overall quality.
Reviewed in India on 13 April 2026
Size: 9 UK
Colour: Charcoal Black-Arch Support
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
Good for home use. Size and fit were good. For a longer aggressive trip like a "yatra" these may not be an alternative to a comfortable shoes. I wore this for a trip to Puri, India. All good. No complaints. But these did not replace the comfort and foot fatigue levels that I expected out of, say, my Sketchers or Nike. I suppose I shouldnt have expected that in first place since these are not "shoes".
Overall for Slippers, these are fine. Dont expect too much though. They are comfortable for folks with step counts less than 4000.  I will buy them again if I were to walk not too much.
Basically, if you are planning to walk a long way with these on, you will be disappointed. If you are putting these on for just walking inside your home, go for it.

These are comfortable to wear but the arch support doesn't help with moderate cases of flat foot such as mine. I have flexible flat feet and a bone sticks out beside the ankle when I stand up. The footwear won't help correct cases such as these but they are very comfy for everyday use with solid sole grip. You will get a visible footmark on top of the footwear once you break in it but it is not a major depression yet.

About this Item
Built-In Arch Support Slippers – Promotes natural foot alignment, reduces flat-foot fatigue, and enhances posture & stability while EVA cushioning delivers cloud-like comfort, transforming ordinary chappals into orthopedic footwear; ideal soft slippers for women and men, providing all-day relief for tired feet and perfect for daily home wear.
Doctor Recommended Orthopedic Design - Featuring dual-density cushioning, these ortho slippers for women daily use and men combine therapeutic benefits with style. The ergonomic design makes these ideal home chappals for women and casual slippers for men seeking comfort without compromising support.
Superior Anti-Skid Protection - Unlike regular slippers that slip on wet surfaces, our slippers feature a herringbone rubber outsole that prevents accidents. Whether you need women chappal daily use options or slipper for men, our design ensures safety on all indoor surfaces.
Premium Comfort Unisex Design - These women slippers for home and men's slipper options feature the same plush comfort in a unisex design. The soft slippers for woman and men construction makes them perfect house slippers for woman and Slipper for men alike.
Versatile Style for Everyone - Available in three colors that work for all, these slipper for women daily use and Slipper for boy's options complement any loungewear. Whether you prefer lady's slippers or men's slippers casual styles, our unisex design delivers the same cloud-like comfort.
Product description
Frido Cloud Comfort Arch Support Slippers bring together plush comfort and long-lasting durability in a truly unisex design. Whether you’re looking for women’s slippers, men’s slippers, or simply versatile home footwear for the entire family, these slippers provide exceptional support without gender-specific limits. Featuring built-in arch support, they promote natural foot alignment, reduce flat foot fatigue, and improve overall posture and stability—making them ideal for daily wear as well as for those needing orthopedic comfort. Unlike traditional chappals that lack cushioning or house slippers that slip on smooth floors, Frido Cloud Comfort Slippers combine orthopedic-level support with everyday practicality. Premium EVA cushioning delivers a soft, cloud-like feel underfoot while ensuring durability and a secure grip on all surfaces. With doctor-recommended comfort, stylish design, and universal sizing, they are the perfect choice for anyone seeking reliable, all-day comfort in a modern, unisex slipper.

Discover a World of Home Improvement Products at Amazon India
Elevate and upgrade your home with ease by exploring Amazon India's extensive range of
home improvement
products. Our Home Improvement & Tools store offers a diverse collection of items to enhance the safety, functionality, and aesthetics of your living space. Whether you're embarking on a bathroom renovation, upgrading your kitchen, or fortifying home security, we have you covered with a comprehensive selection of products.
Elevate Your
Bathroom
and
Kitchen
Spaces
In the bathroom, you'll find everything from faucets, toilets, and sinks to mirrors, towel holders, and showers. We also offer an array of bathroom accessories for added convenience. In the kitchen, explore top-quality kitchen sinks, kitchen sink faucets, and kitchen sink accessories to make your culinary space more efficient and stylish. Keep your living spaces spotless with an assortment of cleaning and maintenance products, including mops, brooms, scrubs, sponges, wipers, gloves, brushes, and dusters.
Enhance Home
Safety and Security
At Amazon India, we prioritize the safety of your home. Discover an extensive range of safety products, including safes, digital door locks, mechanical door locks, video door phones, security cameras, fire safety equipment, and sensors. Our selection ensures that you can fortify your home's security without compromising on style or convenience.
Empower Your DIY Projects with the Right
Tools
For the DIY enthusiast, we offer a wide array of tools and equipment, from drill kits and corded drills to cordless drills, hand tools, heat guns, hand tool kits, and air blowers. These tools empower you to take on various home improvement projects with confidence and ease. Transform your living space by exploring our assortment of wall paints, spray paints, solar roof coatings, waterproofing solutions, painting hand tools, paint sprayer tools, sanding tools, and putty & fillers. Additionally, we provide essential hardware such as locks, drawer channels, hooks, door closers, door accessories, handles, hinges, and knobs.
Elevate Your Interior with
Wallpapers
and more
Add a touch of style and personality to your home with our selection of sticker wallpapers, foam wallpapers, premium wallpapers, and wallpapers with professional installation services. These options allow you to refresh your interior and create a space that truly reflects your unique taste.
Access High Places with
Ladders
and Accessories
For those hard-to-reach spots, explore our collection of ladders offer safety and convenience. These products are essential for various home improvement tasks.
Welcome to a
Smart Home Electricals
Make your living space more efficient and technology-savvy with travel adapters & multiplugs, smart home equipment, cable management solutions, wires, switches & sockets, doorbells, and electrical tools & testers. These items add a modern touch to your home while enhancing functionality.
Ensure Efficient
Water Management
Last but not least, our range includes water dispensers, pump dispensers, pipes & conduits, and water softeners & filters to help you manage your home's water systems effectively.
Shop for all your home improvement needs at Amazon India, and elevate your living space to new heights of safety, functionality, and style. Your home will become a true reflection of your taste and preferences through our comprehensive selection of top-quality products. Upgrade your home with top-searched keywords such as bathroom accessories, kitchen sinks, and wallpaper for walls, among others, to make your space truly your own.

About this item
Lightweight & Durable: Made from high-quality stainless steel, this water bottle is built to last while remaining lightweight for easy carrying. It’s perfect for daily use, whether you’re heading to the gym, the office, or just out and about.
Convenient Sipper Cap: The sipper cap is designed for maximum convenience, offering a spill-proof experience and easy access to your drink. It’s perfect for busy days, allowing you to hydrate without making a mess or slowing down.
Fresh & Clean Hydration: Enjoy pure-tasting water every time. The stainless steel material ensures that your drink stays fresh, without any metallic taste or lingering odors, giving you clean hydration with each sip.
Eye-catching Ombre Design: This bottle features a vibrant ombre effect that transitions smoothly from one color to another, adding a pop of style to your daily routine. The stunning colors make it a unique accessory you'll love showing off.
Portable & Travel-Friendly: Compact and easy to carry, this water bottle fits perfectly in your bag, backpack, or car cup holder. It’s an essential companion for staying hydrated throughout your day, whether you’re at home, work, or traveling.
›

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the water bottle to be of good quality, with a premium appearance and vibrant color. Moreover, they appreciate its suitability for daily use, particularly in office and school settings. However, the durability receives mixed feedback - while the steel construction is strong, customers report the bottle breaking within a week of use. Additionally, the value for money and material quality are mixed, with some finding it worth the price while others consider it overpriced, and some praising the steel construction while others note it's not 304 food-grade stainless steel. Customers report leakage issues.

Charu
5 out of 5 stars
Good Quality Stainless Steel Bottle for Daily Use
Reviewed in India on 19 May 2026
Colour: Pack of 1, Blue-Denim Blue Ombre
Size: 950ml
Number of Items: 1
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
Been using this stainless steel water bottle daily for office and travel, and it’s quite practical. The bottle feels sturdy and the steel quality looks decent for regular use. I liked the sipper cap design as it makes drinking water convenient, especially while travelling or during workouts.
The 1 litre capacity is good enough for daily hydration and it fits nicely in the fridge as well. The bottle is lightweight, easy to carry and does not leak when closed properly. Cleaning is also simple because of the wide opening.
Overall, a good everyday water bottle for home, office, gym or travel use. Value for money product.

After using the GO24 stainless steel bottle, I am highly impressed with the overall build quality and design. Here is a quick breakdown of my experience:
​Design & Build: The aesthetic is incredibly modern, especially with the premium ombre/matte finish. The texture provides an excellent, non-slip grip even if your hands are wet or sweating.
Portability: It easily fits into standard backpack side pockets and car cup holders, making it highly versatile for daily commuting, gym, or office use.

Product Summary: Go24 pexpo Water Bottle 1 ltr Stainless Steel Sports/Fridge Bottle with Sipper Cap | 1-Year Warranty | Single Wall | For Home, Office, Gym | Lightweight | Craft Pro 950ml | Grey - Black Ombre
From Go24 pexpo
4.1 out of 5 stars, 5,541 ratings
Customer reviews
1K+ bought in past week
Price
One-time purchase: ₹265.00
59% Savings
List Price:
₹649.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
Lightweight & Durable: Made from high-quality stainless steel, this water bottle is built to last while remaining lightweight for easy carrying. It’s perfect for daily use, whether you’re heading to the gym, the office, or just out and about.
Convenient Sipper Cap: The sipper cap is designed for maximum convenience, offering a spill-proof experience and easy access to your drink. It’s perfect for busy days, allowing you to hydrate without making a mess or slowing down.
Fresh & Clean Hydration: Enjoy pure-tasting water every time. The stainless steel material ensures that your drink stays fresh, without any metallic taste or lingering odors, giving you clean hydration with each sip.
Eye-catching Ombre Design: This bottle features a vibrant ombre effect that transitions smoothly from one color to another, adding a pop of style to your daily routine. The stunning colors make it a unique accessory you'll love showing off.
Portable & Travel-Friendly: Compact and easy to carry, this water bottle fits perfectly in your bag, backpack, or car cup holder. It’s an essential companion for staying hydrated throughout your day, whether you’re at home, work, or traveling.
Product description
The Pexpo Craft Stainless Steel Water Bottle is the new variation of our best-selling Craft bottles, now available in even more vibrant ombre shades that are sure to catch your eye. With a sleek, single-wall stainless steel design, this bottle is lightweight yet durable, making it perfect for everyday use. Whether you’re at the gym, on your commute, or enjoying a walk in the park, it’s built to keep up with your active lifestyle. The stunning ombre colors blend seamlessly from one shade to another, offering a fresh and modern look that adds a pop of personality to your day. Each color combination is carefully chosen to bring style and energy to your routine, so you’ll always look forward to using your bottle. Equipped with a convenient sipper cap, the bottle ensures a spill-free experience, allowing you to hydrate without any mess. The cap is easy to open and close, making it perfect for those who need quick access to their water while on the move. Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, this bottle not only looks great but also helps maintain the freshness of your drink. It’s easy to clean and maintain, ensuring that your bottle stays in great condition for the long run. Plus, it won’t alter the taste or smell of your water, giving you a pure and refreshing sip every time. With its compact size, the Pexpo Craft bottle fits easily into your bag, backpack, or car cup holder, making it a convenient hydration companion wherever you go. It’s an ideal choice for anyone looking to stay hydrated without relying on disposable plastic bottles. The Pexpo Craft Stainless Steel Water Bottle is more than just a bottle – it’s a statement piece. Whether for yourself or as a thoughtful gift, this new variation is sure to be a favorite. Stay refreshed and stylish with every sip!

# URL: https://www.amazon.in/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=200534380&ref_=footer_privacy
## Title: Amazon.in Privacy Notice - Amazon Customer Service
### Depth Level: 1
---

Amazon.in Privacy Notice - Amazon Customer Service
Help and Customer Service
Find more solutions
Security and Privacy
›
Legal Policies
›
Amazon.in Privacy Notice
Disclaimer:
In the event of any discrepancy or conflict, the English version will prevail over the translation.
Last updated: November 18, 2025
. To see prior version, click
here
We know that you care how information about you is used and shared, and we appreciate your trust that we will do so carefully and sensibly. This Privacy Notice describes how Amazon Seller Services Private Limited and its affiliates including Amazon.com, Inc. (collectively "Amazon") collect and process your personal information through Amazon websites, devices, products, services, online marketplace and applications that reference this Privacy Notice (together "Amazon Services").
By using Amazon Services you agree to our use of your personal information (including sensitive personal information) in accordance with this Privacy Notice, as may be amended from time to time by us at our discretion. You also agree and consent to us collecting, storing, processing, transferring, and sharing your personal information (including sensitive personal information) with third parties or service providers for the purposes set out in this Privacy Notice.
Personal information subject to this Privacy Notice will be collected and retained by Amazon, with a registered office at 8th floor, Brigade Gateway 26/1 Dr. Rajkumar Road Bangalore Karnataka 560055 India.
What Personal Information About Customers Does Amazon Collect?
For What Purposes Does Amazon Use Your Personal Information?
What About Cookies and Other Identifiers?
Does Amazon Share Your Personal Information?
How Secure is Information About Me?
What About Advertising?
What Information can I Access?
What Choices Do I Have?
Are Children Allowed to Use Amazon Services?
Conditions of Use, Notices, and Revisions
Related Practices and Information
Examples of Information Collected
Back to Top
What Personal Information About Customers Does Amazon Collect?
We collect your personal information in order to provide and continually improve our products and services.
Here are the types of personal information we collect:
Information You Give Us:
We receive and store any information you provide in relation to Amazon Services. Click
here
to see examples of what we collect. You can choose not to provide certain information, but then you might not be able to take advantage of many of our Amazon Services.
Automatic Information:
We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with content and services available through Amazon Services. Like many websites, we use cookies and other unique identifiers, and we obtain certain types of information when your web browser or device accesses Amazon Services and other content served by or on behalf of Amazon on other websites. Click
here
to see examples of what we collect.
Information from Other Sources:
We might receive information about you from other sources, such as updated delivery and address information from our carriers, which we use to correct our records and deliver your next purchase more easily. Click
here
to see additional examples of the information we receive
Back to Top
For What Purposes Does Amazon Use Your Personal Information?
We use your personal information to operate, provide, develop, and improve the products and services that we offer our customers. These purposes include:
Purchase and delivery of products and services.
We use your personal information to take and fulfill orders, deliver products and services, process payments, and communicate with you about orders, products and services, and promotional offers.
Provide, troubleshoot, and improve Amazon Services.
We use your personal information to provide functionality, analyze performance, fix errors, and improve the usability and effectiveness of the Amazon Services.
Recommendations and personalization. We use your personal information to recommend features, products, and services that might be of interest to you, identify your preferences, and personalize your experience with Amazon Services.
Provide voice, image and camera services.
When you use our voice, image and camera services, we use your voice input, images, videos, and other personal information to respond to your requests, provide the requested service to you, and improve our services. For more information about Alexa voice services, click
here
.
Comply with legal obligations.
In certain cases, we collect and use your personal information to comply with laws. For instance, we collect from sellers information regarding place of establishment and bank account information for identity verification and other purposes.
Communicate with you.
We use your personal information to communicate with you in relation to Amazon Services via different channels (e.g., by phone, e-mail, chat).
Advertising.
We use your personal information to display interest-based ads for features, products, and services that might be of interest to you. We do not use information that personally identifies you to display interest-based ads. To learn more, please read our
Interest-Based Ads
notice.
Fraud Prevention and Credit Risks.
We use personal information to prevent and detect fraud and abuse in order to protect the security of our customers, Amazon, and others. We may also use scoring methods to assess and manage credit risks.
What About Cookies and Other Identifiers?
To enable our systems to recognize your browser or device and to provide and improve Amazon Services, we use cookies and other identifiers. For more information about cookies and how we use them, please read our
Cookies Notice
.
Back to Top
Does Amazon Share Your Personal Information?
Information about our customers is an important part of our business and we are not in the business of selling our customers’ personal information to others. We share customers’ personal information only as described below and with Amazon.com, Inc. and subsidiaries that Amazon.com, Inc. controls that either are subject to this Privacy Notice or follow practices at least as protective as those described in this Privacy Notice.
Transactions involving Third Parties:
We make available to you services, products, applications, or skills provided by third parties for use on or through Amazon Services. For example, the products you order through our marketplace are from third parties, you can download applications from third-party application providers from our App Store, and enable third-party skills through our Alexa services. We also offer services or sell product lines jointly with third-party businesses, such as sellers on the marketplace, restaurants registered on Amazon.in, merchants providing mobile recharges and bill-payment assistance. You can tell when a third party is involved in your transactions, and we share customers’ personal information related to those transactions with that third party.
Third-Party Service Providers:
We employ other companies and individuals to perform functions on our behalf. Examples include fulfilling orders for products or services, delivering packages, sending postal mail and e-mail, removing repetitive information from customer lists, analyzing data, providing marketing assistance, providing search results and links (including paid listings and links), processing payments, transmitting content, scoring, assessing and managing credit risk, and providing customer service. These third-party service providers have access to personal information needed to perform their functions, but may not use it for other purposes. Further, they must process the personal information in accordance with applicable law.
Business Transfers:
As we continue to develop our business, we might sell or buy other businesses or services. In such transactions, customer information generally is one of the transferred business assets but remains subject to the promises made in any pre-existing Privacy Notice (unless, of course, the customer consents otherwise). Also, in the unlikely event that Amazon.com, Inc. or Amazon Seller Services Private Limited or any of its affiliates, or substantially all of their assets are acquired, customer information will of course be one of the transferred assets.
Protection of Amazon and Others:
We release account and other personal information when we believe release is appropriate to comply with the law; enforce or apply our
Conditions of Use
and other agreements; or protect the rights, property, or safety of Amazon, our users, or others. This includes exchanging information with other companies and organizations for fraud protection and credit risk reduction.
Other than as set out above, you will receive notice when personal information about you might be shared with third parties, and you will have an opportunity to choose not to share the information.
Back to Top
How Secure Is Information About Me?
We design our systems with your security and privacy in mind.
We work to protect the security of your personal information during transmission by using encryption protocols and software.
We follow the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) when handling payment card data.
We maintain physical, electronic, and procedural safeguards in connection with the collection, storage, processing, and disclosure of personal customer information. Our security procedures mean that we may occasionally request proof of identity before we disclose personal information to you.
Our devices offer security features to protect them against unauthorized access and loss of data. You can control these features and configure them based on your needs. Click
here
for more information on how to manage the security settings of your device.
It is important for you to protect against unauthorized access to your password and to your computers, devices and applications. Be sure to sign off when finished using a shared computer. Click
here
for more information on how to sign off.
Back to Top
What About Advertising?
Third-Party Advertisers and Links to Other Websites:
Amazon Services may include third-party advertising and links to other websites and apps. Third-party advertising partners may collect information about you when you interact with their content, advertising, and services. For more information about third-party advertising at Amazon, including interest-based ads, please read our
Interest-Based Ads policy
. To adjust your advertising preferences, please go to the
Advertising Preferences
page.
Use of Third-Party Advertising Services:
We provide ad companies with information that allows them to serve you with more useful and relevant Amazon ads and to measure their effectiveness. We never share your name or other information that directly identifies you when we do this. Instead, we use an advertising identifier like a cookie, a device identifier, or a code derived from applying irreversible cryptography to other information like an email address.
 For example, if you have already downloaded one of our apps, we will share your advertising identifier and data about that event so that you will not be served an ad to download the app again. While we do not share your specific shopping actions like purchases, product views, or searches with ad companies, we may share an advertising identifier and an estimate of the value of the ads they show you on our behalf so they can serve you with more effective Amazon ads. Some ad companies also use this information to serve you relevant ads from other advertisers. You can learn more about how to opt-out of interest-based advertising by going to the
Advertising Preferences
page.
Back to Top
What Information Can I Access?
You can access your information, including your name, address, payment options, profile information, Prime membership, household settings, and purchase history in the "Your Account" section of the website or mobile application. Click here for a list of examples that you can access. To request access to personal information that is not available through Your Account you can submit a request
here
.
Back to Top
What Choices Do I Have?
If you have any questions as to how we collect and use your personal information, please contact our
Grievance Officer
. Many of our Amazon Services also include settings that provide you with options as to how your information is being used
As described above, you can always choose not to provide certain information, but then you might not be able to take advantage of many of the Amazon Services.
You can add or update certain information on pages such as those referenced in
What Information Can I Access?
. When you update information, we usually keep a copy of the prior version for our records
If you do not want to receive e-mail or other communications from us, please adjust your
Customer Communication Preferences
. If you don’t want to receive in-app notifications from us, please adjust your notification settings in the app or device
If you do not want to see interest-based ads, please adjust your
Advertising Preferences
.
The Help feature on most browsers and devices will tell you how to prevent your browser or device from accepting new cookies or other identifiers, how to have the browser notify you when you receive a new cookie or how to block cookies altogether. Because cookies and identifiers allow you to take advantage of some essential features of Amazon Services, we recommend that you leave them turned on. For instance, if you block or otherwise reject our cookies, you will not be able to add items to your Shopping Cart, proceed to Checkout, or use any Services that require you to Sign in. For more information about cookies and other identifiers, see our
Cookies Notice
.
If you want to browse our websites without linking the browsing history to your account, you may do so by logging out of your account
here
and blocking cookies on your browser.
You will also be able to opt out of certain other types of data usage by updating your settings on the applicable Amazon website (e.g., in "Manage Your Content and Devices"), device, or application. For more information click
here
. Most non-Amazon devices also provide users with the ability to change device permissions (e.g., disable/access location services, contacts). For most devices, these controls are located in the device's settings menu. If you have questions about how to change your device permissions on devices manufactured by third parties, we recommend you contact your mobile service carrier or your device manufacturer.
If you are a seller, you can add or update certain information in
Seller Central
, update your account information by accessing your
Seller Account Information
, and adjust your e-mail or other communications you receive from us by updating your
Notification Preferences
.
Back to Top
Are Children Allowed to Use Amazon Services ?
Amazon does not sell products for purchase by children. We sell children's products for purchase by adults. If you are under the age of 18 years, you may use Amazon Services only with the involvement of a parent or guardian.
Back to Top
Conditions of Use, Notices , and Revisions
If you choose to use Amazon Services, your use and any dispute over privacy is subject to this Notice and our
Conditions of Use
, including limitations on damages, resolution of disputes, and application of the prevailing law in India. If you have any concern about privacy at Amazon, please
contact us
with a thorough description, and we will try to resolve it. Our business changes constantly, and our Privacy Notice will change also. You should check our websites frequently to see recent changes.
Unless stated otherwise, our current Privacy Notice applies to all information that we have about you and your account. We stand behind the promises we make, however, and will never materially change our policies and practices to make them less protective of customer information collected in the past without the consent of affected customers.
Back to Top
Related Practices and Information
Conditions of Use
Seller Program Policies
Help Department
Most Recent Purchases
Your Profile and Community Guidelines
Examples of Information Collected
Information You Give Us When You Use Amazon Services
You provide information to us when you:
search or shop for products or services in our marketplace;
add or remove an item from your cart, or place an order through or use Amazon Services;
download, stream, view, or use content on a device or through a service or application on a device;
provide information in
Your Account
(and you might have more than one if you have used more than one e-mail address or mobile number when shopping with us) or
Your Profile
;
talk to or otherwise interact with our Alexa Voice service;
upload your contacts, including access to mobile device contacts for certain services;
configure your settings on, provide data access permissions for, or interact with an Amazon device or service;
provide information in your Seller Account, Restaurant Central Account, Service Provider Account, or any other account we make available that allows you to develop or offer software, goods, or services to Amazon customers;
offer your products or services on or through Amazon Services;
communicate with us by phone, e-mail, or otherwise;
complete a questionnaire, a support ticket, or a contest entry form;
upload or stream images, videos or audio or other files while using Amazon Services;
use our services such as Prime Video;
compile Playlists, Watchlists,
Wish Lists
or other gift registries;
participate in Discussion Boards or other community features;
provide and rate
Reviews
;
specify a Special Occasion Reminder; or
employ Product Availability Alerts, such as Available to Order Notifications.
As a result of those actions, you might supply us with such information as:
identifying information such as your name, address and phone numbers;
payment information;
your age;
your location information;
your IP address;
people, addresses and phone numbers listed in your Addresses;
e-mail addresses of your friends and other people;
content of reviews and e-mails to us;
the personal description and photograph in
Your Profile
;
voice recordings when you speak to Alexa;
images, videos and other content collected or stored in connection with Amazon Services;
information and officially valid documents regarding identity and address information, including PAN numbers;
credit history information;
corporate and financial information; and
device log files and configurations, including Wi-Fi credentials, if you choose to automatically synchronize them with your other Amazon devices.
Automatic Information
Examples of the information we collect and analyze include:
the internet protocol (IP) address used to connect your computer to the internet;
login, e-mail address, and password;
the location of your device or computer;
content interaction information, such as content downloads, streams, and playback details, including duration and number of simultaneous streams and downloads, and network details for streaming and download quality, including information about your internet service provider;
device metrics such as when a device is in use, application usage, connectivity data, and any errors or event failures;
Amazon Services metrics (e.g., the occurrences of technical errors, your interactions with service features and content, your settings preferences and backup information, location of your device running an application, information about uploaded images and files such as the file name, dates, times and location of your images);
version and time zone settings;
purchase and content use history, which we sometimes aggregate with similar information from other customers to create features like
Amazon Bestsellers
;
the full Uniform Resource Locator (URL) clickstream to, through, and from our websites, including date and time; products and content you viewed or searched for; page response times, download errors, length of visits to certain pages, and page interaction information (such as scrolling, clicks, and mouse-overs);
phone numbers used to call our customer service number; and
images or videos when you shop in our marketplace using Amazon Services.
We may also use device identifiers, cookies, and other technologies on devices, applications, and our web pages to collect browsing, usage, or other technical information.
Information from Other Sources
Examples of information we receive from other sources include:
updated delivery and address information from our carriers or other third parties, which we use to correct our records and deliver your next purchase or communication more easily;
account information, purchase or redemption information and page-view information from some merchants with which we operate co-branded businesses or for which we provide technical, fulfillment, advertising or other services;
information about your interactions with products and services offered by our affiliates;
search results and links, including paid listings (such as Sponsored Links);
information about internet-connected devices and services linked with Alexa; and
credit history information from credit bureaus, which we use to help prevent and detect fraud and to offer certain credit or financial services to some customers.
Information You Can Access
Examples of information you can access through Amazon Services include:
status of recent orders (including subscriptions);
your complete order history;
personally identifiable information (including name, e-mail, password, and address book);
payment settings (including payment method information, promotional certificate, and gift card balances and 1-Click settings);
e-mail notification settings (including Product Availability Alerts, Delivers, Special Occasion Reminders and newsletters);
recommendations and the products you recently viewed that are the basis for recommendations (including Recommended for You and Improve Your Recommendations);
shopping lists and gift registries (including Wish Lists);
your content, devices, services, and related settings, and communications and personalized advertising preferences;
content that you recently viewed;
voice recordings associated with your account;
Your Profile (including your product Reviews, Recommendations, Reminders and personal profile);
If you are a seller, you can access your account and other information, and adjust your communications preferences, by updating your account in
Seller Central
.
If you are a restaurant, you can access your account and other information, and adjust your communication preferences, by updating your account in Restaurant Central;
If you are a service provider listing on our Service Provider Network, you can access your account and other information, and adjust your communication preferences, by updating your account in Service Provider Central;

EMAIL DELIVERY ONLY: Download your extended warranty certificate by sharing your device details. The link is available under buyer/seller messages at www.amazon.in/msg and is also sent to your Amazon registered email ID
REPAIR OR REPLACEMENT GUARANTEE: We will either repair your device or give a replacement. The replacement device will be provided at the discretion of Onsitego on the basis of the depreciated value of your device
HASSLE-FREE SERVICE: ‘No Questions Asked’ Repair Policy | Zero-Paperwork Claims Process | Free Pick & Drop or At-Home Service
LIMIT OF LIABILITY: Onsitego liability is limited to the depreciated value of the device as detailed in our T&C document
HIGH-QUALITY REPAIRS: Service by Onsitego authorised service engineers with high-quality spare parts every single time.
EASY TO REQUEST SERVICE: Download the Onsitego app to raise a repair request within 10 seconds or visit our website. You can also call us or chat with us on 99205 99206
COVERAGE: The plan covers all defects & malfunctions under the original manufacturer’s warranty. The plan starts the day after the manufacturer’s warranty ends or on the 366th day from the date of device purchase, whichever is later. It does not cover physical or liquid damage, accessories, preventive maintenance or consumables. It also does not cover parts that are not covered under the standard manufacturer’s warranty
ELIGIBILITY: The plan can be purchased only for new devices bought on the Amazon platform and WITHIN 30 days of device purchase or before the expiration of the manufacturer's warranty, whichever occurs first. You can purchase this plan only for devices that have AT LEAST 1 Authorised Service Centre anywhere in India. The sum of the manufacturer’s warranty and extended warranty CANNOT EXCEED 5 YEARS. This plan does not cover products or devices purchased or used for COMMERCIAL purposes

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Customers say
Customers find the mosquito racquet highly effective at instantly killing mosquitoes, with a rechargeable battery that lasts a long time. The racquet is easy to handle and swing, with a sturdy build that holds power for several days, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. Customers appreciate its lightweight design and consider it worth its price, noting its usefulness during mosquito season.

Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
The Mortien Advanced Anti-Mosquito Racquet is a highly efficient and user-friendly solution for dealing with mosquitoes at home. Its sturdy build and lightweight design make it comfortable to handle for extended use.
One of the standout features is its advanced lithium-ion battery, which not only lasts longer but also charges faster compared to regular mosquito rackets. The quick charging feature is especially useful for daily use. Additionally, the strong LED light helps in spotting mosquitoes even in low-light conditions.
The racquet delivers instant kill performance, making it very effective against mosquitoes and small insects. Safety is also well taken care of, with a well-designed mesh that prevents accidental shocks during use.
Overall, this product offers great value for money with its reliable performance, fast charging, and durable battery life. It’s a must-have for every household, especially during mosquito season.

Haresh
4 out of 5 stars
Good product, but delivery issue
Reviewed in India on 3 May 2026
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
I ordered the Mortein Advanced Anti-Mosquito Racquet and the product itself is good and works fine. It’s effective for killing mosquitoes instantly and feels worth the price. The build quality is decent and overall it’s a budget-friendly option.
However, I had an issue with delivery. The status showed “delivered” but I hadn’t actually received the product. After raising a complaint on the Amazon app, I finally got it after 2 days.
Also, note that the package includes a Type-C charging cable only, not the charger, so you’ll need your own adapter.
Pros:
✔ Works well
✔ Budget-friendly
✔ Type-C charging
Cons:
✘ Wrong delivery status initially
✘ No charger included
Overall, a good product but delivery experience could be better.

About this item
5 Pcs Necklace Combo: Package contains 5 Infinity Butterfly Pearl couple Necklaces. Each necklace has its own style. Simple and beautiful. These stylish necklaces will show your nobility.
Gifts: These latest stylish western chain necklaces are popular with girls and women, you can give the necklace as a gift for your wife, girlfriend, mother on special occasions, they will also love these chain pendant necklaces.
Occasion: You can choose different necklaces of different styles as accessories according to your different outfits. These Necklaces are perfect for birthdays, holidays, beach parties, festivals and more.
Quality : Made from premium quality alloy material that makes it skin friendly and rust resistant. Its high quality construction lets it to retain its quality and shine for years to come.
Shining diva is a well known brand across fashion jewellery sector shining diva products are preferred by many designers, stars and celebrities shining diva fashion jewelry believes in making beauty and fashion a part of everybody's life

Product description
Gifts For Girls, Girlfriend. Shining Diva presents this premium quality 5 pcs Chain Pendant Necklace Jewellery Combo. Stylish Fancy Party Wear Pendent Necklace for Women and Girls. This combo necklace set for women can be used as daily wear or party wear. Shining Diva products are stylish and funky. This gold plated necklace for girls fashion party wear jewellery combo of 5 chain pendant neck piece are studded with crystals stones. Shining Diva has huge collection of latest charm bracelets and modern statement necklace and traditional necklace jewellery set accessories which includes fancy bangles for women traditional, wedding bangals, cuff, traditional kada, choker necklace for girls and jhumka jhumki studs tops traditional earrings. Shining Diva is pioneer of Imitation jewellery and designer crystal pendant necklace, pearl and american diamond hangings Ear Rings. Shining Diva Fashion and Traditional jewelry give true value for your money. Buy Shining Diva trendy, artificial jewellery from Amazon in offer. These are also ideal for rakhi, birthday gifts for girls, girlfriend, wedding gifts and anniversary gifts.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the necklace set beautiful and suitable for gifting, particularly as pendants for young girls. However, the product receives mixed feedback about its quality and value for money. Moreover, durability is a significant concern, with customers reporting that the color fades to black and the necklace doesn't last long. Additionally, several customers mention issues with missing parts.

About this Item
5 Pcs Necklace Combo: Package contains 5 Infinity Butterfly Pearl couple Necklaces. Each necklace has its own style. Simple and beautiful. These stylish necklaces will show your nobility.
Gifts: These latest stylish western chain necklaces are popular with girls and women, you can give the necklace as a gift for your wife, girlfriend, mother on special occasions, they will also love these chain pendant necklaces.
Occasion: You can choose different necklaces of different styles as accessories according to your different outfits. These Necklaces are perfect for birthdays, holidays, beach parties, festivals and more.
Quality : Made from premium quality alloy material that makes it skin friendly and rust resistant. Its high quality construction lets it to retain its quality and shine for years to come.
Shining diva is a well known brand across fashion jewellery sector shining diva products are preferred by many designers, stars and celebrities shining diva fashion jewelry believes in making beauty and fashion a part of everybody's life
Product description
Gifts For Girls, Girlfriend. Shining Diva presents this premium quality 5 pcs Chain Pendant Necklace Jewellery Combo. Stylish Fancy Party Wear Pendent Necklace for Women and Girls. This combo necklace set for women can be used as daily wear or party wear. Shining Diva products are stylish and funky. This gold plated necklace for girls fashion party wear jewellery combo of 5 chain pendant neck piece are studded with crystals stones. Shining Diva has huge collection of latest charm bracelets and modern statement necklace and traditional necklace jewellery set accessories which includes fancy bangles for women traditional, wedding bangals, cuff, traditional kada, choker necklace for girls and jhumka jhumki studs tops traditional earrings. Shining Diva is pioneer of Imitation jewellery and designer crystal pendant necklace, pearl and american diamond hangings Ear Rings. Shining Diva Fashion and Traditional jewelry give true value for your money. Buy Shining Diva trendy, artificial jewellery from Amazon in offer. These are also ideal for rakhi, birthday gifts for girls, girlfriend, wedding gifts and anniversary gifts.

Leading Brands
The Beauty Store at Amazon.in
Welcome to the Amazon.in Beauty Store. Our large assortment of products ranges from make-up, skin care, hair care, Men's grooming, nails and bath & shower to perfumes & colognes, as well as tools & accessories for personal grooming. Whether you want to explore the latest trends in beauty this season, or find everyday beauty essentials, this is a one stop solution to looking your best. Save yourself from the sun with sun protection products; find the perfect look for a special occasion with make-up and hair styling tools; pick the best in Fragrances for gifting - we hope to make online shopping for Beauty products simpler for you. For those who like natural products, we have a special store with herbal, ayurvedic and organic selections. Shop from  leading brands like Lakme, Revlon, Maybelline, L`Oreal Paris, Colorbar, Lotus Herbals, Nivea, Olay, Dove, Garnier Skin, Pantene, Neutrogena, Vaseline, Sugar cosmetics, Wow, Mamaearth, mCaffeine, The body shop, Head and Shoulders, Sunsilk, and Biotique in one convenient place.

Everyday beauty products, whether you are a man or a woman are of utmost importance in order to face the world with confidence and put your best foot forward. About this item
SIGNIFICANCE: Blocks mosquitoes while allowing fresh air and a cool breeze through the doors. Get your door screens soon to reduce the risk of mosquito-borne diseases like dengue and malaria. Keep your child undisturbed!
MADE WITH: High-quality polyester (80 GSM). Velcro is fully sewn into the mesh, and the self-adhesive hook tape comes with strong glue. All necessary hardware is included.
CONVENIENCE: Features magnets sewn into the mesh for automatic closing and easy opening. Pets and toddlers can pass through effortlessly.
INCLUDES STRAPS: We also provide adjustable straps to help keep the net securely rolled up when not in use, offering added flexibility.
EASY FIT, RIGHT SIZE: Suitable for doors up to 200 cm (Height) x 100 cm (Width). Please measure your door frame before ordering to ensure a perfect fit and effective insect blocking.

From the brand
Welcome to Lifekrafts
where innovation and quality meet!
Product quality is our top priority at Lifekrafts.
Previous page
At Lifekrafts, we developed premium mosquito nets to prevent pesky bugs from interrupting quality time at home. Our user-friendly products fit seamlessly into your living area, providing protection and refuge. With LifeKrafts, your kids can play freely, and pets roam freely indoors and outdoors. Enjoy time at home in a safe, secure environment. Lifekrafts ensures you can relax and live comfortably,free from the worry of mosquitoes and other bugs.
New Launches
Magnetic Mosquito Net For Door
Modern Patterns, Smart Choice
AC Curtains
Window Mosquito Net
Door Mosquito Nets
Baby Mosquito Net
Visit the Store
Home Protected, Corner to Bed
Customization Available
Bulk Window Mosquito Net Roll
Newly Released Fly Traps
Why Choose Lifekrafts?
1. Innovative Design: Our magnetic door net features a unique, user-friendly design that allows for hands-free accessibility, ensuring a seamless experience for you and your loved ones.
2. Premium Materials: We use high-quality materials, such as heavy-duty mesh and fiberglass, Polyester to ensure durability and longevity, keeping your home protected season after season.
3. Great Customer Engagement team: We have an outstanding team available 7 days a week, from 9 am to 9 pm, to help you with any questions about LifeKrafts products, Measurements, installations,or our brand.

INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE
ALL TYPES OF DOORS
1. On what types of door frames (wooden, granite, Etc..) can I use this product?
LifeKrafts Door net comes with premium quality adhesive. It can be used on wooden, UPVC, granite and marble surfaces. We do not recommend on non-smooth walls, cement walls, and textured surfaces.
2. Does it keep other intruders like lizards, cockroaches, etc.?
The Lifekrafts door net can block most types of Mosquitoes, bugs, spiders, lizards, etc.
3.How can I get help with queries on measurement, installation, and other details?
For any questions related to product selection, measurement, or installation, feel free to call or WhatsApp 6364 8364 04. The team is helpful and responsive.
4.Do you have nets for windows also?
We have multiple Window Net options. We recommend seeing our Lifekrafts store page for Window Net collection or please call or WhatsApp 6364 8364 02.
5.Can I get custom-size nets?
Absolutely! Explore our custom-size nets page, for more info on options, costs, and ordering. For more details Reach us at 636 483 6404

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the mosquito net to be of good quality, easy to install, and worth the cost, with one noting it's an inexpensive alternative to mesh doors. The net effectively reduces mosquito population by 95% and provides a perfect fit, particularly on aluminum frames. While the magnetic mechanism works well, some customers report issues with magnets not aligning appropriately.

Worth the money spent!
Reviewed in India on 7 June 2026
Size: 210*95 cm
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
The quality is decent and the installation manual is easy to.understand. The sticky tape is of good strength, but while peeling, most of the time a part of paper keeps sticking to the tape and hampers the smooth installation. The groove stich quality is strong enough to hold on to the screen. The thickness of the mesh could be a bit better, need to see how it withstands on the longer run. The magnets works well and strong enough to hold the screens together on a strong wind.
Note: Always take measurement of the inner diameter while ordering.

Product Summary: LifeKrafts Polyester Magnetic Mosquito Net for All Door Types & Sizes, Auto-Closing Insect Screen/Curtain to Keep Mosquito & Flies Out, (200x100 cm) Brown
From Lifekrafts
4.4 out of 5 stars, 20,025 ratings
Customer reviews
500+ bought in past week
Price
One-time purchase: ₹899.00
40% Savings
List Price:
₹1,499.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
SIGNIFICANCE: Blocks mosquitoes while allowing fresh air and a cool breeze through the doors. Get your door screens soon to reduce the risk of mosquito-borne diseases like dengue and malaria. Keep your child undisturbed!
MADE WITH: High-quality polyester (80 GSM). Velcro is fully sewn into the mesh, and the self-adhesive hook tape comes with strong glue. All necessary hardware is included.
CONVENIENCE: Features magnets sewn into the mesh for automatic closing and easy opening. Pets and toddlers can pass through effortlessly.
INCLUDES STRAPS: We also provide adjustable straps to help keep the net securely rolled up when not in use, offering added flexibility.
EASY FIT, RIGHT SIZE: Suitable for doors up to 200 cm (Height) x 100 cm (Width). Please measure your door frame before ordering to ensure a perfect fit and effective insect blocking.
Product description
This is an innovative screen door to keep your family from annoying mosquitos, flies and insects. Package includes 1. Magnetic screen mesh 200*100 (28 Magnets Sewn in) 2. Self-adhesive velcro 3. Push pins 4. Instruction set. ***** Before you - 1. Please measure you door size and correct size net, request you to measure your door frame before, please don't the one which is smaller than your door frame. #2 Please do not this if you have a metal door, the magnetic may stick to the door and won't close.

About this item
Lightweight & Breathable : Exclusive design and durable materials every step feels light and breezy. Breathable, free-moving fabrics which adjust according to your foot and creates an astoundingly easy-going experience.
Non Slip & Shockproof : Great engineering strikes a balance in style, made in the potent design and latest fashion trends. Made for long-term wear, with extra emphasis on providing cushion to the feet, removing heel strain.
Comfort Sole & Flexible Walk : The outsoles are made by an air cushion, doubling the effect of shock absorption. Besides, these shoes perform excellent in durability and are also slip resistant. It provides push cushioning comfort for foot pain relief and helps relieve pressure while conforming to your every step

From the manufacturer
Asian Shoes Wonder 13 Men's Sports Shoes
Asian Shoes are for regular comfort wear. The body of this shoe is in a neutral grey colour with light blue accents. The upper material keeps air circulation while moderated ankles take full care of your feet when you go out for running.
Made for comfort
This Asian Sports shoe is made with an outer mesh material for superior comfort and ventilation.
Firm fit
The Lace-Up enclosure ensures a firm fit while still being comfortable while you are playing or on a day out.
Care Instructions:
Allow your pair of shoes to air and de-odorize at a regular basis, this also helps them retain their natural shape and stay fresh.
From the brand
Previous page
Asian Footwears is one of India's top footwear brands. We believe that putting on the right pair of shoes can make every step feel amazing. Our collection is designed to make you feel like you're walking on air, giving you the confidence to take on any challenge. Since 1994, we've been dedicated to creating high-quality shoes that are comfortable, stylish, and durable. Go Chase your perfect pair!
Why Asian Footwears?
Our shoes combine style, comfort and quality, giving you the confidence to tackle anything. Choose Asian Footwears and experience the extraordinary.
What makes our products unique?
At Asian Footwears, we create shoes that mix the latest technology with trendy designs. Stand out with our unique styles.
Are our products of high quality?
Yes, we focus on top quality. Each pair of Asian Footwears is carefully made and tested to ensure you get great comfort and lasting durability.
