Product description
Lightweight & Breathable :
Exclusive design and durable materials every step feels light and breezy. Breathable, free-moving fabrics which adjust according to your foot and creates an astoundingly easy-going experience.
Non Slip & Shockproof :
Great engineering strikes a balance in style, made in the potent design and latest fashion trends. Made for long-term wear, with extra emphasis on providing cushion to the feet, removing heel strain.
Comfort Sole & Flexible Walk :
The outsoles are made by an air cushion, doubling the effect of shock absorption. Besides, these shoes perform excellent in durability and are also slip resistant. It provides push cushioning comfort for foot pain relief and helps relieve pressure while conforming to your every step

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find these running shoes comfortable, lightweight, and well-designed, particularly suitable for jogging and gym activities. They appreciate the good fit and value for money. The durability receives mixed feedback - while some find them quite durable, others report them tearing within a month of use.

Amazon Customer
5 out of 5 stars
Review after 3.5 years of heavy usage!
Initial Review (after 8 months of use) This has been one of the best “Low Priced High Quality” products I’ve purchased. Pros: 1. The styling is exceptional. It’s designed so aggressively, and the color combination is so appealing. The blue stripes add to the styling and give it a sporty character. 2. The materials used are EXTREMELY COMFORTABLE! I wear this primarily for walking/jogging, which is what it’s meant for. It has sufficient amount of padding to keep your feet comfortable even for long walks & runs. 3. The price is unbelievable. I got it for ₹650 and it’s honestly worth much more than that. 4. The sole provides excellent amount of grip. They’re also made of good material, and even after 8 months of heavy usage, they haven’t faded or lost their grip. 5. The shoes are EXTREMELY LIGHT WEIGHT! This is how shoes should be, when you use it for walking, jogging or similar purposes. They don’t weigh you down. My previous ‘walking shoe’ was quite heavy and it would cause my ankles to start hurting after 40 minutes of using. This one is light weight and hence provides ample amount of comfort. 6. The length of shoe lace provided is sufficient. I have shoes, including premium shoes, which don’t have a proper length of lace and it’s very irritating. I’m happy that this has a proper length. 7. The stitching used is excellent. They’re stitched in prime places where required. And even the stitching thread color is in contrast to the body color, which adds to the styling! 8. One of the common places where shoes wear out after a while of usage is the part where the sole is glued towards the front-most part of the shoe. This is where most shoes ‘open up’ like its mouth is open, and you have to either get it stitched/glued back or throw it away. However, the glue used and the way it’s stuck in this shoe is unbelievable. It has not come apart even a bit. Though I wouldn’t advice it, I have played soccer and other games with this sometimes, and even then, this hasn’t taken any damage. 9. Most shoes are prone to ‘stinking’ after using it for a long time. The sweat and stink from your socks get transferred and remain in the shoe. However, this one has good ventilation, and also the materials used don’t absorb the stink. Hence it remains stink-free most of the times! (It happens mainly because the shoe isn’t majorly made up of cotton or similar items. It’s mostly synthetic materials) 10. The size mentioned is perfect. I wear size 11, I purchased the same and it fits perfectly. With most other shoes, you need to buy “Your Size + 1”, but that’s not necessary here. 11. Though it’s not specified anywhere, and though I don’t think it’s waterproof, I have due to unavoidable circumstances, ended up wearing these in rainy and water-prone conditions. Even so, the shoes have not taken ANY damage. I wouldn’t recommend it to be used in water, but if you do end up using it, it won’t take any, or much damage. Cons: I honestly have NO complaints whatsoever, not even small discomforts. It’s surprising to me. Conclusion: I would DEFINITELY recommend this shoe to anyone looking to buy shoes for walking, running and casual purposes. Please don’t use this for sports and games, this is not meant for such usage. These are light weight shoes meant for regular usage of walking and similar activities. I have continuously used these shoes for 8 months for everyday walking, jogging and sometimes outdoor gaming. I have not faced ANY problems yet, and according to me, this has already lasted long enough for something that I paid ₹650. I am extremely happy with the product and would recommend you to get it. ↗️Update after 1.5 years: Shoes are still the same and no damages yet. Have bought another pair for my Dad. ↗️Update after 3.5 years (March 2022): Shoes are still going strong. Some amount of natural wear & tear. I’ve recommended this shoe to 20+ people who have all bought it and appreciated the quality you get for this price. 🔴 Final Update November 2025 🔴 The shoe finally tore. A few months back, I had replaced the sole with a soft sole from Decathlon. However, the outside edges and mesh tore due to heavy use for many years. Also, since 2 years, I did not use it much and was using a different shoe for regular use. However, this shoe has been one of the best value-for-money purchases. Definitely recommended. Goodbye, shoes.

Sivachandran
4 out of 5 stars
Best for running and sports
Reviewed in India on 4 March 2026
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
The ASIAN Men's Wonder-13 Sports Running Shoes are a great option for daily wear and light workouts. The design looks modern and sporty, which makes it suitable for both running and casual use. The shoes feel lightweight and comfortable even after wearing them for long hours.
The cushioning is decent and provides good support while walking or jogging. The sole has a good grip, and the breathable material helps keep the feet cool. The quality feels good for the price, making it a value-for-money product.
Overall, these shoes are a good choice if you are looking for comfortable, stylish, and budget-friendly running shoes for everyday use.
Pros: ✔ Lightweight and comfortable
✔ Stylish sporty design
✔ Good grip and cushioning
✔ Value for money
Cons: ✔ Not ideal for very intense sports activities

Ganesh Hegde
5 out of 5 stars
Review after 3.5 years of heavy usage!
Reviewed in India on 12 March 2019
Size: 11 UK
Colour: GREEN GREY
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
Initial Review (after 8 months of use)
This has been one of the best “Low Priced High Quality” products I’ve purchased.
Pros:
1. The styling is exceptional. It’s designed so aggressively, and the color combination is so appealing. The blue stripes add to the styling and give it a sporty character.
2. The materials used are EXTREMELY COMFORTABLE! I wear this primarily for walking/jogging, which is what it’s meant for. It has sufficient amount of padding to keep your feet comfortable even for long walks & runs.
3. The price is unbelievable. I got it for ₹650 and it’s honestly worth much more than that.
4. The sole provides excellent amount of grip. They’re also made of good material, and even after 8 months of heavy usage, they haven’t faded or lost their grip.
5. The shoes are EXTREMELY LIGHT WEIGHT! This is how shoes should be, when you use it for walking, jogging or similar purposes. They don’t weigh you down. My previous ‘walking shoe’ was quite heavy and it would cause my ankles to start hurting after 40 minutes of using. This one is light weight and hence provides ample amount of comfort.
6. The length of shoe lace provided is sufficient. I have shoes, including premium shoes, which don’t have a proper length of lace and it’s very irritating. I’m happy that this has a proper length.
7. The stitching used is excellent. They’re stitched in prime places where required. And even the stitching thread color is in contrast to the body color, which adds to the styling!
8. One of the common places where shoes wear out after a while of usage is the part where the sole is glued towards the front-most part of the shoe. This is where most shoes ‘open up’ like its mouth is open, and you have to either get it stitched/glued back or throw it away. However, the glue used and the way it’s stuck in this shoe is unbelievable. It has not come apart even a bit. Though I wouldn’t advice it, I have played soccer and other games with this sometimes, and even then, this hasn’t taken any damage.
9. Most shoes are prone to ‘stinking’ after using it for a long time. The sweat and stink from your socks get transferred and remain in the shoe. However, this one has good ventilation, and also the materials used don’t absorb the stink. Hence it remains stink-free most of the times! (It happens mainly because the shoe isn’t majorly made up of cotton or similar items. It’s mostly synthetic materials)
10. The size mentioned is perfect. I wear size 11, I purchased the same and it fits perfectly. With most other shoes, you need to buy “Your Size + 1”, but that’s not necessary here.
11. Though it’s not specified anywhere, and though I don’t think it’s waterproof, I have due to unavoidable circumstances, ended up wearing these in rainy and water-prone conditions. Even so, the shoes have not taken ANY damage. I wouldn’t recommend it to be used in water, but if you do end up using it, it won’t take any, or much damage.
Cons: I honestly have NO complaints whatsoever, not even small discomforts. It’s surprising to me.
Conclusion:
I would DEFINITELY recommend this shoe to anyone looking to buy shoes for walking, running and casual purposes. Please don’t use this for sports and games, this is not meant for such usage. These are light weight shoes meant for regular usage of walking and similar activities. I have continuously used these shoes for 8 months for everyday walking, jogging and sometimes outdoor gaming. I have not faced ANY problems yet, and according to me, this has already lasted long enough for something that I paid ₹650. I am extremely happy with the product and would recommend you to get it.
↗️Update after 1.5 years:
Shoes are still the same and no damages yet. Have bought another pair for my Dad.
↗️Update after 3.5 years (March 2022):
Shoes are still going strong. Some amount of natural wear & tear. I’ve recommended this shoe to 20+ people who have all bought it and appreciated the quality you get for this price.
🔴 Final Update November 2025 🔴
The shoe finally tore. A few months back, I had replaced the sole with a soft sole from Decathlon. However, the outside edges and mesh tore due to heavy use for many years. Also, since 2 years, I did not use it much and was using a different shoe for regular use. However, this shoe has been one of the best value-for-money purchases. Definitely recommended. Goodbye, shoes.

↗️Update after 1.5 years:

🔴 Final Update November 2025 🔴
The shoe finally tore. A few months back, I had replaced the sole with a soft sole from Decathlon. However, the outside edges and mesh tore due to heavy use for many years. From ASIAN

₹999.00

Other sellers
About this Item
Lightweight & Breathable : Exclusive design and durable materials every step feels light and breezy. Breathable, free-moving fabrics which adjust according to your foot and creates an astoundingly easy-going experience.
Non Slip & Shockproof : Great engineering strikes a balance in style, made in the potent design and latest fashion trends. Made for long-term wear, with extra emphasis on providing cushion to the feet, removing heel strain.
Comfort Sole & Flexible Walk : The outsoles are made by an air cushion, doubling the effect of shock absorption. Besides, these shoes perform excellent in durability and are also slip resistant. It provides push cushioning comfort for foot pain relief and helps relieve pressure while conforming to your every step
Product description
Lightweight & Breathable : 
 Exclusive design and durable materials every step feels light and breezy. Breathable, free-moving fabrics which adjust according to your foot and creates an astoundingly easy-going experience. 

  Non Slip & Shockproof :  
 Great engineering strikes a balance in style, made in the potent design and latest fashion trends. Made for long-term wear, with extra emphasis on providing cushion to the feet, removing heel strain. 

  Comfort Sole & Flexible Walk :  
 The outsoles are made by an air cushion, doubling the effect of shock absorption. Besides, these shoes perform excellent in durability and are also slip resistant. It provides push cushioning comfort for foot pain relief and helps relieve pressure while conforming to your every step

More About Video Games at Amazon.in
The Amazon.in Video Games Store is the one stop shop for all your gaming needs.
Shop online
for hundreds of games at great prices in various gaming platforms including PlayStation 4, PlayStation 3, Xbox 360, Nintendo Wii and Wii U, Nintendo 3DS, PlayStation Vita and much more.
Head to the Pre-orders and New Releases section for the latest in games, consoles and accessories. Explore games across genres such as Action & Shooter, Sports, Racing, Music & Dancing, Strategy and Simulation. Amazon.in also offers you recommendations based on your browsing and buying history. You can read customer reviews for new arrivals, bestsellers and legacy games and review your favourite ones too. www.amazon.in/gp/help/contact-us
Conditions of Use
Conditions of Sale
Please read these conditions carefully before using the Amazon.in website. By using
            the Amazon.in website, you signify your agreement to be bound by these conditions.
In addition, when you use any current or future Amazon.in service (eg. Wish List or
            Marketplace) ("Amazon Service"), you will also be subject to the terms, guidelines
            and conditions applicable to that Amazon Service. ("Terms"). If these Conditions of
            Use are inconsistent with such Terms, the Terms will control.
These "Conditions of Use" constitute an electronic record within the meaning of the

            not require any physical or digital signatures.

Conditions Relating to Your Use of Amazon.in
Your Account
If you use the website, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of
                     your account and password and for restricting access to your computer to prevent unauthorised
                     access to your account. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that
                     occur under your account or password. You should take all necessary steps to ensure
                     that the password is kept confidential and secure and should inform us immediately
                     if you have any reason to believe that your password has become known to anyone else,
                     or if the password is being, or is likely to be, used in an unauthorised manner. Please
                     ensure that the details you provide us with are correct and complete and inform us
                     immediately of any changes to the information that you provided when registering.
                     You can access and update much of the information you provided us with in the
Your Account
Your Account (https://www.amazon.in/gp/css/homepage.html/youraccount) area of the
                     website. You agree and acknowledge that you will use your account on the website to
                     purchase products only for your personal use and not for business purposes. Should
                     you wish to order products for business purposes, please create a business account
                     on
Amazon.in/business
Amazon.in/business. Amazon.in reserves the right to refuse access to the website,
                     terminate accounts, remove or edit content at any time without notice to you.
Back to top
Privacy
Please review our
Privacy Notice
, which also governs your visit
                     to Amazon.in, to understand our practices. The personal information / data provided
                     to us by you during the course of usage of Amazon.in will be treated as strictly confidential
                     and in accordance with the Privacy Notice and applicable laws and regulations. If
                     you object to your information being transferred or used, please do not use the website.
Back to top
E-Platform for Communication
You agree, understand and acknowledge that the website is an online platform that
                     enables you to purchase products listed on the website at the price indicated therein
                     at any time from any location. You further agree and acknowledge that Amazon is only
                     a facilitator and is not and cannot be a party to or control in any manner any transactions
                     on the website. Accordingly, the contract of sale of products on the website shall
                     be a strictly bipartite contract between you and the sellers on Amazon.in.
Back to top
Access to Amazon.in
We will do our utmost to ensure that availability of the website will be uninterrupted
                     and that transmissions will be error-free. However, due to the nature of the Internet,
                     this cannot be guaranteed. Also, your access to the website may also be occasionally
                     suspended or restricted to allow for repairs, maintenance, or the introduction of
                     new facilities or services at any time without prior notice. We will attempt to limit
                     the frequency and duration of any such suspension or restriction.
Back to top

This website or any portion of this website (including but not limited to any copyrighted

You may not frame or use framing techniques to enclose any trademark, logo, or other

for fraudulent purposes, or in connection with a criminal offense or other unlawful

to send, use or reuse any material that does not belong to you; or is illegal, is

to deceive or mislead the addressee about the origin of messages.

importer and the guarantees related to the authenticity or genuineness of the imported

guarantees or warranties applicable to such goods or services. .Further, all contractual

here
. Because Amazon.in lists millions of products for sale offered by sellers on the

Children
Use of Amazon.in is available only to persons who can form a legally binding contract
                     under the Indian Contract Act, 1872. If you are a minor i.e. under the age of 18 years,

Other Businesses
Parties other than Amazon Seller Services Private Limited and its affiliates may
                     operate stores, provide services, or sell product lines on Amazon.in. For example,
                     businesses and individuals offer products via Marketplace. In addition, we provide

Communications
When you visit Amazon.in, you are communicating with us electronically. You will
                     be required to provide a valid phone number while placing an order with us. We may
                     communicate with you by e-mail, SMS, phone call or by posting notices on the website
                     or by any other mode of communication. For contractual purposes, you consent to receive
                     communications (including transactional, promotional and/or commercial messages),

Losses

Alteration of Service or Amendments to the Conditions

                     at the time that you use the website or that you order goods from us, unless any change
                     to those policies or these conditions is required to be made by law or government

Notice and Procedure for Making Claims of Right Infringements
If you believe that your rights are being infringed, you may fill out and submit the
Notice Form
Notice Form (https://www.amazon.in/report/infringement). We respond expeditiously
            to rights owners and their agents who complete and submit the Notice Form to communicate
            concerns about any alleged infringement.
Upon receipt of a Notice Form we may take certain actions, including removing information
            or an item, all of which are taken without any admission as to liability and without
            prejudice to any rights, remedies or defenses, all of which are expressly reserved.
            Furthermore, in submitting a Notice Form, you grant to Amazon the right to use, reproduce,
            modify, adapt, publish, translate, create derivative works from, and display its content
            throughout the world in any media. This includes forwarding the Notice Form to the
            parties involved in the provision of the allegedly infringing content. You agree to
            indemnify Amazon for all claims brought by a third party against Amazon arising out
            of or in connection with the submission of a Notice Form.
Note on Third Party Seller Listings: Please keep in mind that Third Party Seller listings
            are merely hosted on Amazon.in and are posted solely at the direction of Third Party
            Sellers who may be contacted via their "Seller Information" page, accessible from
            any of their listings.
ASIN and ISBN-10, Defined: "ASIN" stands for Amazon Standard Item (or Identification)
            Number and is a ten (10) character identifier. It can be found below any listing under
            "Product Details". "ISBN-10" stands for International Standard Book Number and is
            a ten (10) digit identifier that can be found on some book listings under "Product
            Details".
Important Warning: giving false, misleading or inaccurate information in the Notice
            Form to Amazon may result in civil and/or criminal liability. You should contact a
            legal advisor should you have any questions.
Back to top

            can be sent via E-mail PDF or Fax to the Grievance Officer:
Name:

.

Back to top
Notice Form
Re: www.Amazon.in
I, [INSERT FULL NAME AND TITLE ] of [COMPANY NAME, IF APPLICABLE] , state as follows:
Contact information
: (a) Your and/ or your company's name, address, telephone number and contact email
                        address; (b)The contact email address and/or name which we will provide to Third Party
                        Sellers (if relevant) so they may contact you to resolve any issues regarding your
                        notification to us. If you do not provide a separate contact email, you authorize
                        us to use the contact information you provide in (1)(a).
Listing's ASIN (or ISBN-13 if applicable) and Allegation of Infringed Right:
(a) The listing's ASIN/ISBN-13 number or detailed description of where the information
                        that you claim is infringing your rights is located on the site; if regarding a Third
                        Party Seller listing please also provide the name used to identify the Seller on the
                        site (look for "dispatched and sold by _____" or "by ______" in the listing). (b)
                        A description of your intellectual property right(s) that you claim has/have been
                        infringed (e.g. copyright, trademark or patent) by the information of/for this ASIN/ISBN-13.
                        [REPEAT (2)(a-b) as necessary for multiple items, see example Notice Form here.]
Include the following statement: "I have a good faith belief that the portion of
                        the listing(s) described above violate(s) the intellectual property rights owned by
                        the intellectual property owner or its agent, nor is such use otherwise permissible
                        under law."
Include the following statement: "I represent that the information in this notification
                        is true and correct and that I am the intellectual property owner or authorised to
                        act on behalf of the intellectual property owner for the rights described above."
Sign the Notice Form.

Notice and Procedure for Notifying Amazon.in of Objectionable Content
If you believe that any content on, or advertised for sale on, the website contains
            any Objectionable Content as defined under Section 8 above, please notify us immediately
            by copying the Notice to Amazon.in of Objectionable Content below into your word processor
            program, complete it in accordance with the instructions set out in the Notice and
            send a signed copy via E-mail PDF or Fax to the Grievance Officer:
Name:
Saurabh Joshi
e-mail PDF:

or

040 - 39922887

Nehru Place,
New Delhi 110019
Please note that this procedure is exclusively for notifying Amazon.in of Objectionable
            Content on or advertised for sale on the Amazon.in website. Please provide your address,
            telephone number, and e-mail address when sending the notice to us.
Important Warning:
Giving false, misleading or inaccurate information in the Notice to Amazon.in may
            result in civil and/ or criminal liability.
Notice to Amazon.in of Objectionable Content
In the matter of Amazon.in
I, [Please set out your full name] of [please give your postal address], [please set
            your occupation], says as follows:
I refer to the website www.Amazon.in ("the website"). I make this statement in support
                        of my giving Amazon.in notice that, via the website, it is causing or contributing
                        to the publication of Objectionable Content.
The Objectionable Content (delete whichever paragraph is not applicable): (a) appear
                        in a book being sold by Amazon.in via the website entitled [please state the book
                        name and its author]. The Objectionable Content appear on page
[please state the page number(s) where you consider the words constitute Objectionable
                           Content].
OR (b) appear on the website at
[please cut and paste the address of the relevant Web page from the website where
                           the Objectionable Content appears]
The words/ content that I consider to be Objectionable Content are
[please repeat the exact words you are complaining about]
This content is Objectionable Content because
[please state why you consider the content is Objectionable Content]
I understand that this statement may be used in any court proceedings that may arise
                        out of or relating to the Objectionable Content which I have complained about.
Statement of Truth
I declare the facts stated above to be true.
Signed:
Dated:
Please read the conditions of use carefully before using the Amazon.in website. By
            using the Amazon.in website, you signify your agreement to be bound by these conditions.
Amazon Software Terms
Back to top
Use of the Amazon Software
You may use Amazon Software solely for purposes of enabling you to use and enjoy
                     the Amazon Services as provided by Amazon, and as permitted by the Conditions of Use,
                     these Amazon Software Terms and any Terms. You may not incorporate any portion of
                     the Amazon Software into your own programs or compile any portion of it in combination
                     with your own programs, transfer it for use with another service, or sell, rent, lease,
                     lend, loan, distribute or sub-license the Amazon Software or otherwise assign any
                     rights to the Amazon Software in whole or in part. You may not use the Amazon Software
                     for any illegal purpose. We may cease providing any Amazon Software and we may terminate
                     your right to use any Amazon Software at any time. Your rights to use the Amazon Software
                     will automatically terminate without notice from us if you fail to comply with any
                     of these Amazon Software Terms, the Conditions of Use or any other Terms. Additional
                     third party terms contained within or distributed with certain Amazon Software that
                     are specifically identified in related documentation may apply to that Amazon Software
                     (or software incorporated with the Amazon Software) and will govern the use of such
                     software in the event of a conflict with these Conditions of Use. All software used
                     in any Amazon Service is the property of Amazon and/or its affiliates or its software
                     suppliers and protected by laws of India including but not limited to any other applicable
                     copyright laws.
Back to top
Use of Third Party Services
When you use the Amazon Software, you may also be using the services of one or more
                     third parties, such as a wireless carrier or a mobile platform provider. Your use
                     of these third party services may be subject to the separate policies, terms of use,
                     and fees of these third parties.
Back to top
No Reverse Engineering
You may not, and you will not encourage, assist or authorize any other person to copy, modify, reverse engineer, decompile or disassemble, or otherwise tamper with, or apply any other process or procedure to derive the source code or other underlying components (such as a model, model parameters, or model weights) from the Amazon Software, whether in whole or in part, or create any derivative works from or of the Amazon Software.
Back to top
Agents
The terms in this section (“Agent Terms”) apply if you use, allow, enable, or cause the deployment of an Agent to access, use, or interact with any Amazon Services. For the purposes of these Agent Terms, “Agent” means any software or service that takes autonomous or semi-autonomous action on behalf of, or at the instruction of, any person or entity.
Transparency and Consent.
No Agent may access, use, or interact with Amazon Services unless, at all times, it identifies itself and operates in strict accordance with the requirements in section 3 of these Agent Terms. In addition, no Agent may access, use, or interact with Amazon Services if we have requested that the Agent refrain from accessing, using, or interacting with any Amazon Service.
Limitation on Access.
At our sole discretion, we may limit, including by technical measures, whether and how any Agent accesses, uses, and interacts with Amazon Services.
Technical Requirements
. Agents must:
In all HTTP/HTTPS requests, identify that the request is from an Agent and disclose the name of the Agent by including the following in the request’s user agent string:
“Agent/[agent name]” (e.g., Agent/ AmazonAgent)
Not conceal or obfuscate that any access, use, or interactions are from an Agent, such as by (a) mimicking the speed or pattern of human keystrokes, page navigation, or other interactions, or (b) completing or circumventing CAPTCHAs or other measures intended to distinguish computers from humans.
Respond truthfully to any question or prompt seeking to determine if interactions are coming from a human or a computer.
Not circumvent or otherwise avoid any measure intended to block, limit, modify, or control whether and how Agents access, use, or interact with an Amazon Service.
Updates
In order to keep the Amazon Software up-to-date, we may offer automatic or manual
            updates at any time and without notice to you.
Conditions of Sale (between Sellers and the Customer)
Please read these conditions carefully before placing an order for any products with
               the Sellers ("We" or "Our" or "Us", wherever applicable) on the Amazon.in (the website).
               These conditions signify your agreement to be bound by these conditions.
In addition, when you use any current or future Amazon.in service (eg: Wishlist or
               Marketplace or Amazon MP3 Service), you will also be subject to the terms, guidelines
               and conditions applicable to that service ("Terms"). If these Conditions of Sale are
               inconsistent with such Terms, the Terms will control.
Conditions Relating to the Sale of Products to You
This section deals with conditions relating to the sale of products on the website
                           by us to you.
Our Contract
Your order is an offer to us to buy the product(s) in your order. When you place
                           an order to purchase a product from us, you will receive an e-mail confirming receipt
                           of your order and containing the details of your order (the "Order Confirmation E-mail").
                           The Order Confirmation E-mail is acknowledgement that we have received your order,
                           and does not confirm acceptance of your offer to buy the product(s) ordered. We only
                           accept your offer, and conclude the contract of sale for a product ordered by you,
                           when the product is dispatched to you and an e-mail confirmation is sent to you that
                           the product has been dispatched to you (the "Dispatch Confirmation E-mail"). If your
                           order is dispatched in more than one package, you may receive a separate Dispatch
                           Confirmation E-mail for each package, and each Dispatch Confirmation E-mail and corresponding
                           dispatch will conclude a separate contract of sale between you and us for the product(s)
                           specified in that Dispatch Confirmation E-mail.
Your contract is with us (the Sellers) and you confirm that the product(s) ordered
                           by you are purchased for your internal / personal purpose and not for re-sale or business
                           purpose. You authorize us to declare and provide declaration to any governmental authority
                           on your behalf stating the aforesaid purpose of the products ordered by you on the
                           website.
You can cancel your order for a product at no cost any time before we send the Dispatch
                           Confirmation E-mail relating to that product.
Please note that we sell products only in quantities which correspond to the typical
                           needs of an average household. This applies both to the number of products ordered
                           within a single order and the placing of several orders for the same product where
                           the individual orders comprise a quantity typical for a normal household.
Back to top
Returns
Most items purchased from sellers listed on Amazon.in are returnable within the return
                              window, except those that are explicitly identified as not returnable. The return
                              is processed only if:
it is determined that the product was not damaged while in your possession;
the product is not different from what was shipped to you;
the product is returned in original condition (with brand's/manufacturer's box, MRP
                                       tag intact, user manual, warranty card and accessories)
You can review return policy for products listed on Amazon.in by clicking
here
. For the products
                           that are returned by the customer, the refund is issued to the original payment method
                           (in case of pre-paid transactions) or to the bank account / as Amazon Pay balance
                           (in case of Pay on Delivery orders), the details for making such refund and the timelines
                           are detailed in the refund policy available
here
.
Please review our Returns Policy, which applies to products sold by us.
Back to top
Pricing and availability
We list availability information for products sold by us on the website, including
                           on each product information page. Beyond what we say on that page or otherwise on
                           the website, we cannot be more specific about availability. Please note that dispatch
                           estimates are just that. They are not guaranteed dispatch times and should not be
                           relied upon as such. As we process your order, you will be informed by e-mail if any
                           products you order turn out to be unavailable.
For more details, please review our
Pricing policy
Pricing policy (https://www.amazon.in/gp/help/customer/display.html?nodeId=202001520)
                           and our
Availability Guide
, both of which apply to products ordered from us.
All prices are inclusive of VAT/CST, service tax, Goods and Services Tax ("GST"),
                           duties and cesses as applicable - unless stated otherwise.
Back to top
Taxes
You shall be responsible for payment of all fees/costs/charges associated with the
                           purchase of products from us and you agree to bear any and all applicable taxes including
                           but not limited to VAT/CST, service tax, GST, duties and cesses etc.
Back to top
Health & Safety
By purchasing any product from our Home & Kitchen shop, you acknowledge that you
                           have read and understood our Health & Safety Guidelines.
Back to top
Children
Use of Amazon.in is available only to persons who can form a legally binding contract
                           under the Indian Contract Act, 1872. If you are a minor i.e. under the age of 18 years,
                           you may purchase only with the involvement of a parent or guardian.
Back to top
Communications
When you visit Amazon.in, you are communicating with us electronically. You will
                           be required to provide a valid phone number while placing an order with us. We may
                           communicate with you by e-mail, SMS, phone call or by posting notices on the website
                           or by any other mode of communication. For contractual purposes, you consent to receive
                           communications including SMS, e-mails or phone calls from us with respect to your
                           order.
Back to top
Losses
We will not be responsible for any business loss (including loss of profits, revenue,
                           contracts, anticipated savings, data, goodwill or wasted expenditure) or any other
                           indirect or consequential loss that is not reasonably foreseeable to both you and
                           us when a contract for the sale of goods by us to you was formed.
Back to top
Alteration or Amendments to the Conditions
We reserve the right to make changes to our policies, and these Conditions of Sale
                           at any time. You will be subject to the policies and Conditions of Sale in force at
                           the time you order goods from us, unless any change to those policies or these conditions
                           is required to be made by law or government authority (in which case it will apply
                           to orders previously placed by you). If any of these conditions is deemed invalid,
                           void, or for any reason unenforceable, that condition will be deemed severable and
                           will not affect the validity and enforceability of any remaining condition.
Back to top
Events beyond our reasonable control
We will not be held responsible for any delay or failure to comply with our obligations
                           under these conditions if the delay or failure arises from any cause which is beyond
                           our reasonable control. This condition does not affect your statutory rights.
Back to top
Waiver
If you breach these conditions and we take no action, we will still be entitled to
                           use our rights and remedies in any other situation where you breach these conditions.
Back to top
Governing Law and Jurisdiction
These conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India,
                           and the application of the United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International
                           Sale of Goods is expressly excluded. You agree, as we do, to submit to the exclusive
                           jurisdiction of the courts at Delhi.
Back to top

Product details
Top highlights
Care instructions
Handle with care, avoid hard surfaces, keep away from extreme heat and water. Purify in salt water for cleaning.
Country of Origin
India
About this item
ATTRACTS & EMPOWERS – The Dhan Yog Bracelet attracts financial prosperity, enhances confidence and decision-making, symbolizes wealth and success, and helps eliminate blockages to achieve financial stability.
HOW TO WEAR – Purify the Dhan Yog Bracelet in salt water, focus on intentions for wealth and prosperity, chant "Om Shreem Mahalakshmiyei Namaha" 11 times, and wear it on Friday morning to invoke blessings of abundance.
STYLISH BRACELET – Perfect for any occasion; wear it to parties, the office, or casual outings. Its versatile design complements any outfit, whether styled alone for a minimalist look or stacked with other bracelets for added flair.
BEAUTIFUL PACKAGING - Dhan Yog bracelet will come in a elegant Astrotalk packaging with all the safety precautions.
GIFT FOR YOUR LOVED ONES - Dhan Yog bracelet is an ideal bracelet for gift. You can use it as gift for women, gift for men, birthday gift for men, birthday gift for friends.

Our products are trusted by 15,000+ astrologers and spiritual seekers. They’re designed to bring positivity, protection, and enhance overall well-being for a better life.

Yes, our products are authentically crafted with spiritual rituals to provide real energetic benefits—promoting transformation, growth, and positivity.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the bracelet to be of good quality, comfortable to wear, and appreciate its premium appearance. Moreover, they report positive experiences with its energy, noting significant shifts in their energy and mood, and value its ability to boost confidence and help face challenges calmly. However, the authenticity of the stones receives mixed feedback, with some confirming they are authentic while others report they are fake. Additionally, durability is also mixed, with some finding it durable while others report it breaking within days of use.

Amazon Customer
5 out of 5 stars
Excellent Quality Bracelet with Premium Packaging and Elegant Design.
I recently purchased the Astrotalk Dhan Yog Bracelet, and I am genuinely impressed with both the quality and presentation of the product. The bracelet comes in a premium-looking Astrotalk box, making it feel special right from the moment of unboxing. It also includes a complimentary spare thread, which is a thoughtful addition. The bracelet is beautifully crafted with attractive gemstone beads, including Citrine, Jade, Tiger Eye, Clear Quartz, and Pyrite. The combination of stones gives it a stylish and elegant look that can be worn daily by both men and women. The beads feel smooth, durable, and comfortable on the wrist. While spiritual and manifestation results may vary from person to person, wearing the bracelet has given me a positive and confident feeling. It serves as a great reminder to stay focused on my financial goals, prosperity, and personal growth. Pros: ✔ Premium packaging ✔ High-quality gemstone beads ✔ Comfortable and stylish design ✔ Suitable for both men and women ✔ Comes with complimentary spare thread ✔ Excellent gifting option Overall Review: If you're looking for a well-made bracelet that combines elegant design with the symbolism of wealth, prosperity, and positive energy, the Astrotalk Dhan Yog Bracelet is a great choice. Highly recommended for personal use or as a thoughtful gift.

₹1,999.00

Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
ATTRACTS & EMPOWERS – The Dhan Yog Bracelet attracts financial prosperity, enhances confidence and decision-making, symbolizes wealth and success, and helps eliminate blockages to achieve financial stability.
HOW TO WEAR – Purify the Dhan Yog Bracelet in salt water, focus on intentions for wealth and prosperity, chant "Om Shreem Mahalakshmiyei Namaha" 11 times, and wear it on Friday morning to invoke blessings of abundance.
STYLISH BRACELET – Perfect for any occasion; wear it to parties, the office, or casual outings. Its versatile design complements any outfit, whether styled alone for a minimalist look or stacked with other bracelets for added flair.
BEAUTIFUL PACKAGING - Dhan Yog bracelet will come in a elegant Astrotalk packaging with all the safety precautions.
GIFT FOR YOUR LOVED ONES - Dhan Yog bracelet is an ideal bracelet for gift. You can use it as gift for women, gift for men, birthday gift for men, birthday gift for friends.
Product description
The Dhan Yog Bracelet is designed to help you attract money and maintain stability in your business and work life. Crafted with powerful crystals, it’s the perfect accessory for anyone looking to enhance their financial journey. Whether you're a business person or someone working in the corporate field, this bracelet supports your goals by promoting smart decision-making and long-term growth. A must-have for anyone looking to grow in their career.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the blender powerful with its 500W copper motor and appreciate its ease of use for daily kitchen tasks, particularly for making smoothies and juices. Moreover, they consider it worth the price and find it very useful for daily smoothies. However, the performance and durability receive mixed reviews - while some say it works well, others report it stopped working, and while some find it durable, others mention jars cracking during operation.

5 out of 5 stars
Totally satisfied with the product and the service as well..
I purchased this mixer and was satisfied with its performance initially. However, after the Amazon return period had expired, I started facing a leakage issue with one of the jars. So I contacted directly using the customer care number provided on the product. Their response was prompt and professional. They understood the issue and, within a week, sent me a replacement jar along with a new blade at no extra cost. I truly appreciate their excellent after-sales service and commitment to customer satisfaction. It's reassuring to know that the company stands behind its products even after the return window has closed. Thank you to the Cookwell team for the quick support..

I purchased the Nutripro Mixer Blender and my overall experience with the product is good. Initially, the product worked quite well — it was efficient for daily use like making shakes, grinding, and blending. The design is compact and easy to handle, which makes it convenient for regular kitchen use.
However, after some months (before completing one year), the product started having issues and stopped working properly. This was a bit disappointing. But the good part is that the company’s customer service was responsive and helpful — they replaced the product without much hassle under warranty.
After replacement, the product is working fine again. So, while there was a durability issue initially, the after-sales service made up for it.
Overall, I would say the product is good—if you consider the price and the company’s support

I purchased the NutriPro juice mixer from Amazon, and overall I am very happy with the product. Initially, the mixer stopped working within 4 months of usage, which was disappointing. However, it was replaced with a new mixer without any hassle.
The old mixer was taken back and a new one was delivered smoothly. The replacement process was simple and well managed.
Cookwell Domestic Appliances Pvt Ltd provided excellent support during the replacement. Their response was quick and the process was handled professionally without any confusion or delay. I really appreciate their reliable support and customer care.
Now the new mixer is working perfectly. I am fully satisfied with its performance after the replacement.
Based on my experience, I strongly recommend this juice mixer for anyone looking for a good quality and reliable product.

I have been using the Nutripro Blender for over a year now and it has been an absolute workhorse in my daily routine — from protein shakes to smoothies, it handles everything effortlessly.
After about a year of regular use, I noticed the blades had loosened slightly. I contacted the manufacturer and was honestly surprised by how quickly they responded. Within just one week, they shipped me a brand new replacement — completely hassle-free under warranty.
What impressed me most was not just the product quality but the after-sales support. In today's market, finding a brand that stands behind their product so confidently is rare.
Highly recommend Nutripro to anyone looking for a reliable, durable blender backed by a brand that truly cares about their customers. Will definitely buy again! 👍

Outstanding Customer Service and Product Support
I am extremely impressed with the service provided by Cookwell NutriPro. From the moment I lodged my complaint, the entire process was handled professionally and efficiently.
The complaint registration process was simple and hassle-free. I received a detailed walkthrough of the complaint status, and the customer support team kept me informed at every stage. What stood out most was the quick response from the service personnel, who contacted me promptly and addressed the issue without any unnecessary delays.
The turnaround time for resolving the complaint was remarkably fast, and the service call was closed efficiently to my complete satisfaction. It is refreshing to deal with a company that genuinely values its customers and takes ownership of service-related concerns.
Cookwell NutriPro has demonstrated high standards of quality, professionalism, and customer care. Their commitment to customer satisfaction is truly commendable. I would highly recommend Cookwell NutriPro not only for the quality of their products but also for their excellent after-sales service and support.
A great company to deal with, and one that sets a benchmark for customer service excellence. Keep up the fantastic work! 👏👏👏

Anti Tarnish 18K Gold Plated Floral Tulip Bracelet for Women & Girls | Elegant Daily Wear Jewelry | Gift for Her | Pink Tulip Bracelet
Product description
Elegant and stylish Anti Tarnish Tulip Floral Bracelet crafted with premium 18K gold plating. Designed with delicate floral motifs and sparkling stones, this bracelet adds a luxurious touch to your everyday and party wear. Its anti-tarnish coating ensures long-lasting shine and durability. Lightweight and comfortable, it is perfect for gifting or personal use.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

About this item
[🚪 ADJUSTABLE LENGTH (62 - 100 cm)]: The Slovic Pull Up Bar features an adjustable length that ranges from 62 to 100 cm, allowing it to fit a variety of doorways. Whether you have a compact or wide frame, this bar adapts to your home setup with ease. Ideal for creating a flexible home gym equipment for men and calisthenics equipment solution.
[🔧 NO SCREW INSTALLATION]: No need for complicated installations! This pull-up bar for home requires no screws or drilling, providing a quick and easy setup. Simply adjust it to your doorframe, and it's ready to use, making it an excellent addition to your gym equipment set for home workout.
[🏋️‍♂️ HIGH LOAD CAPACITY (100 kg)]: With a load-bearing capacity of up to 100 kg, this pull-up bar is built for durability and strength. It supports even the most intense workouts, making it a reliable choice for your exercise equipment for home and ensuring long-lasting performance.
[💪 ANTI-SKID GRIP]: The bar is equipped with comfortable anti-skid grips that provide a secure hold, reducing the risk of slipping during exercises. Whether you're doing pull-ups, chin-ups, or leg raises, the grips ensure stability, making your workout safer and more comfortable.
[🔄 MULTIPLE USES]: This versatile bar is perfect for a variety of exercises, including pull-ups, chin-ups, hanging leg raises, and more. It’s an essential part of any home gym equipment and men's accessories for those looking to enhance their calisthenics routine or full-body workout.
[📐 INTEGRATED LEVEL METER]: The built-in level meter ensures that the bar is perfectly aligned with your doorframe, promoting proper form and safety during workouts. This feature helps prevent injury by ensuring the bar is securely and evenly positioned for every exercise.
[🏗️ DURABLE CONSTRUCTION]: Crafted from high-quality materials, the Slovic Pull Up Bar is designed for long-term use. It's the perfect choice for anyone looking to invest in gym equipment for home, combining strength, durability, and convenience in one essential piece of workout gear.
›

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Sponsored
Customers say
Customers find the pull-up bar to be of good quality, sturdy, and easy to install without drilling, with the ability to hold up to 65-70 kg weight. Moreover, they consider it worth the price and excellent for home workouts. However, the grip and functionality receive mixed reviews - while some find it has a nice grip, others report it keeps slipping, and while some say it works well, others find it totally useless.

About this Item
[🚪 ADJUSTABLE LENGTH (62 - 100 cm)]: The Slovic Pull Up Bar features an adjustable length that ranges from 62 to 100 cm, allowing it to fit a variety of doorways. Whether you have a compact or wide frame, this bar adapts to your home setup with ease. Ideal for creating a flexible home gym equipment for men and calisthenics equipment solution.
[🔧 NO SCREW INSTALLATION]: No need for complicated installations! This pull-up bar for home requires no screws or drilling, providing a quick and easy setup. Simply adjust it to your doorframe, and it's ready to use, making it an excellent addition to your gym equipment set for home workout.
[🏋️‍♂️ HIGH LOAD CAPACITY (100 kg)]: With a load-bearing capacity of up to 100 kg, this pull-up bar is built for durability and strength. It supports even the most intense workouts, making it a reliable choice for your exercise equipment for home and ensuring long-lasting performance.
[💪 ANTI-SKID GRIP]: The bar is equipped with comfortable anti-skid grips that provide a secure hold, reducing the risk of slipping during exercises. Whether you're doing pull-ups, chin-ups, or leg raises, the grips ensure stability, making your workout safer and more comfortable.
[🔄 MULTIPLE USES]: This versatile bar is perfect for a variety of exercises, including pull-ups, chin-ups, hanging leg raises, and more. It’s an essential part of any home gym equipment and men's accessories for those looking to enhance their calisthenics routine or full-body workout.
[📐 INTEGRATED LEVEL METER]: The built-in level meter ensures that the bar is perfectly aligned with your doorframe, promoting proper form and safety during workouts. This feature helps prevent injury by ensuring the bar is securely and evenly positioned for every exercise.
[🏗️ DURABLE CONSTRUCTION]: Crafted from high-quality materials, the Slovic Pull Up Bar is designed for long-term use. It's the perfect choice for anyone looking to invest in gym equipment for home, combining strength, durability, and convenience in one essential piece of workout gear.
Product description
Slovic Pull-Up Bar for Home Workout | Non-Slip Carbon Steel Gym Bar (Load Capacity: 100 Kg) | Adjustable in Length, Mountable Door Bar with Foam Pads & Rubber Stoppers | Black, Size: 62 – 100cm

Manufacturer
UGAOO, UGAOO
About this item
WHY UGAOO VERMICOMPOST - From India's most trusted plant brand with a 140-year horticulture legacy. this 5 kg pack is 100% pure earthworm-cast vermicompost for plants. Screened and processed to remove weed seeds and debris, with a fresh earthy smell, never sour.
RICH IN NPK, MICRONUTRIENTS & SOIL MICROBES - A balanced organic manure loaded with nitrogen, phosphorus and potassium, plus beneficial soil microbes and micronutrients. Fine-textured and moisture-balanced, this compost loosens heavy clay and red soils, improves aeration and water-holding, and releases nutrients slowly so it never burns the roots.
FEEDS PLANTS NATURALLY, NO CHEMICAL BURN - As a slow-release organic plant food, vermicompost supports steady greening, new growth and stronger root development. Improves long-term soil fertility instead of force-feeding, making it a safe everyday fertilizer for indoor plants, home garden beds and balcony pots.
HOW TO USE - Mix roughly 150 g of compost into the top 2 inches of soil per medium pot, then water lightly. One 5 kg pack top-dresses around 30 medium potted plants. Re-apply every 10 to 15 days through the growing season for money plant, tulsi, aloe, rose, herbs and vegetable seedlings.
USE IT ANYWHERE - Ideal for indoor plants, outdoor and flowering plants, terrace gardens, balcony planters, vegetable beds and kitchen garden pots. Safe for homes with children and pets when used as directed. The Ugaoo difference is clean & ready-to-use compost trusted by Indian gardeners.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find the vermicompost to be of good quality and effective for plant growth, with substantial benefits for soil health. The product receives mixed feedback regarding its authenticity, with some confirming it's pure vermicompost while others report it's not. Customers disagree on the value for money, with some finding it worth the price while others consider it overpriced. The product's odor, moisture content, and pest resistance receive mixed reviews, with some customers reporting no bad smell and moderate moisture, while others mention bad smells and white bugs in the fertilizer.

Amazon Customer
5 out of 5 stars
Very effective VERMI compost plants need!
Reviewed in India on 23 February 2026
Size: 5 KG
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
UGAoo organic vermi compost last month I purchased two  5kgs bags I found this vermi compost is of excellent quality I have been neglecting my 200 house plant's (nearly) as some are damaged so I took the task of bringing back my plants to good health after using this product in January slowly but steadily most of my plants are growing back to good health and most of my flowering plants are full of bloom and new green shoots are forming there's no doubt about the performance of this product I still have one full bag of this product but I am today buying one more bag of 5kgs I learnt one thing every plant needs around 150 gms to show you good results and you will not be disappointed and every month the plants need vermi compost!

Product Summary: Ugaoo Organic Vermicompost for Plants 5 Kg | Pure Earthworm Compost Manure Rich in NPK & Micronutrients | Natural Plant Food for Indoor, Outdoor Flowering & Home Garden | Sterilized and Odour-Free
From UGAOO
4.3 out of 5 stars, 7,801 ratings
Customer reviews
2K+ bought in past week
Price
One-time purchase: ₹329.00
( ₹0.07 / gram(s))          53% Savings
List Price:
₹699.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
WHY UGAOO VERMICOMPOST - From India's most trusted plant brand with a 140-year horticulture legacy. this 5 kg pack is 100% pure earthworm-cast vermicompost for plants. Screened and processed to remove weed seeds and debris, with a fresh earthy smell, never sour.
RICH IN NPK, MICRONUTRIENTS & SOIL MICROBES - A balanced organic manure loaded with nitrogen, phosphorus and potassium, plus beneficial soil microbes and micronutrients. Fine-textured and moisture-balanced, this compost loosens heavy clay and red soils, improves aeration and water-holding, and releases nutrients slowly so it never burns the roots.
FEEDS PLANTS NATURALLY, NO CHEMICAL BURN - As a slow-release organic plant food, vermicompost supports steady greening, new growth and stronger root development. Improves long-term soil fertility instead of force-feeding, making it a safe everyday fertilizer for indoor plants, home garden beds and balcony pots.
HOW TO USE - Mix roughly 150 g of compost into the top 2 inches of soil per medium pot, then water lightly. One 5 kg pack top-dresses around 30 medium potted plants. Re-apply every 10 to 15 days through the growing season for money plant, tulsi, aloe, rose, herbs and vegetable seedlings.
USE IT ANYWHERE - Ideal for indoor plants, outdoor and flowering plants, terrace gardens, balcony planters, vegetable beds and kitchen garden pots. Safe for homes with children and pets when used as directed. The Ugaoo difference is clean & ready-to-use compost trusted by Indian gardeners.
Product description
UGAOO Vermicompost is made by breaking down the organic material through the use of worms, bacteria, and fungi. It is a nutrient rich organic supplement which naturally increases the organic matter content of the soil and ensures the healthy and fast growth of plants. Being highly efficient it is the best way to grow the plants in ecologically safe and environment-friendly method.
Options Available
Size
1 KG
5 KG
10 KG
20 KG
Browse all available options
Important Information
Ingredients:
Vermicompost
Directions:
1. Loosen the soil around root area. 2. Apply Vermicompost near roots. 3. Water the plants after manuring

Frequently Asked Questions
What happens if I join a plan and later realize i want other benefits also and want to switch to another plan?
You can seamlessly upgrade from
1. Prime Shopping edition to Prime or Prime Lite plans
2. Prime Lite to Prime plans
anytime during your membership period. You need to visit https://www.amazon.in/prime to upgrade.
How do I buy Prime Video ad-free?
Prime members can buy Ad-free by visiting ‘primevideo.com/your-account’ on Prime Video and selecting ‘Go Ad-Free’. Once subscribed, your linked profiles won’t see ads during on-demand movies and TV shows (except for skippable promotional trailers).
Note: Prime Lite members need to upgrade to Prime to access Ad-Free. Some content, like TV and free ad-supported programming, will continue to show ads.
How do I cancel my plan?
If you signed-up for your Prime membership directly through us, you may cancel your Prime membership at any time by visiting https://www.amazon.in/mc.
How many devices can be used simultaneously on a Prime subscription?
You can access shopping benefits simultaneously without any restrictions. Under Prime Lite plan, you can access video benefits on only 1 device. Under Prime plan, you can access video benefit on upto 5 devices including 2 TVs. You can use music benefits on only 1 device simultaneously.
Can I turn off/on auto-renewal during the course of my membership?
Yes, you can manage your auto-renewal selection and turn it on/off as per your choice during the course of your membership on ( https://www.amazon.in/mc ). If you have got your membership through a telecom partner or billed through Google - please contact the respective partner to make changes to your auto-renewal mandate.

About this item
IDEAL FOR DRY TO NORMAL SENSITIVE SKIN: Non-Comedogenic, Hypoallergenic formula free from Parabens, Sulphates, Fragrances & Oils
GENTLE SKIN CLEANSER: Formulated with Micellar Technology that gently yet effectively removes dirt, makeup and impurities. PROTECTS AGAINST DRYNESS: Clinically proven to provide continuous hydration leaving the skin hydrated after cleansing
DERMATOLOGIST RECOMMENDED: Blend of Niacinamide, Vitamin B5 and Hydrating Glycerin to reinforce skin’s natural moisture barrier even after repeat washes
DEFENDS AGAINST 5 SIGNS OF SKIN SENSITIVITY: Defends against dryness, irritation, roughness, tightness and a weakened skin barrier
Target Audience Keywords: Unisex Adult
IDEAL FOR DRY TO NORMANon-Comedogenic, Hypoallergenic formula free from Parabens, Sulphates, Fragrances & Oils

Important information
Safety Information:
Avoid contact with eyes
Ingredients:
Aqua, Glycerin, Cetearyl Alcohol, Panthenol, Niacinamide, Pantolactone, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid
Directions:
Apply Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser to the skin and massage gently. With Water: Rinse and pat dry with a soft towel. Without Water: Remove excess with a soft cloth or tissue leaving a thin film on the skin.
Product description
Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser is a clinically proven creamy formula that gently yet effectively removes dirt, make-up, and impurities and provides continuous hydration to protect against dryness. The formula is developed with a dermatologists-backed blend of Niacinamide, Vitamin B5 and Hydrating Glycerin to improve the resilience of sensitive skin. Ideal for Dry to Normal, Sensitive Skin, Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser is • Paraben-Free • Sulphate-Free • Fragrance Free • Hypoallergenic • Non Comedogenic: Won't Clog Pores

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find this face wash effective, particularly for oily and acne-prone skin, while being gentle and moisturizing without drying out the skin. The product receives positive feedback for its skin compatibility, with customers noting it's suitable for sensitive and dry skin, and they appreciate its glow-enhancing effects. While some customers consider it worth the price, others find it too expensive, and opinions about the fragrance are mixed, with some praising its zero scent while others find the smell unpleasant.

5 out of 5 stars
Effective facewash
Reviewed in India on 6 April 2026
Scent Name: Unscented
Size: 118 ml (Pack of 1)
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
It cleans the skin nicely without making it dry or tight. The texture is smooth and it feels very light on the skin. It is suitable for daily use, especially for sensitive skin.
After using it for a few days, my skin felt soft and hydrated. It removes dirt and oil properly while keeping the natural moisture of the skin. It does not cause irritation or redness. Overall, it is a good cleanser for people looking for a mild and simple skincare product. Highly recommended for daily use

Sk
3 out of 5 stars
Cetaphil Gentle Skin Hydrating Face Wash
Reviewed in India on 9 June 2026
Scent Name: Unscented
Size: 118 ml (Pack of 1)
Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
Cetaphil Gentle Skin Hydrating Face Wash is a good cleanser for daily use. It is gentle on the skin, does not cause irritation, and works well for sensitive skin. The ingredients feel skin-friendly, and the fragrance-free formula is a plus point.
The quantity is reasonable, and the product lasts for a good amount of time. However, the moisturizing effect is not as strong as expected, and some users may still need a separate moisturizer after washing their face.
Overall, it is a reliable face wash with good skin compatibility and quality ingredients. I would rate it 4 out of 5 stars.

Product Summary: Cetaphil Gentle Skin Hydrating Face Wash 118ml, Paraben Free, Sulphate-Free Gentle Skin Hydrating Cleanser with Niacinamide, Vitamin B5 for Dry to Normal, Sensitive Skin
From Cetaphil
4.4 out of 5 stars, 44,797 ratings
Customer reviews

Price

( ₹328.81 / ml)          10% Savings
List Price:
₹429.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
IDEAL FOR DRY TO NORMAL SENSITIVE SKIN: Non-Comedogenic, Hypoallergenic formula free from Parabens, Sulphates, Fragrances & Oils
GENTLE SKIN CLEANSER: Formulated with Micellar Technology that gently yet effectively removes dirt, makeup and impurities. PROTECTS AGAINST DRYNESS: Clinically proven to provide continuous hydration leaving the skin hydrated after cleansing
DERMATOLOGIST RECOMMENDED: Blend of Niacinamide, Vitamin B5 and Hydrating Glycerin to reinforce skin’s natural moisture barrier even after repeat washes
DEFENDS AGAINST 5 SIGNS OF SKIN SENSITIVITY: Defends against dryness, irritation, roughness, tightness and a weakened skin barrier
Target Audience Keywords: Unisex Adult
IDEAL FOR DRY TO NORMANon-Comedogenic, Hypoallergenic formula free from Parabens, Sulphates, Fragrances & Oils
Product description
Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser is a clinically proven creamy formula that gently yet effectively removes dirt, make-up, and impurities and provides continuous hydration to protect against dryness. The formula is developed with a dermatologists-backed blend of Niacinamide, Vitamin B5 and Hydrating Glycerin to improve the resilience of sensitive skin. Ideal for Dry to Normal, Sensitive Skin, Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser is • Paraben-Free • Sulphate-Free • Fragrance Free • Hypoallergenic • Non Comedogenic: Won't Clog Pores
Options Available
Scent Name
Unscented
Size
118 ml (Pack of 1)
118 ml (Pack of 3)
125 ml (Pack of 2)
125 ml (Pack of 4)
Browse all available options
Important Information
Safety Information:
Avoid contact with eyes
Ingredients:
Aqua, Glycerin, Cetearyl Alcohol, Panthenol, Niacinamide, Pantolactone, Xanthan Gum, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid
Directions:
Apply Cetaphil Gentle Skin Cleanser to the skin and massage gently. With Water: Rinse and pat dry with a soft towel. Without Water: Remove excess with a soft cloth or tissue leaving a thin film on the skin.

Season 1
|
Episode 1
The Watch Project
Almighty Motion Picture
U/A 13+
Watch S1 E1
Year 1978. A Sidelined Tata executive Xerxes Desai is tasked with reviving a dying division of Tata's Tata Press, only to stumble upon a bold idea that could redefine Indian industry. Challenged by global humiliation, he sets out to build India's first world-class watch against all odds.
Starring: Naseeruddin Shah, Jim Sarbh, Vaibhav Tatwawadi, Namita Dubey, Lakshvir Singh Saran, Kaveri Seth
Language: Hindi
Genre: Drama, Biopic
Season 1
E1 | The Watch Project
E1 | The Watch Project
Year 1978. A Sidelined Tata executive Xerxes Desai is tasked with reviving a dying division of Tata's Tata Press, only to stumble upon a bold idea that could redefine Indian industry. Challenged by global humiliation, he sets out to build India's first world-class watch against all odds.
Jun 1, 2026
▏
56 min
E2 | Demonstration
E2 | Demonstration
As the team comes together amid personal sacrifices, Xerxes pushes the dream of an Indian Quartz watch through boardroom battles and bureaucratic rejection. Just when hope resurfaces with a government partnership and the birth of "Titan," financial doors slam shut, threatening the vision once again.
Jun 1, 2026
▏
57 min
E3 | Flying Saucer
E3 | Flying Saucer
When the team falters, Xerxes's unwavering belief, bolstered by family support, keeps Titan alive, leading to funding, a factory, and the birth of India's first Quartz watch. But just as the dream takes physical form, a public humiliation by a foreign rival threatens to shatter everything they've built.
Jun 1, 2026
▏
54 min
E4 | The Real Value
E4 | The Real Value
Reigniting the team's spirit, Xerxes turns failure into innovation, fixing the flaw and reshaping Titan through global learning and bold design. Though the launch struggles and sales falter, a startling clue in Chor Bazaar hints that Titan's impact is far greater than anyone realizes.
Jun 1, 2026
▏
54 min
E5 | Universal Language
E5 | Universal Language
Xerxes cracks Titan's pricing puzzle and stabilizes the business, even as personal and professional shifts test the team's confidence. A bold branding leap, powered by Mozart's stirring symphony, transforms Titan into a cultural symbol and ignites explosive growth.
Jun 1, 2026
▏
53 min
E6 | Twenty Two
E6 | Twenty Two
At the peak of success, Xerxes's ambition costs him his closest ally and nearly destroys Titan's future. But one last act of belief leads to a historic innovation, turning humiliation into victory and sealing Titan's place on the world stage.
Jun 1, 2026
▏
53 min
Bonus | The Journey Of Campus
Bonus | The Journey Of Campus
In this chapter of Timeless Tales with Jim, Jim Sarbh reflects on the spirit of aspiration, movement, and ambition through the story of Campus. Through a personal monologue, he explores how the brand became a symbol for a generation constantly chasing bigger dreams and moving forward on its own terms.
Jun 4, 2026
▏
2 min
Bonus | In Conversation With Udit Todi, Lux Nitro
Bonus | In Conversation With Udit Todi, Lux Nitro

Jun 4, 2026
▏
15 min
Bonus | In Conversation With Abdul Majeed, Hamdard
Bonus | In Conversation With Abdul Majeed, Hamdard
In this chapter of Timeless Tales with Jim, Jim Sarbh sits down with Abdul Majeed, Chairman & Managing Trustee of Hamdard, for a candid conversation on legacy, healing, and responsibility.
Jun 4, 2026
▏
14 min
Bonus | Made In India: A Titan Story | Official Trailer
Bonus | Made In India: A Titan Story | Official Trailer
In a market ruled by smuggling and foreign brands, a determined Indian man Xerxes Desai, with the help of his team, dares to build a world-class watch from scratch. Battling rejection, failure, and global humiliation, they transform Titan into a symbol of national pride and innovation.

Important information
Directions:
Use to line dustbins or segregate dry and wet waste. Tie up after use.
Product description
Presto! Offers Garbage Bags To Help You Maintain Cleanliness And Hygiene In Your House, Office And Surroundings. These Garbage Bags Make Clean-Up And Garbage Disposal A Hassle-Free Task While Being Easy On The Environment! Line Them Up In Your Bedroom Or Bathroom Dustbins Or Use Them To Segregate Dry And Wet Waste In The Kitchen. Effectively Clear Out Messy Trash Like Baby Diapers And Kitty Litter! Handy At Offices Or Hotels, TheyRe Useful For Getting Rid Of Leftover Party Plates And Garbage As Well. They Come With A Detachable Tie-Tape Which Lets You Neatly Tie Up The Bag, Making It Easier To Carry Out After Use. These Medium-Sized Bags Easily Fit Any Normal Dustbins. They Are Available In Black Colour In A Pack Of 6 Rolls, And Each Roll Contains 30 Bags For Your Convenience.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Customers say
Customers find these garbage bags to be a good value for money, describing them as an affordable solution for everyday waste disposal. However, the quality receives mixed feedback, with some customers finding them amazing while others report poor quality.

Pretty good. Not the strongest, but not all that weak. Great for throwing away wet food. This is a regular purchase in my household. They're medium sized, not suitable for the small, countertop trashcans. We put them in trashcans that reach just below my knee(I'm 5'5). They aren't transparent. They've also got a little plastic thread on the bottom that you can use to tie them up. Go ahead!

Bought these Presto medium garbage bags recently and they are very useful for daily household waste. The size fits regular dustbins perfectly and the bags are easy to tie and dispose of.

Good Quality and Value for Money
Reviewed in India on 3 June 2026
Colour: Green

Verified Purchase
Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.
These garbage bags are of good quality and offer excellent value for money. The material is reasonably strong for everyday household use and does not tear easily under normal loads. The roll packaging is convenient, and the bags are easy to separate and use.
I have been using them regularly, and they have been reliable for daily kitchen and household waste. Considering the quantity provided in the pack, the pricing is quite economical compared to many other options available in the market.
Overall, a practical product that does exactly what it is supposed to do. If you are looking for affordable and dependable garbage bags, this is a good choice. Recommended.

About this Item
Convenient for clean-up and garbage disposal
Multifunctional use; ideal for office, hotels, household use, parties, baby diapers, and clearing pet's litter
Detachable tie-tape to tie up bag after use
Garbage Bags for your home and kitchen
Dimensions - 48 cms x 53 cms; Size: Medium
Package Contents - 6 Rolls of Garbage Bags; Quantity: 30 per roll; Colour: Black
Product description
Presto! Offers Garbage Bags To Help You Maintain Cleanliness And Hygiene In Your House, Office And Surroundings. These Garbage Bags Make Clean-Up And Garbage Disposal A Hassle-Free Task While Being Easy On The Environment! Line Them Up In Your Bedroom Or Bathroom Dustbins Or Use Them To Segregate Dry And Wet Waste In The Kitchen. Effectively Clear Out Messy Trash Like Baby Diapers And Kitty Litter! Handy At Offices Or Hotels, They Re Useful For Getting Rid Of Leftover Party Plates And Garbage As Well. They Come With A Detachable Tie-Tape Which Lets You Neatly Tie Up The Bag, Making It Easier To Carry Out After Use. These Medium-Sized Bags Easily Fit Any Normal Dustbins. They Are Available In Black Colour In A Pack Of 6 Rolls, And Each Roll Contains 30 Bags For Your Convenience.

Important Information
Directions:
Use to line dustbins or segregate dry and wet waste. Tie up after use.
