Fee Drop Highlights
Know more
Big savings with the new fee reductions
Check revised fees across all categories
Sellers can now get further benefits on multi-unit purchases, enjoying up to 90%+ savings in fees on additional units sold. By creating promotions like "Buy 2, Get 10% Off", sellers can maximize their savings under the new fee structure.
Create promotions here
Sellers on Amazon Bazaar will continue to enjoy zero referral fees on numerous products across a wide spectrum of categories, and can now benefit from reduction of up to ₹18 in weight handling fees!
Other benefits
₹18
Less weight handling fees for shipments up to 1 kg.
₹15
Less weight handling fees for heavier items.
₹20
Saved on refunds of products priced under ₹250.
Know more
How to sell on Amazon.in?
STEP 1: Register your account
Register on Amazon with GST/PAN details and an active bank account
STEP 2: Choose storage & shipping
Choose storage, packaging, and delivery options
STEP 3: List your products
List your products by providing product and brand details
STEP 4: Complete orders & get paid
Deliver orders to customers on time and get paid within 7 days of delivery

Crores of customers

crores of customers
on Amazon.in, India's most visited shopping destination.
26,800 crorepati sellers
95,500 lakhpati sellers in 2023 alone. You could be next.

About this item
🔹 PREMIUM INSULATED DESIGN Features thick aluminum foil lining with padded insulation to keep food warm or cold for hours—perfect for Indian weather conditions.
🔹 LEAKPROOF & EASY TO CLEAN High-quality food-grade aluminum lining is BPA-free, waterproof, and simple to wipe clean—ideal for messy meals or daily use.
🔹 LARGE STORAGE CAPACITY Spacious 11"x9.5"x6.1" design with wide opening fits lunch boxes, snacks, fruits, bottles & ice packs—great for work or school tiffin.
🔹 MULTIPLE POCKETS FOR ORGANIZATION Includes dual mesh side pockets, two front pouches, and an inner cutlery compartment—perfect for napkins, spoons, mobiles & more.
🔹 ERGONOMIC PADDED HANDLE Reinforced, soft-touch handles ensure comfort and durability—easy to carry for office, college, or weekend travel.
🔹 STYLISH & VERSATILE LOOK Modern unisex design suits both men and women—use as lunch tote, cooler bag, shopping bag or even a snack carrier.
🔹 SECURE ZIPPER CLOSURE Premium zip mechanism allows quick access while keeping your food safe and sealed during travel.
🔹 FOLDABLE & SPACE-SAVING Easily collapsible when not in use—saves space in your fridge, kitchen, or backpack.
🔹 IDEAL FOR MULTIPLE OCCASIONS Perfect companion for work, picnics, car rides, road trips, school or gym—also makes a thoughtful gift for spouse or parents.
🔹 DURABLE & WATER-RESISTANT FABRIC Crafted from scratch-resistant, waterproof Oxford fabric that holds shape and withstands daily wear and tear.

Features & Specs
Product Features
Insulated Interior – Keeps food warm or cold for hours with aluminum foil lining., Leakproof & BPA-Free – Safe, easy-to-clean material ensures hygiene and spill protection., Multi-Pocket Storage – Includes mesh, front & inner pockets for organized access., Portable & Durable – Padded handle, strong zippers & waterproof fabric for daily use., Spacious Design – Fits lunch boxes, snacks, bottles & cutlery with wide opening.

Product Description
Leakproof & Easy Clean
Spacious, Smart and Secure
Previous page
Next page
How long does this lunch bag keep food hot or cold?
Thanks to the thick padded insulation and premium aluminum foil lining, the lunch bag helps maintain food temperature for 4–6 hours, depending on external weather and use of ice packs—ideal for Indian climate conditions.
Is the lunch bag completely leakproof?
Yes. The inner lining is made from food-grade, BPA-free aluminum foil that is waterproof and leak-resistant, preventing spills from spreading outside the bag.
What can fit inside the lunch bag?
The spacious 11" × 9.5" × 6.1" design easily fits tiffin boxes, snack containers, fruits, water bottles, ice packs, and small flasks, making it perfect for office or school use.
Does the bag have extra pockets for storage?
Absolutely. It includes two front pockets, dual mesh side pockets, and an inner cutlery compartment—perfect for spoons, napkins, phone, keys, or small accessories.
Is this lunch bag suitable for both men and women?
Yes. The modern unisex design in dark grey color is stylish and versatile, making it suitable for men, women, and college students.
Carry Freshness in Style

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Product Summary: SaleOn Insulated Lunch Bag for Women & Men | Waterproof Soft Cooler Tote | Leakproof, Reusable with Pockets | Thermal Lunch Box for Office, Travel, Picnic (Charcoal Grey)
From SaleOn
4.4 out of 5 stars, 733 ratings
Customer reviews

Price
One-time purchase: ₹339.00
66% Savings
List Price:
₹999.00
Inclusive of all taxes
Purchasing options
Other sellers
Other sellers
About this Item
🔹 PREMIUM INSULATED DESIGN Features thick aluminum foil lining with padded insulation to keep food warm or cold for hours—perfect for Indian weather conditions.
🔹 LEAKPROOF & EASY TO CLEAN High-quality food-grade aluminum lining is BPA-free, waterproof, and simple to wipe clean—ideal for messy meals or daily use.
🔹 LARGE STORAGE CAPACITY Spacious 11"x9.5"x6.1" design with wide opening fits lunch boxes, snacks, fruits, bottles & ice packs—great for work or school tiffin.
🔹 MULTIPLE POCKETS FOR ORGANIZATION Includes dual mesh side pockets, two front pouches, and an inner cutlery compartment—perfect for napkins, spoons, mobiles & more.
🔹 ERGONOMIC PADDED HANDLE Reinforced, soft-touch handles ensure comfort and durability—easy to carry for office, college, or weekend travel.
🔹 STYLISH & VERSATILE LOOK Modern unisex design suits both men and women—use as lunch tote, cooler bag, shopping bag or even a snack carrier.
🔹 SECURE ZIPPER CLOSURE Premium zip mechanism allows quick access while keeping your food safe and sealed during travel.
🔹 FOLDABLE & SPACE-SAVING Easily collapsible when not in use—saves space in your fridge, kitchen, or backpack.
🔹 IDEAL FOR MULTIPLE OCCASIONS Perfect companion for work, picnics, car rides, road trips, school or gym—also makes a thoughtful gift for spouse or parents.
🔹 DURABLE & WATER-RESISTANT FABRIC Crafted from scratch-resistant, waterproof Oxford fabric that holds shape and withstands daily wear and tear.
Product description
Keep your meals fresh and organized with the SaleOn Insulated Lunch Bag for men and women. Made with leakproof, BPA-free aluminum foil and durable waterproof Oxford fabric, this stylish tote keeps food warm or cold for hours. Features include a wide opening, large main compartment, multiple pockets, ergonomic padded handle, and smooth zipper. Perfect for office, travel, school, picnics, and more.

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
Sponsored
Customers say
Customers find these dumbbells to be good quality and value for money, particularly suitable for home workouts and beginners. The grip is smooth and not slippery, and customers like the size, though some find them too huge. The durability and weight accuracy receive mixed feedback - while some praise the damage resistance and weight accuracy, others report cracked dumbbells and inaccurate weights. The material composition is also mixed, with some appreciating the PVC coating while others describe them as plastic with sand inside.

1-month review: I bought the 5kg dumbbells, and to be honest, they do the job. The build quality doesn't give a lot of confidence that they will last years, but it justifies their price. While lifting, sometimes a crackling sound occurs, but nothing to worry about. If you want something for the long term and very sturdy, then go for lower weights or buy good quality dumbbells. Although not perfect, this one works well for me. Recommended!

About this Item
Set of 2 PVC hex dumbbells for resistance training; each dumbbell weighs 5 kg *2 total 10 kg weight Made in India
Ideal for fitness classes or at-home workout routines Easy to store as they do not occupy a lot of space
Easy grip and anti slip
These durable hand weights are the perfect addition to aerobics and step workouts, as well as any standard strength training with weights for added intensity and resistance
6 month warranty for manufacturing defects.
Product description
Take your resistance training workouts to the next level with the Lifelong PVC Hex Dumbbells. A set of 2 dumbbells, each dumbbell weighs 5 kg. With resistance training, you can tone muscles and build strength. You can also burn calories, increase energy levels, protect bone health, and more. Ideal for both beginners and advanced fitness enthusiasts, training with dumbbells allows you to select resistance training exercises based on their similarity to actual movements that occurs during sports. Choose the right amount of weight for your routine, preference, and number of repetitions.
